Friend,

I’m writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America’s truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we’ve endured over the past two years, _and we’re taking action._

**That’s right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9d051771ca8b4944ad50116c8a3359b7&_e=stpQTniO_M9lfZhy1gTMeKwSXWYWn_BVtWSXuGBsDsQsvA34XKqoBIQkexDkNuutY3MKTiQ1jNSACjayrdRnukBc_x5pL_BrNXRJjmoRl6YS4SBUQI_5PsESJIrK2za4WtnzQJh5l_tMzgWtjH_72QjLB32CkXpUC9N2-p3y02Eml-2Z1VfosDBzRW4KW7kEmmntR9eaYm_4qJKZZW7hzeToKloua20axE2oLPrCdQxzJ3bLzGJuoqksITaT5g-Ua8oFYjXIAVY9HeI2q3fnrNhzQb07XuD_YvKDsm0_wXzXAkIhw1OabE9Q50PLXsV-Na95xye82VdmsIK7nrzuaEFuqihcjELZCIObtRZvCN-Nr7YybCfGlZjR5GyxeVMj "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We’ve had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it’s just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN’T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don’t stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9d051771ca8b4944ad50116c8a3359b7&_e=stpQTniO_M9lfZhy1gTMeKwSXWYWn_BVtWSXuGBsDsQsvA34XKqoBIQkexDkNuutY3MKTiQ1jNSACjayrdRnukBc_x5pL_BrNXRJjmoRl6YS4SBUQI_5PsESJIrK2za4WtnzQJh5l_tMzgWtjH_72QjLB32CkXpUC9N2-p3y02H5R2lA4UdDMlAyy49bJI-5NnBvSox1rY-JYETDJUxDf03kNUfwAAz9gshTy6wPiLUWiEbrZJ1Vc_7_0CYY2LU5c5ffOl9wWNYMnMIPlke79EY4TyPPfmaCsYFkqqfn9A5vZHCl70MbemiXAOIRZ3U6AwpRKqD8Md4ilY1kn4HTXdBCpUmQXh5wpRy2lio9uJF8cG7fFmiEp5A4KjkqRCd8 "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9d051771ca8b4944ad50116c8a3359b7&_e=stpQTniO_M9lfZhy1gTMeKwSXWYWn_BVtWSXuGBsDsQsvA34XKqoBIQkexDkNuutY3MKTiQ1jNSACjayrdRnukBc_x5pL_BrNXRJjmoRl6YS4SBUQI_5PsESJIrK2za4pW-rbXwav2XdAiQlH7WoHttfPOdu3e1kx5X6CU4eAx2V5iK2j8dc-m6iXNikJr1hNssw4IRbEpgRBd1V3Y-JHnxaOXpMphz0YcNrNRmrjnhISTS9Ti8HZjpsYXPaHFmIt0PQQZdFtBflNcOeBXxhsSA1Q6_S3omn7N2hfkY9uGkQq_oedOc5isrMYApfVyBVBa_34kmyjtyMWMGDH0wijcAMsil7QY5k7NEH6kArUoMc797gNXprucjHSYHbwsZ4q_YEDu9Tgq9g-oszp-XkEA%3D%3D "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9d051771ca8b4944ad50116c8a3359b7&_e=stpQTniO_M9lfZhy1gTMeKwSXWYWn_BVtWSXuGBsDsQsvA34XKqoBIQkexDkNuutY3MKTiQ1jNSACjayrdRnukBc_x5pL_BrNXRJjmoRl6YS4SBUQI_5PsESJIrK2za4KdYLQjTNN1DKatbUec_PRXAWY66qZSb8hqwZP_3gMpETucsWeKiv15r8UbS36GlxTiDBHUasEnOX_08e699wsMNuOaqntdeWdJRE_Y1X4TrpZvd9GgSRe8m9W5V__GG8CC1xe5YwTtwERiPW--XYS09-smic7VB4tUH6pU3_URaD5O1JPf5WrRD0yA_Eaa4yTd-CBj5mP9rz5CjiZY_siwnDWoH48cN0BnjVSpzCmZKCBpGuWZ9MkFMgJNEmh6I5B7zasM3Mdc9G2O19ZDZOng%3D%3D "$750 = 500 Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9d051771ca8b4944ad50116c8a3359b7&_e=stpQTniO_M9lfZhy1gTMeKwSXWYWn_BVtWSXuGBsDsQsvA34XKqoBIQkexDkNuutY3MKTiQ1jNSACjayrdRnukBc_x5pL_BrNXRJjmoRl6YS4SBUQI_5PsESJIrK2za4JHT57bYA2_ZstvWPh0JT33mblruPkCY2NQI_M6dVPSfJd8RAzTBOsgpowvIehrQCmQ996SuooGBU8XgRgefugt1OdqnPxqXz2BSXWTJL543SDfphe1XfD1FO19aIWAtBOR6cQIokL58iY8aV210F-rpThNljpDfOubfMbxDAAiie8Fem4qt2A5dQWdvMs1NQkKL20Gs9OANjM4E3YF-ekX9rcVs6jMr7dLbOzTtIC73XdwFij2UW92XAnVRprzY8Yjy6lxW-5N-dnnHa9WpiPQ%3D%3D "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we’re putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9d051771ca8b4944ad50116c8a3359b7&_e=stpQTniO_M9lfZhy1gTMeKwSXWYWn_BVtWSXuGBsDsQsvA34XKqoBIQkexDkNuutY3MKTiQ1jNSACjayrdRnukBc_x5pL_BrNXRJjmoRl6YS4SBUQI_5PsESJIrK2za4emKoAidPU4HgN2hGj-ZV2vNy5nisVzYg8Rv3CXVvJAhxaTcjyP8oMOC_Cncprm6K-iJJjxRGtU_BiPn3YX7ebtgWaepNhNzqyI0IXAd3-rjv1tqInCOxJqmOZ1oAcDAEmBZiWZFQwGnouJV3NVaZ-gW-R5zXsDlMCrnm7ZBjfRjEUoSz1HitCkxZ__57A4FhWoq1F-DVWXrAV3YSf4qz2kIjSd9NrV_KOpgfCPvC7gxNwzD6hWVbvlPdzFYtFuWk "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

Dear Friend,
Life is more expensive than ever right now. And we all know the reason why. Disastrous policies out of Washington, D.C. are driving up the cost of food, gas, and everyday items. Marylanders have seen this before. _These are the same kinds of policies Martin O’Malley and his partisan allies forced on Maryland for far too long._ [**Year after year they voted to raise our taxes – 40 consecutive times!**](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExjcnD4lCFizxa-2B1sX6vHRkAXPu8pYIAYsBMGIZ5Y-2BB86KQ_D_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz67y4PYNOyKps15SZhuv-2BbMwkkNdJr8inBBrAYx8vyOwlfjSZ0t-2FHUBLqaoAjHFoLxQUn4MgzUZiDGLbbqeuCVtma4bH53ntLvRLCOnMQCe3H3FPdaknEMdvO3AKHswKHnK3jwN-2FhvwW45hghUFdtQ-2BbXW0PH2JDJu08hBJJEI9CsXr7FsMrvVZnSZmlMIM8RG2ZoHdrXAryy6beBPcfr4A1wM8LNO9nL2Z3yHSg3V9JL8UueElXPuu2nfCNNTw4ppuLdYIwfoe9PWJ66FkC40S4hfIN8mTkehki2CxO5zvfrVV4qz3c7wUqj2rs7s9F3wbggiL1W-2FbhY4pAroxZu5hS8a7E5gigMOJhtwxRQ4SS3W4CW2bWh2o-2FGr5H44rq3h8xujZXgd-2FgkGrM37dbWPcpQa9B9PNfufrTiu8DhEeGd0kpTSWWTXqa1vfhQO4fM5X1-2FywElOglhZPREvLGlObQJtdRtVEedrSXhQbsdzfq7VA6A8HXkyL72p4ha4zi8enWiKIwAc0DjTldQTJON90QN39ExaVEbMiuGc8uICZEKQUIeD0NklCsPgSlHC8gHJQlBrTjNTELHPCw1KvehHx2AwqYYlZ-2B7nSFg-2FCVORJTWRrfYfdU3qWpPrTKeOTM0qPcrPtJWs9OxXljjblOR1djCtCqX8HqgMJQ3HolF5iTJz6UIulN5Es3057UOAE1U1P-2BCw-2BMSKvP780djVeW4lmGdpx8xUE-2FSEwIEf1u8A9MWJwRF1ZBAPBGKZGpQxGmwQ1Eh3TYOMgFq40gUnzTQMm2AE2NOXNzdCP2Yy-2FXBolzZUiJXP2Q5paRjZbKS-2FeH-2FQ)
**Until we all got fed up. That’s when we joined together to elect Governor Larry Hogan -- and he stopped the tax increases.**
This year Maryland is at a tax and spend crossroads again. We can let our guard down and allow the one-party rule that will result in higher taxes on everything – _**even the rain**_ – to return to power.
Or we can fight to protect taxpayers, small businesses, and working families across Maryland by ensuring a strong fiscal guardian continues to have our back in Annapolis. **I am running for Governor to do just that.**
[**Will you stand with me to fight tax increases and keep Maryland affordable? **](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExjcnD4lCFizxa-2B1sX6vHRkAXPu8pYIAYsBMGIZ5Y-2BB86UaWs_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz67y4PYNOyKps15SZhuv-2BbMwkkNdJr8inBBrAYx8vyOwlfjSZ0t-2FHUBLqaoAjHFoLxQUn4MgzUZiDGLbbqeuCVtma4bH53ntLvRLCOnMQCe3H3FPdaknEMdvO3AKHswKHnK3jwN-2FhvwW45hghUFdtQ-2BbXW0PH2JDJu08hBJJEI9CsXr7FsMrvVZnSZmlMIM8RG2ZoHdrXAryy6beBPcfr4A1wM8LNO9nL2Z3yHSg3V9JL8UueElXPuu2nfCNNTw4ppuLdYIwfoe9PWJ66FkC40S4hfIN8mTkehki2CxO5zvfrVV4qz3c7wUqj2rs7s9F3wbggiL1W-2FbhY4pAroxZu5hS8a7E5gigMOJhtwxRQ4SS3W4CW2bWh2o-2FGr5H44rq3h8xujZXgd-2FgkGrM37dbWPcpQa9B9PNfufrTiu8DhEeGd0kpTSWWTXqa1vfhQO4fM5X1-2FywElOglhZPREvLGlObQJtdRtVEedrSXhQbsdzfq7VA6A8HXkyL72p4ha4zi8enWiKIwAc0DjTldQTJON90QN39ExaVEbMiuGc8uICZEKQUIeD0NklCsPgSlHC8gHJQlBrTjNTELHPCw1KvehHx2AwqYYlZ-2B7nSFg-2FCVORJTWRrfYfdU3qWpPrTKeOTM0qPcrPtJWs9OxXljjblOR1djCtCqX8HqgMJQ3HolF5iTIwxEod3ogKroqJnDHyxrihfOSKtp9-2FaMEU2rIwS2bZeCAUmd4RxpCYBSgU7bMWS-2BlyAuV0CvOsbCXjV9j0bcpnA3pHqPNIxJsq5l1e1MvSrjQg-2F-2BC0SdBIKBmGBnPeyTkwILRaGcXOmq7haozfdY50)

clean_body: | | | | I know what it’s like to struggle. Dear Friend, Life is more expensive than ever right now. And we all know the reason why. Disastrous policies out of Washington, D.C. are driving up the cost of food, gas, and everyday items. Marylanders have seen this before. These are the same kinds of policies Martin O’Malley and his partisan allies forced on Maryland for far too long. Until we all got fed up. That’s when we joined together to elect Governor Larry Hogan -- and he stopped the tax increases. This year Maryland is at a tax and spend crossroads again. We can let our guard down and allow the one-party rule that will result in higher taxes on everything – even the rain – to return to power. Or we can fight to protect taxpayers, small businesses, and working families across Maryland by ensuring a strong fiscal guardian continues to have our back in Annapolis. I am running for Governor to do just that. As a single mom, I dropped out of school to raise my boys. I waited tables, and tended bar, scraping together enough resources to start a small business to provide for my family. I finally graduated college at age 36 – the first in my family to earn a degree – but it took a lot of hard work. I know what it’s like to struggle. And I know what it’s like to succeed. That’s why I’ll always fight for lower taxes and smarter policies that help Maryland families work through challenges and find success. Together we can fight to protect taxpayers and working families. We can do this. But I cannot do it alone. Sincerely, | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: asking for input, not money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
I'm asking you personally to complete this survey before midnight:
| | | It's Speaker Pelosi. I'm taking time out of my Sunday evening to email my top supporters directly, so please read every word of my message below:

The 2022 elections are just months away. That means my team is working harder than ever to develop a winning strategy to hold the House and defeat Republicans.

And here's the honest truth:**Feedback from grassroots supporters like you is critical to our efforts.**

That's why my team just compiled an EXCLUSIVE survey for my top supporters - and why I'm asking you personally to complete it at the link below before midnight:

**[https://action.dccc.org/survey/email/february-2022-priority-survey](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/P4raFv-)**

Please, don't delay.

**Your feedback will be shared directly with senior DCCC staff** as we build a winning strategy to defend our House Majority and elect more Democrats nationwide.

You have never let me down before - _so I know I can expect to see your name on my list of responses before midnight._

**[https://action.dccc.org/survey/email/february-2022-priority-survey](https://links.e.dccc.)**
---

Thank you,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46428822&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MjI4NjU2MQS2&l=14437198&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46428822&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MjI4NjU2MQS2&l=14437198&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

| Peter,

**Local police officers work tirelessly to keep us safe. Their commitment to protecting our communities requires great sacrifice, selflessness, and strength. I am honored to receive the endorsement of the Plano Police Association.**
_"Local law enforcement works with partners at every level of government - from county, to state, to federal - to ensure that our officers and departments are well equipped to handle anything that may come our way. Since Van's service in the Texas Legislature, and now as a Congressman, his commitment to supporting our officers and our community has been clear and consistent. Plano Police Association proudly endorses Van Taylor for re-election."_
\- Plano Police Association

name: Doug White
subject: Immigration should benefit everyone!
body:
Recently we have seen two pieces of legislation move forward on immigration reform. Both have been largely cheered because they do provide a
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/bcNyG8q8y/c?w=5ftTWTl80jDLy1XpDyevQ6TxkhA7ekE5Dsfy5f87hlk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2JjTnlHOHE4eT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Immigration should benefit everyone!
---
| |
---
| | Recently we have seen two pieces of legislation move forward on immigration reform. Both have been largely cheered because they do provide a path to citizenship — or do they? Dan Newhouse has masked his animosity toward immigration reform behind a thin veil of hope. In the Farmworkers Modernization Act, co-written by him, he offers a possibility for citizenship after 14 - 18 years of labor. This legislation was also to reform the H-2A visa process to make it more accessible for our farmers. Even lawyers representing farmers and agriculture say that this document did basically nothing to reform the process, but it did create a modern day indentured servitude. Now we see the Dignity Program put forward with Newhouse as a sponsor. Again, it leads with the opportunity for citizenship for those that have been in the US undocumented for a minimum of five years. Again, this seems like moving toward the light; however, it also has a loaded backend that requires that our borders be sealed before this path to citizenship can be implemented. In essence, if the wall is not built and manned with armed guards, no one gets anything. We must demand better. Immigration reform benefits us all: DREAMers, migrant farmworkers, farmers, our communities, and our economy. Over one-third of Washington’s agricultural workers are thought to be migrants. Furthermore, greater than 15% of jobs in our state are agriculture-related. Fair, efficient, humane immigration policy is not only the right thing to do, it is integral to the success of Washington’s economy. So why is it that Newhouse can not bring himself to put forward immigration reform without attaching burdensome and often cruel caveats? Constructing yet more artificial barriers for agricultural workers and small farmers hurts our struggling economy. If you scratch Newhouse’s thin veneer, you see clearly his contempt for immigration, migrant farmworkers, and farmers dependent on immigration reform. With Doug White representing Washington’s 4th District in Congress, our immigration policy will be evidence-based and compassionate. Republicans like Newhouse depend on xenophobic, punitive policies that hurt farmers, workers and consumers alike. C.D. 4 needs a Representative who will protect our economy and the most vulnerable among us.
---
| |
---

We discussed the crucial Odessa Ground Water Replacement program, which supplies surface water to farmers in the Columbia Basin.
---
| |
---
| | In Toppenish on Friday, Feb 18, I attended a remembrance for [Rosenda Strong](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/bcNyG8q8y/c?w=2J6b0hOIHQJDF0QJfnHyfSfii6jPrhcqDjT0IYP2ppA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0Npc3N5c3Ryb25nNi8iLCJyIjoiODAzYTZlOWItZjA1My00ZmI0LTA3OWUtY2Q5OTg1ZDJjYjU2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0) \- an indigenous woman tragically killed in 2018. I was moved by the calamity of Murdered and Missing Indigenous People (MMIP), who are affected at disproportionate rates and often go ignored by the media. See a photo, share a photo. See something, say something.

My opponents are extremely well-funded, and I’ve got a target on my back. I need the help of grassroots supporters like YOU today. name: Heather from Voter Protection Project
subject: I noticed your name was missing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-)
---
Hey – it’s Heather from VPP.

Earlier this week, we sent you a vital petition calling on the Senate to pass Jon Ossoff’s landmark bill to _guarantee the right to vote._

But you didn’t sign – and we missed our goal by just **95** signatures from your state.

_We know all good Democrats want to protect the right to vote from Republican voter suppression._

So we’re reopening our petition and giving you a second chance to sign!

**Please, click[HERE](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220220_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-) or use the buttons below to confirm your signature »** | [95 SIGNATURES FROM YOUR STATE NEEDED: STAND WITH JON OSSOFF, PASS THIS BILL!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220220_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-)
---
We’ve attacked the original petition below for your records. Thanks,

Heather,
_Executive Director_
_Voter Protection Project_
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: WOW! WOW! WOW! (VPP)
Subject: Did you see what Senator Ossoff just did?!
To: Top Democrats
**BREAKING! BREAKING! BREAKING!** [_Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff files the first bill in U.S. history to ever GUARANTEE the voting rights of EVERY American_](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220220_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220220_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-) | [30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH JON OSSOFF, PASS THIS BILL!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220220_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-)
---
Team, Senator Ossoff is AMAZING -- he just filed one of the _most comprehensive voting reform bills in HISTORY!!_

But Republicans are already coming out of the woodwork to keep this bill from going anywhere!

_They’re desperate to keep the loopholes in place so they can keep cheating and WINNING!_

[We need a groundswell of support to get this bill through. PLEASE, ADD YOUR NAME IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220220_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=12&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220220_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=13&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-)
[ADD MY NAME!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220220_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=14&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-)
---
Thank you,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1302%2E878179%2EjYbfc-)

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: We must act now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59615516:JZSI1_ENg:m:1:3253819041:F71F7AA79B9F6F9033D4C3EAB78CCF21:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59615516:JZSI1_ENg:m:1:3253819041:F71F7AA79B9F6F9033D4C3EAB78CCF21:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. **[But there 's something you can do.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59615516:JZSI1_ENg:m:1:3253819041:F71F7AA79B9F6F9033D4C3EAB78CCF21:r)** That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. **[Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59615516:JZSI1_ENg:m:1:3253819041:F71F7AA79B9F6F9033D4C3EAB78CCF21:r)** And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59615516:JZSI1_ENg:m:1:3253819041:F71F7AA79B9F6F9033D4C3EAB78CCF21:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59615516:JZSI1_ENg:m:1:3253819041:F71F7AA79B9F6F9033D4C3EAB78CCF21:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59615516:JZSI1_ENg:m:1:3253819041:F71F7AA79B9F6F9033D4C3EAB78CCF21:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59615516:JZSI1_ENg:m:1:3253819041:F71F7AA79B9F6F9033D4C3EAB78CCF21:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee

They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple. And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race. Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it. They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back. The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.But we must act now. My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project. But I don't stand a chance without you. And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state. It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky Paid for by 1776 Project PAC 184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20McKaughan=20for=20U.S.=20Congress?=
subject: Final Week!!
body:
We're in the sprint to the finish now. Some volunteer opportunities await! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4a7ac767b1ad/volunteers-needed-trump-rally-and-lake-conroe-boat-show-15918334?e=82b2b364e3)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Greetings Dan McKaughan for Texas Team!!

I hope you are all well.

I will continue to open these emails with a giant THANK YOU for your continued support.

We are now in the final week of EARLY VOTING, and the primary is NEXT TUESDAY!!

There are three volunteer areas that I could really use some help in. Please note that if you're interested in doing any of them, contact me by replying to this email or calling/texting me at 936.282.7066.

1. The phone calling is in limbo. The company I'm working with is experiencing some rules changes that affect the way they help candidates like me. So stand by...If you're interested in calling folks, let me know once again. If everything gets worked out, we'll start calling as soon as possible. It is not too late to reach many who haven't voted yet, and a personal call will go a long way to showing them we're sincere.

2. We still need volunteers at the polling sites. It's 7am to 7pm this week (Tuesday through Friday). It has been quite beneficial to talk with the voters before they go in to the voting booth. We've been able to personally tell them about me, and it has really helped. It would be too hard to get someone at every polling location every day, so if you'd like to be at the one nearest your home or wherever is most convenient for you, let me know. We'll get you some signs and material. This is actually a very important opportunity.

3. This weekend is the final weekend before the primary next Tuesday, March 1st. If you have an hour or two to spare Saturday, Sunday, and/or Monday, I'll ask (beg) that you walk around your neighborhood and pass out a few of my flyers (click [HERE](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=e852648251&e=82b2b364e3) so you can print, or text me and we can get some to you). Maybe 10-20 houses.

And if you can, make some phone calls to family and friends and remind them to vote, regardless of where they live in Texas!

I think that's it. Thank you all again for your help and support.

To keep with the baseball analogy from last time, we're halfway home from third. Almost there.

Peace,

Dan

**We’re 1 week away from the Primary!!!**

[http://danmckaughan.com](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=db4a677410&e=82b2b364e3)

#whocandancan #constituentsovercash
---
|
---
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Dan McKaughan for Texas, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Dan McKaughan for Texas3915 W Davis St Ste 130-294Conroe, TX 77304-1878
[Add us to your address book](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5&e=82b2b364e3&c=6bb56e7f2f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5&e=82b2b364e3&c=6bb56e7f2f).

This is horrible news,

It’s regarding your credit card purchase records.

They’ve been exposed.

As of February 21st, 2022, over 13 government agencies have full access to your entire credit card purchase history.

Here’s why this is very bad for you,

Even if you think you have nothing to hide...

All it takes is for them to find ANY purchases they deem as “suspicious”... and they could easily:

Investigate you for “extremist activity”

Freeze your assets

Even throw you in jail!

So if you’ve purchased any guns, ammo, survival supplies, or anything like that in the past 10 years...

You need to know 3 simple steps to become invisible to this disgusting surveillance of your finances.

You can see exactly what they are in the new and FREE book “Avoiding the Eye” by Richard Marshall.

But your Free copy of this shocking book doesn’t just help you protect your purchase records...

Inside, you’ll also discover:

Which part of your car talks to Big Brother... and how to shut it up.

How common appliances spy on you

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

- and how to blindfold them for good.

Even though they can listen to your phone... you can do this simple thing to block them.

And more!

The CIA openly admitted before Congress all of this is happening.

And that’s why the author of “Avoiding the Eye”, Richard Marshall, wants you to have his new book for Free

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

!

Marshall is one of the top survivalists in the nation and claims to have extensive government connections – wants to keep Americans informed and protected.

So he’s decided to give a few copies of his incredible book away for Free.

And while Richard's nice... he ain’t rich. Which means supplies are limited to just 200 copies - and a ton have already been claimed.

To keep the government’s nose out of your business click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

Thank You.

name: Matt Richards for Congress
subject: CONSERVATIVE BUSINESSMAN MATT RICHARDS ENDS CAMPAIGN, ENDORSES MIKE COLLINS FOR CONGRESS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Richards for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| For Immediate Release Monday, February 21, 2022
CONSERVATIVE BUSINESSMAN MATT RICHARDS ENDS CAMPAIGN, ENDORSES MIKE COLLINS FOR CONGRESS
---
| MONROE, GA--Today, conservative outsider and pro-Trump demolition expert Matt Richards announced the end of his campaign and endorsed Mike Collins for Congress.
"I left the private sector and launched my campaign for Congress to Wreck the Left's radical agenda and put America back where it belongs - FIRST," said Richards.
"While I am ending my run for office, the fight to stop Joe Biden and the radical left from destroying our country is far from over. That's why I am endorsing Mike Collins and pledge to do my part to help him secure victory at the ballot box.
"Mike is a proven, Pro-Trump conservative warrior who we can trust to champion our America First values in Congress. We need a fighter who has lived, worked, raised a family and started a business in this district representing us in Washington, and I'm confident that Mike Collins will deliver real results for families in Georgia's 10th Congressional District.

"I am proud of our campaign, grateful for the numerous endorsements, and honored by the hundreds of grassroots supporters that joined the Demo Crew. Stay tuned and keep your sledgehammers close. Our journey together is just getting started."
###
---
| | |
---
| A lifelong Georgian, Matt was born in Lilburn and currently resides in Bethlehem. After spending much of his childhood with limited means and sleeping on a dirty floor, Matt was forced to drop out of high school to provide for his family. Through hard work and determination, Matt climbed the ranks from changing oil to working every job in the construction field to building numerous businesses, including, Legacy Demolition that he owns today.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | For Immediate Release Monday, February 21, 2022 CONSERVATIVE BUSINESSMAN MATT RICHARDS ENDS CAMPAIGN, ENDORSES MIKE COLLINS FOR CONGRESS | MONROE, GA--Today, conservative outsider and pro-Trump demolition expert Matt Richards announced the end of his campaign and endorsed Mike Collins for Congress. "I left the private sector and launched my campaign for Congress to Wreck the Left's radical agenda and put America back where it belongs - FIRST," said Richards. "While I am ending my run for office, the fight to stop Joe Biden and the radical left from destroying our country is far from over. That's why I am endorsing Mike Collins and pledge to do my part to help him secure victory at the ballot box. "Mike is a proven, Pro-Trump conservative warrior who we can trust to champion our America First values in Congress. We need a fighter who has lived, worked, raised a family and started a business in this district representing us in Washington, and I'm confident that Mike Collins will deliver real results for families in Georgia's 10th Congressional District. "I am proud of our campaign, grateful for the numerous endorsements, and honored by the hundreds of grassroots supporters that joined the Demo Crew. Stay tuned and keep your sledgehammers close. Our journey together is just getting started." | | | | A lifelong Georgian, Matt was born in Lilburn and currently resides in Bethlehem. After spending much of his childhood with limited means and sleeping on a dirty floor, Matt was forced to drop out of high school to provide for his family. Through hard work and determination, Matt climbed the ranks from changing oil to working every job in the construction field to building numerous businesses, including, Legacy Demolition that he owns today. | Paid for by Matt Richards for Congress == == == | | Matt Richards for Congress | PO Box 1109, Monroe, GA 30655 | | Sent by mailto:team@votemattrichards.com powered by

body:
www.ashleywardforcongress.com [www.ashleywardforcongress.com]
Weekly Updates
VOLUNTEER KICKOFF SUCCESS!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/VE_Group.jpg]

This evening I'm a little tired - but my heart is full and spirit high! A HUGE thank you to everyone who attended the Volunteer Kickoff Event! What a fun Sunday afternoon. We wrote postcards, put together yard signs, stamped and stickered until there was nothing left!
Volunteers are key to our campaign success. With such a large district, we need all hands on deck! There are lots of opportunities. You can host a meet and greet, a postcard writing party, or volunteer to distribute literature.
Sign up below!!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/VE_WritingAll.jpg]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/VE_Signs.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/VE_Shirts.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/VE_Writing.jpg]
LIT DROP [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0f44aeaa22a6ffc43-litdrop] POSTCARDS [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=PostCards&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20write%20postcards.%20Tell%20me%20how%20to%20get%20involved%21]
HOST EVENT [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Host%20an%20Event&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20host%20an%20event%21%20Let%20me%20know%20how%20I%20can%20get%20involved.]
What is a Lit Drop?
Each weekend we head out into the community to spread the word about the campaign. To be safe, we hanging literature on doors, a no-contact way to canvass.
We have lots of folks to reach, which means we need lots of volunteers. I hope you will consider joining us for a couple of hours on a Saturday or Sunday.
MEET & GREET
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_1009.jpg] In addition to canvassing, we've been attending meet and greets throughout the district.
What a fun way to get to know members of the community! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_1011.jpg]
If you are interested in hosting a meet and greet, let us know!
I'D LIKE TO HOST A MEET AND GREET [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Host%20a%20Meet%20and%20Greet&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20host%20a%20meet%20and%20greet.%20Let%20me%20know%20next%20steps%21]
Virtual Meet and Greets Alternate text [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/compare-fibre-fRGoTJFQAHM-unsplash.jpg]
Do you have friends or neighbors who would like to meet Ashley? Consider hosting a virtual meet and greet! These are low-key events where you gather a few of your friends to talk with Congressional candidate Ashley Ward.
Virtual meet and greets are a great way to share with Ashley the issues that most concern you and your community.
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Yard%20Sign%20%287%29.png]
YARD SIGNS ARE HERE!
Yard signs are an effective way to get word out about my campaign. We need as many folks as possible to show their support and put a yard sign in their yard! Pick one up for you and your neighbor!
REQUEST A YARD SIGN [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/yard-sign]
Dear friends,
I'm not a career politician, which means I don't have a large fundraising infrastructure. But I do need funds to keep my campaign going. I hope you will consider donating to my campaign. These funds go to yard signs and other materials to get my name out. In a grassroots campaign like mine, every donation counts!
Ashley Ward
SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]
Section Header
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/140e4178-f491-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/8e509502-1793-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTUwOTUwMi0xNzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMPUcV2TUPEAGB0WMs29G8TffbtU9YzoaLwwqmzPwIM=&id=107267475 .

name: Team McGrath
subject: POLL: Support Our Educators
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
What do you think, Peter?

| | Take a 30-second poll: CONGRESS NEEDS TO PRIORITIZE EDUCATORS >>> | ****[I AGREE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42048974/331426197/-1720105110?refcode=ea.89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWFhMGY4OS0xZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqoaaqgEWsDJPOdyc-EUJpI_6wabFxa13WNkbJJUy6I=&emci=2c94472f-748f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)**** | ****[I DISAGREE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42048978/331426201/-1720105110?refcode=ea.89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWFhMGY4OS0xZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqoaaqgEWsDJPOdyc-EUJpI_6wabFxa13WNkbJJUy6I=&emci=2c94472f-748f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)****
---|---
Peter,

We are facing teacher shortages across Wisconsin, but they are not a new phenomenon. Over the past decade, we’ve seen fewer college students pursuing degrees in Education. Students often cite the lack of compensation and intense expectations as reasons they are avoiding the profession.

And now, because of the COVID-19 crisis, teacher and substitute shortages are the most severe they’ve ever been. Teachers are leaving the profession in droves because they are overworked and undervalued.

**Teachers play a critical role in society.** They nurture and educate the next generation of workers, leaders, and community members.

Deb’s mom was an educator at the University of Wisconsin-Stout. When Deb watched her mom plan lessons, get to campus hours early, and stay late to help her students, she witnessed just how hard teachers work. She understands how important it is that our leaders prioritize our educators and school staff.

Deb knows Wisconsin teachers deserve support in their profession, from increased classroom support and more virtual assistance to federal programs to assist in increasing teachers' salaries. Teachers shouldn’t have to work multiple jobs just to make ends meet.
We need 15 responses from Cresco on our poll by midnight. Let us know your thoughts: should we support our educators more?
****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42048981/331426205/-1720105110?refcode=ea.89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWFhMGY4OS0xZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqoaaqgEWsDJPOdyc-EUJpI_6wabFxa13WNkbJJUy6I=&emci=2c94472f-748f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)**** | ****[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42048984/331426209/-1720105110?refcode=ea.89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWFhMGY4OS0xZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqoaaqgEWsDJPOdyc-EUJpI_6wabFxa13WNkbJJUy6I=&emci=2c94472f-748f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=89aa0f89-1e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)****
---|---
Thanks for your input,

Team McGrath
| **Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity.**

Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. clean_body: What do you think, Peter? | | Take a 30-second poll: CONGRESS NEEDS TO PRIORITIZE EDUCATORS >>> | ** | ---|--- Peter, We are facing teacher shortages across Wisconsin, but they are not a new phenomenon. Over the past decade, we’ve seen fewer college students pursuing degrees in Education. Students often cite the lack of compensation and intense expectations as reasons they are avoiding the profession. And now, because of the COVID-19 crisis, teacher and substitute shortages are the most severe they’ve ever been. Teachers are leaving the profession in droves because they are overworked and undervalued. Teachers play a critical role in society. They nurture and educate the next generation of workers, leaders, and community members. Deb’s mom was an educator at the University of Wisconsin-Stout. When Deb watched her mom plan lessons, get to campus hours early, and stay late to help her students, she witnessed just how hard teachers work. She understands how important it is that our leaders prioritize our educators and school staff. Deb knows Wisconsin teachers deserve support in their profession, from increased classroom support and more virtual assistance to federal programs to assist in increasing teachers' salaries. Teachers shouldn’t have to work multiple jobs just to make ends meet. We need 15 responses from Cresco on our poll by midnight. Let us know your thoughts: should we support our educators more? | ---|--- Thanks for your input, Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. body:

We cannot let anyone under federal investigation anywhere near Arizona’s elections. Will you rush $20 right now to help DASS defeat him in November? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022122_B1_AC_30D]

Mark Finchem is one of the most dangerous GOP candidates for statewide office anywhere in the country.
We already knew he was one of the biggest proponents of the ‘big lie’ in Arizona – but now the Jan 6 committee is digging into communications he had with the organizers of a rally at the Capitol building that day! name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Lahmeyer vs Lankford Debate - March 25, 2022
body:
Lahmeyer vs Lankford Debate On Friday, March 25, 2022, in Tulsa, OK there will be a Lahmeyer vs Lankford debate. Whether or not James Lankford show
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3621.1.b2b9b0ae22d73f22c33855fc530ced71) |
---
## Lahmeyer vs Lankford Debate
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3622.1.ab5ece95d2671ab89d15174ff10a0f55)
---
On **Friday, March 25, 2022** , in Tulsa, OK there will be a [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3623.1.623baed97f88fb7f969bab77efe014c8) vs [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3624.1.322bfb90c1e37150fe7e9d7edb38ac99) _debate_.
Whether or not [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3625.1.5c0cdfc85ec6b8d737ff5e15fd456893) shows up in-person to defend his record is _completely up to him_.
Over the last several months, organizations like the **Oil & Gas Workers Association** have requested that [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3626.1.00adc8447043f54702366442e500ce19) and I debate while they host. I accepted. [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3627.1.75e141e6ef81b0af0444613fc09beab7) did not.
When I asked Incumbent [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3628.1.06d3466f4aa16ad2536063253eadfac0) in-person about a debate, he got **very shaken**.
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3629.1.f6e99131434643cd3fcd6753797d464c) Jackson Lahmeyer Asking James Lankford To Debate
---
I believe Incumbent [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3630.1.01d9603ca35379a611136596f2cdbc98) owes it to the people of Oklahoma to stand on a debate stage and answer the questions that the people want answered.
Therefore, if [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3631.1.a21e2e3f94459c010fffa59e8732d1d2) does not appear at the debate in Tulsa a **cardboard cutout** of [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3632.1.7d81c8578e209e033eedb33e28265b89) will be used in the debate with many of _his own voice recordings_ used to give an answer to the questions posed on March 25.
Incumbent [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3633.1.bfa0928a35bbaa26a222ae11567d2a8c) has until **March 1** to agree to appear at the debate and come to terms with who will moderate the debate and which venue will host it in Tulsa. If [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3634.1.d3a814a27bd01a44da48dc494b5fed2f) has not accepted by March 1, then the cardboard cutout will be used, and event details will be released so that you can attend.
I believe it is **VERY** important that the Republican voters have an opportunity to hear a [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3635.1.507df496a664d90a0a61aef5d8331a33) vs [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3636.1.14e96530cadd507a87ace98ffa7d225b) debate.
Mark your calendars for March 25, 2022!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3637.1.87c1cc29470c2fdc8e0e09340c1b76be), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3638.1.3775315bffdfcd8d3cb85d8ba6e0cc1b), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3639.1.e3c5ea0ba5fbaf1046ea7d69ba10fa56), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3640.1.0d0c1b6b854da7033738381557686bfd), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3641.1.fa5c0b21420539940b7ac405b479a7ff)).
| | [ Click Here To Learn More About Jackson Lahmeyer ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4135860.3642.1.970f1462f4b117ea3468cb94b4eb34aa)
---

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: Truckers for Freedom: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | |
Peter

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59619224:6eb6-_ELN:m:1:3253819041:7078FE814C5C1B6330CA11EC0D61C39A:r)_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power.**

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, [**_which is why we 're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59619224:6eb6-_ELN:m:1:3253819041:7078FE814C5C1B6330CA11EC0D61C39A:r)

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! [**_$15 = 10 Miles_**

**_$30 = 20 Miles_**

**_$150 = 100 Miles_**

**_$375 = 250 Miles_**

**_$750 = 500 Miles_**

**_$1,500 = 1,000 Miles_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59619224:6eb6-_ELN:m:1:3253819041:7078FE814C5C1B6330CA11EC0D61C39A:r)
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

[**_So, I hope you 'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59619224:6eb6-_ELN:m:1:3253819041:7078FE814C5C1B6330CA11EC0D61C39A:r)

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

| Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

body:
I want to make sure you read this
Friend, last week marked four years since the horrific shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, where 17 students and educators – including my friend Fred Guttenberg's daughter Jaime – were senselessly murdered with an assault weapon designed for war. **Last week also marked four years of inaction in the Senate. **
---
All these years later without change because politicians like Marco Rubio have prioritized the gun lobby's agenda over the lives of our loved ones. So I want to make sure you saw Fred's message.
It means the world to have Fred's trust and support in my race to defeat Marco Rubio. If you missed his message, I hope you'll give it a read below, because it's a story about why we urgently need to win this crucial battleground race so we can pass the gun safety legislation Americans desperately need. So we can finally do more than offer thoughts and prayers and actually save lives from gun violence.
**[Please, will you chip in a grassroots donation of whatever you can spare today to help me defeat Marco Rubio, expand our Senate majority and finally pass lifesaving gun safety legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42054362/331447555/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2466-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFmY2E2ZC0yMzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJbJNb-v-b12LdO5tg8ZwqUL2wss1nF806LNJxQ5OOk=)**
Thanks so much,

Val Demings
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Fred Guttenberg**
Subject: It's been four years since my daughter Jaime was murdered
| | |
---
Friend,

It's been four years since my beautiful daughter, Jaime, was murdered in her classroom at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida. No matter how much time goes by, she is on my mind every second of every minute of every day.
I had never spoken out about gun violence before my Jaime was murdered. I would never have guessed that gun violence could affect me and my family. But no one is safe from gun violence – and it hurts me to describe our country like that. So now, the work to end this violence – to spare other families this pain – has become my life's purpose and mission.
That's why I'm reaching out today. Just a week after my daughter was murdered, I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me. He refused to work with Parkland survivors to reduce gun violence. He refused to make it more difficult for people to access assault weapons like the one used to kill my Jaime, 13 other students and three educators. Marco Rubio failed Floridians.
I will do anything I can to make sure Marco Rubio is no longer able to fail our families and communities in the Senate – and there is no one better than Val Demings, a fierce advocate for gun safety, to replace him. Val Demings can win in Florida and expand our gun safety majority in the Senate – but the GOP is rolling out a full attack ad blitz to defeat her, so I promised I'd help raise $50,000 by midnight to make sure she can fight back.
**[Please, in honor of ending gun violence, will you donate $5 or more today to support Val Demings, defeat Marco Rubio and make real progress on gun safety?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42054363/331447556/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2466-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFmY2E2ZC0yMzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJbJNb-v-b12LdO5tg8ZwqUL2wss1nF806LNJxQ5OOk=)**
Throughout her service in Congress, Val Demings has made it clear that she is not afraid of the gun lobby. She voted to pass expanded background checks in the House, and I know we can count on her to continue fighting to end gun violence in the Senate.
Electing Val Demings in November would be a crucial step toward creating a gun safety majority that will enact the kind of real, meaningful change that is long overdue in our country – the kind of change that can save lives and prevent future tragedies. But Val Demings is facing an uphill climb to defeat Marco Rubio, which is why I'm personally asking for your help.
NRA-backing Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to back him, and this is only the beginning. If Val Demings is going to defeat him, it's going to take every bit of grassroots support from people like you and me. **[So please, can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio and build a gun safety majority in the Senate? Every dollar truly does make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42054365/331447558/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2466-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFmY2E2ZC0yMzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJbJNb-v-b12LdO5tg8ZwqUL2wss1nF806LNJxQ5OOk=)**
By supporting a gun safety advocate like Val Demings, you're helping me honor my Jaime's life and memory. On especially painful days like today, that means more than I could ever express.

Thank you,

Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse's Dad

subject: Herrell is trying to take credit for Democrats’ achievements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42058717/331454562/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220221presday_gv_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMyM2QzOC0yNzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8H-9I4Lq201paAD8Zcb1jq2vMv3DoUjmf6a7wDBkhz8=)

Team, It’s Presidents’ Day, so I thought I’d take a minute to reflect on the accomplishments of the Biden Administration so far, and how NM-02’s own far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell has stood in the way of progress. Under President Biden and Democratic majorities in the U.S. House and Senate, our country has seen historic economic recovery, with unemployment on track to be the lowest in 50 years! Democrats delivered **the American Rescue Plan** early on in 2021, providing desperately-needed resources to millions of workers, small businesses, schools, and families, in light of the ongoing COVID pandemic. They also managed to pass **the largest investment in infrastructure in decades** , including funding to fix our roads and bridges, expand broadband internet, improve rail travel and public transit, mitigate climate change, and create thousands of jobs here in New Mexico. **Despite opposing both of these historic and impactful bills, Herrell is now trying to take credit for them** , including writing an op-ed in support of broadband internet expansion — which she voted against. Sorry, Yvette, but the people of this district know better! There’s certainly more to be done to address the challenges faced by folks here in NM-02 and across the country, including fighting rising inflation, lowering prescription drug prices, raising the minimum wage, and passing President Biden’s Build Back Better plan (which Herrell also opposes), but it’s clear: _The only way we’re going to deliver more bold progress on the issues that matter is by holding our Democratic majorities and replacing do-nothing Republicans like Herrell at the ballot box this November._ [**I’m ready to create more positive change for the people of New Mexico in Congress: help me do so by pitching in your first $10****to our campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42058723/331454563/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220221presday_gv_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMyM2QzOC0yNzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8H-9I4Lq201paAD8Zcb1jq2vMv3DoUjmf6a7wDBkhz8=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, It’s Presidents’ Day, so I thought I’d take a minute to reflect on the accomplishments of the Biden Administration so far, and how NM-02’s own far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell has stood in the way of progress. Under President Biden and Democratic majorities in the U.S. House and Senate, our country has seen historic economic recovery, with unemployment on track to be the lowest in 50 years! Democrats delivered the American Rescue Plan early on in 2021, providing desperately-needed resources to millions of workers, small businesses, schools, and families, in light of the ongoing COVID pandemic. They also managed to pass the largest investment in infrastructure in decades , including funding to fix our roads and bridges, expand broadband internet, improve rail travel and public transit, mitigate climate change, and create thousands of jobs here in New Mexico. Despite opposing both of these historic and impactful bills, Herrell is now trying to take credit for them , including writing an op-ed in support of broadband internet expansion — which she voted against. Sorry, Yvette, but the people of this district know better! There’s certainly more to be done to address the challenges faced by folks here in NM-02 and across the country, including fighting rising inflation, lowering prescription drug prices, raising the minimum wage, and passing President Biden’s Build Back Better plan (which Herrell also opposes), but it’s clear: The only way we’re going to deliver more bold progress on the issues that matter is by holding our Democratic majorities and replacing do-nothing Republicans like Herrell at the ballot box this November. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Si se puede! — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: The race for Governor is a clear choice between Geoff Diehl and Maura Healey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Can Geoff count on YOU for your support?
| | | |
---
|
---
| Did you see the big news this week?
The Fiscal Alliance Foundation came out with a new poll of likely Mass voters. When Republicans were asked whom they would vote for in the Governor's race, their choice was clear:
REPUBLICAN VOTERS SUPPORT GEOFF DIEHL
(by a margin of more than 10-to-1 over his Republican rival).
The race for Governor is clearly now a two-person race between Geoff Diehl and Maura Healey.
And, when given that match-up, the choice is clear: we need to elect Geoff Diehl to be our next Governor.

---
| [Click here to show your support for Geoff Diehl!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oy-t4lYwKfA4_fRyNKVYL5KNZw_DwtwoNY4r_yhIgGi53f1feiguGDS6Hk-0VVtg5IO0wAt2cBoRrDDdWZlZ2iOuMrvJ6j402sgoP7t2jwGh3SE0HNDiKkzvmVJeIQNgj3Oj79dpV3Lpc98X_508TvNmHkFeVG41LGy2U7pLC_ldiKTu8hI3Vw==&c=SGF440XQbuM35MEg62-UbFM5ZFwfHcLZhNG9y5B21bvmNuGpVqwH5Q==&ch=r3WlGBEPzA4wUhmM3FMWEN-ZcqWa257ECn0SlcVwCm89S3caG4axnQ==)
---
---
The stakes are high.
Democrats have their liberal, progressive agenda on full display.
On a day when legislators should have been addressing problems at the Registry of Motor Vehicles, they voted instead to assign the RMV with a new job: giving driver's licenses to illegal immigrants.
Geoff's simple response: "I emphatically oppose our state giving driver's licenses to those who have entered and remain in America illegally. If I were Governor, I would immediately veto this bill."
Beacon Hill Democrats can't wait to have Maura Healey sign off on all of their liberal, progressive, tax-and-spend ideas. Instead, we need to elect a strong Republican leader who will SAY 'NO' to the Democrats and their radical policies. We need to elect Geoff Diehl as Governor.
But in order to win, Geoff needs your help!
Can Geoff count on you for your support?
Please show you support Geoff by making a donation today.

We need Geoff Diehl to be our next Governor!

name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: We won't stop until it's ta-ta to Toomey.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Toomey must go.

Republicans in Congress are using their usual dirty tactics to reject the president's Federal Reserve nominees — and possibly his Supreme Court pick. And the person at the helm of the most recent effort by the Senate Banking Committee is none other than our own Sen. Toomey.

This past week, he made moves to boycott and block the advancement of one of Biden's Federal Reserve nominees, which, because they're being confirmed as a group, leaves a total of six nominees in limbo.

Banking Committee Chairman Sherrod Brown (D-OH) said about Terrible Toomey: “If Toomey gets his way on this, it’s the way they will stop nominee after nominee after nominee... You can’t govern that way.”

And you know what? It's up to us in PA to decide who governs us. We need voters to head to the polls and support each other so that WE can replace him and others like him. We have to rid our government of underhanded politicians who do not play fair.

We are strengthening our movement to empower voters NOW ahead of the next elections. It's clear, Pennsylvania needs us now more than ever.

Please donate today to help fund our organizer trainings and Get Out The Vote efforts.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=022122 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=022122]

This is too important. We must act now.

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Do you know the truth about Presidents’ Day?
body:
Did you know that Presidents’ Day isn’t the holiday’s official or legal name? [The official, legal name is Washington’s Birthday!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) The day was originally created to celebrate the birth of our first president, George Washington. Additionally, it was held on his actual birthday of February 22 until 1971, when it was moved to a Monday when some other national holidays were also moved to various Mondays. These holidays were moved to Mondays for a not-so inspirational reason: To give federal employees more three-day weekends. Once the holiday was moved, people began to think of it as a day to celebrate Abraham Lincoln as well, because his birthday is on February 12. Eventually, this became commonly known as Presidents’ Day, and supposedly a day to celebrate either the office of the president/all presidents. However, the original intention – as evidenced by its actual name – was to celebrate the birth of one of our greatest Founding Fathers! Now, an online search of “Presidents’ Day” brings up more entries about sales and lists of which stores are open than it does about George Washington. This is the kind of information and history that our kids and grandkids need to learn. Make sure they know this, and I encourage you to carry on the tradition, that began in 1896, of reading [Washington’s Farewell Address](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) on February 22, his actual birthday. Finally, I would be remiss if I didn’t mention one of George Washington’s greatest and most profound deeds – his decision to step down after two terms. Washington feared that if he were to die while in office, Americans would view the presidency as a lifetime appointment. And so, he relinquished power voluntarily. That seems almost unimaginable today, as we watch elected officials cling to their power decade after decade after decade, dying in office more frequently than losing an election. This – _Washington’s Birthday_ – I invite you to celebrate this inspirational man with me, to teach his story to America’s youth, and to pray that today’s elected officials would be blessed by the same wisdom and virtue exhibited by our first president, George Washington. _It is impossible to govern the world without God._ _It is the duty of all nations to acknowledge the Providence of Almighty God, to obey his will, to be grateful for his benefits and humbly implore his protection and favor._ \- George Washington In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | |
---

clean_body: The Biden Administration has done nothing to stop rising crime and is instead defunding and abolishing our police departments. | | Dear Peter, The Biden Administration has done nothing to stop rising crime and is instead defunding and abolishing our police departments. Something doesn’t sound right with that plan. HELP ME DEFEND OUR POLICE | | | | In 2021, we saw the highest number of law enforcement officers intentionally killed in the line of duty since the terrorist attacks on September 11th, 2001. Peter, I have always been clear in my support for our brave men and women of law enforcement. However, they need our help more than ever now. By sending conservative fighters like me to Washington, we will draft and support legislation that protects and provides every resource possible to our police officers and emergency first-responders. | I hope that you will join me, Christian Collins | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY CHRISTIAN COLLINS FOR CONGRESS Christian Collins for Congress, P.O. Box 571, Conroe, Texas 77305

name: Jake Evans
subject: REMINDER: Join Us on February 24th for a Reception with Special Guest Ambassador Ric Grenell
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
I wanted to remind you of this Thursday's reception with former Director of National Intelligence Ric Grenell from 7-9 PM.
Ambassador Ric Grenell served as Acting Director of National Intelligence during the Trump Administration in addition to serving as the U.S. Ambassador to Germany from 2018-2020. Ambassador Grenell also served as the U.S. State Department's spokesperson to the United Nations. Please join us to support the fearless campaign to redeliver America to the people and to hear Ambassador Grenell's comments on the crisis in Ukraine and other topics.
Please RSVP to [finance@jakeevans.org](mailto:finance@jakeevans.org) to receive the address for the reception. We look forward to seeing you Thursday!

name: Amanda Edwards
subject: Honoring Mr. Brown & Thank You For Rebuilding Mr. Brown's Home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rmf1JTdWlhY-ekPMu_HjjyGvnfMU7dGo9A85vAeYjgJBr3rIxAYIuF4l4u9xiAxIP1e7gi2LQMttea6cbuUm0dyLvv2pFgXrReHxPWLFT8iZWwCgXB5Ve673_pc-xLGPYOwWpzmH0wWkRUsm1lBHmQ==&c=2WkIoMP6-SFERCNMn3IeNhIFpeZWIo-hqFr35gTR5EGGfY3aYkMdgA==&ch=5yc7wvecXQLsP_bM9eEW2K9MTipKDi_tWNuzfKp5hjHcsi938Jsryw==)
---
|
---
| Honoring Mr. Brown & Thank You For Rebuilding Mr. Brown's Home
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Friends,
On behalf of Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization (Be The Solution), we would like to thank all of the many volunteers who signed up to assist with the repairs and the rebuilding Mr. Brown's home.
Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in 85-year-old Mr. Brown was heartbreaking. I came to know of Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about Mr. Brown because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors.
In partnership with another non-profit partner (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me of the outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced in his home. Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization teamed up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he would be able to return to a safe, decent home.
I would like to commend SBP USA for the beautiful job they did to complete Mr. Brown's home despite many obstacles they faced, such as multiple home burglaries. Notwithstanding, they managed the rebuild Mr. Brown's home with professionalism and pride, which resulted in beautiful, safe home for Mr. Brown. Unfortunately, soon after the completion of Mr. Brown's home rebuild, Mr. Brown passed away. He was so grateful to those who helped rebuild his home. He was such a light in the community that united together to help him, and he will be missed by all.
We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Also, please see the photos below to see the before and after photos of Mr. Brown's home. I extend my gratitude to all of you for your support of this effort!
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rmf1JTdWlhY-ekPMu_HjjyGvnfMU7dGo9A85vAeYjgJBr3rIxAYIuFi5wzAvvFxP8qPzxbtJnEFDsV3OZE9lRii1hiMKdEHYzvS4d4moeUQt3agLbteYgknP5K5weeoQizv2NyYrKtEkxQQ8eGqYSFks329kxYZwjQjVVyNmC854gzh1qTGGjQ==&c=2WkIoMP6-SFERCNMn3IeNhIFpeZWIo-hqFr35gTR5EGGfY3aYkMdgA==&ch=5yc7wvecXQLsP_bM9eEW2K9MTipKDi_tWNuzfKp5hjHcsi938Jsryw==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | Honoring Mr. Brown & Thank You For Rebuilding Mr. Brown's Home | | | | | Friends, On behalf of Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization (Be The Solution), we would like to thank all of the many volunteers who signed up to assist with the repairs and the rebuilding Mr. Brown's home. Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in 85-year-old Mr. Brown was heartbreaking. I came to know of Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about Mr. Brown because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors. In partnership with another non-profit partner (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me of the outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced in his home. Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization teamed up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he would be able to return to a safe, decent home. I would like to commend SBP USA for the beautiful job they did to complete Mr. Brown's home despite many obstacles they faced, such as multiple home burglaries. Notwithstanding, they managed the rebuild Mr. Brown's home with professionalism and pride, which resulted in beautiful, safe home for Mr. Brown. Unfortunately, soon after the completion of Mr. Brown's home rebuild, Mr. Brown passed away. He was so grateful to those who helped rebuild his home. He was such a light in the community that united together to help him, and he will be missed by all. We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Also, please see the photos below to see the before and after photos of Mr. Brown's home. I extend my gratitude to all of you for your support of this effort! == == BEFORE AFTER For more information about Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization, please visit == If you would like to support the Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization mission, please make a contribution to our 501(c)(3) organization by clicking on the Be The Solution button below. | | == | | Sincerely, Amanda K Edwards | | | | | | | == == == == == | == Paid for by Amanda Edwards | | Amanda Edwards | PO Box 88228, Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent by mailto:akedwards00@yahoo.com

Friend – My team gave me some urgent news that I need to share with you.

Extreme GOP groups have already spent over $7.5 million attacking me, and polls are showing that this race will be tight. But folks, this news is going to invite even more dark money into New Hampshire as Mitch McConnell tries to unseat me and flip the Senate red.
This is a critical moment in the campaign. New Hampshire could very well determine control of the Senate, so we need to act now to turn this around.
