| | | This is Leader Kevin McCarthy. I’m humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.
* Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority.
* A record 30 Democrats have retired so far.
* This cycle, we have some of the best GOP candidates I’ve ever seen.

I want to introduce you to 8 of the best:

Esther Joy King (IL-17)
Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jo3x-1zcs5-4qqlpo2/)
---

* 5 seats to take back the house
* 30 Dem retirements
* 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition.

**The numbers are good.**

But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine.

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jo3x-1zcs6-4qqlpo3/)
---

As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in the 2022 midterms? I will personally match every dollar you give for the next hour:

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jo3x-1zcs7-4qqlpo4/)
---

Thank you,

Leader Kevin McCarthy

---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. **\- FROM TEAM DR. BOB -****Our volunteers ran into Jack Bergman** Over the weekend, at the UP200, volunteer petition canvassers were circulating through the crowd gathering signatures to help get Dr. Bob on the ballot. Our amazing volunteers approached two men standing alone in the cold to ask for their signatures. "Excuse me," they said. "Will you sign Dr. Bob Lorinser's nomination petition to get him on the primary ballot for US Congress?" The two men looked taken aback. "Should I tell them?" one man asked the other. "Yes, tell them." "I'm Jack Bergman," he said. "I would sign the petition but it might be used against me in the election." Our volunteers didn't recognize him. It could've been the fur hat. It could've been that he's not in the district all that often. In any case, the follow-up question was priceless. Bergman's answer was despicable. "Jack Bergman, while I have you here, may I ask you a question? . . . Do you really think the presidential election was stolen?" "Sorry, I'm not going to get into that. I'm not going to answer that." Yet again, it's the**[fourth occasion a constituent has told us Jack Bergman cannot answer the simple, direct question](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42064509/331475090/1411080937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzUwMDZiNS0zNDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU3VriGKx7RHg1O9lmz11EXYWsaM5GwoRuj9IdZdgGQ=&emci=31bae63c-2893-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=975006b5-3493-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427)** of whether or not President Joe Biden was duly elected the president of the United States. He refuses. Astonishing.

**\- FROM DR. BOB -****Who is Dr. Bob Lorinser's Favorite President?** Good morning, Not being a presidential scholar, knowing the strengths and weaknesses of each, I would rank Presidents Abraham Lincoln, George Washington, and Franklin Roosevelt as the top three. Why? All humans are flawed and products of their time, but considering their character, integrity, and competence, they lead America _**forward**_ with:
* A strong vision for the country's future, a sense of service, along with a positive active personality working to make life better for all
* Effective communication skills rooted in honesty, truth, and transparency.
* A bold, articulate leader with a great deal of charisma
* The fortitude to make unpopular decisions while respecting and trusting the American people
* Crisis management skills and ability to deliver results on issues of vital importance
* An ability to work with Congress and make wise appointments
* Moral principles – wisdom, kindness, justice, and courage

I want to close my Presidents Day greeting by sharing how important this next election will be for our state, and our Nation. As I have crisscrossed our district, I am reminded how cherished and vulnerable our right to vote is. Democracy is built on inclusion, equal treatment, and participation. Democracy is in danger. It is something we need to fight for and defend against the false narratives. Misguided leaders are trying to make it harder to cast a ballot, and it’s paramount that we defend the right to vote to ensure all eligible voters participate in not only presidential elections, but every election. We can’t be complacent – we can’t rest, and we can’t lose ground. As a country, we will need to work together to look forward – to lift our eyes up above the horizon and decide who we want to be as a Nation. Make no mistake, there are bad actors who are actively working to gain back control of the government and return us to division politics. We can’t let it happen. I am a champion of Democratic policies, and I am practical about how we can achieve them. I value what Democrats have accomplished – traditionally with dignified political temperance. I am not naïve about how difficult the Washington, DC climate is, but as Northern Michiganders and Yoopers, we deserve someone who will do their job with principle. The beauty of our democracy is we can openly disagree with each other, including the President of the United States. This is an essential system of our government's checks and balances. However, in order for the debates to be constructive, everyone across the political spectrum – especially elected representatives – must operate from the fundamentals of truth. I'm disappointed my opponent Jack Bergman can't do that. If you believe your Representative should be more transparent about their belief regarding who is President of the United States, **[I need your support getting to Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42064511/331475092/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzUwMDZiNS0zNDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU3VriGKx7RHg1O9lmz11EXYWsaM5GwoRuj9IdZdgGQ=)** [**Can you contribute today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42064512/331475093/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzUwMDZiNS0zNDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU3VriGKx7RHg1O9lmz11EXYWsaM5GwoRuj9IdZdgGQ=) to ensure the election of an honest and ethical Congressional candidate? You deserve a change. Happy Presidents Day, Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula.

Dr. Bob Lorinser is a democratic candidate for Michigan's 1st District Congressional seat, a district spanning across the Northern lower peninsula and the Upper Peninsula. He would be honored to represent all the residents of the District, including the young and old, people of all genders, those that agree and disagree with him, moderates, and progressives. He is an experienced diplomat, statesman, and physician from Northern Michigan running for Michigan's First Congressional District. With your support, Dr. Bob hopes to serve and represent the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan. Why is he running for Congress? In one word: Service. He has a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation.

Together, with your support, he can fulfill the needs of our communities' everyday citizens and working families. He's confident he can be an effective member of Congress for the 1st District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American.

He will run on a bedrock of principles — wisdom, justice, courage, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law.

You deserve a change. You deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth, and tries to embody all that is best in this great district. You deserve a Congressman with vision, who has the ability to recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who has the ability to build a consensus to achieve that vision.

The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. It's time to unite. It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities.

He strives to be Northern Michigan's voice of reason in Washington, D.C..

He's eager to continue his service. He's incredibly humbled to run and it would be his life's honor to represent you. Please share his message with your friends and family. Victory will not happen without your support and generosity. Vision: Dr. Bob is interested in independent, reasonable solutions that best fit the First District, regardless of which side of the aisle those solutions originate. He is hyperfocused on the reunification of our communities and country.
Regardless of which party voters affiliate, he strives to be the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan's 'voice of reason' in Washington, dedicated to advancing policies that reflect our common goals. Lorinser is confident his developing initiatives will be much more representative of the district's values and priorities than the current incumbent. Dr. Bob stands on certain principles that will guide his policy decisions and seeks to be a true representative of the people of the 1st District. clean_body: . here's a fascinating story for Presidents Day| | | Happy Presidents' Day We would personally love to hear who your favorite president is, and why? Reply and let us know. = Collage by artist created before President Biden's election. Before we get into Dr. Bob's Presidents' Day greeting, this is a reminder to check out the updating events at to see town halls and meet and greets in your area. We're booking more every day. We also have one last notice to purchase tickets for our Presidents' Day Pizza / Petition Party tonight in Marquette. = to help staff get an accurate headcount for food. = | | = | = | | = \- FROM TEAM DR. BOB -Our volunteers ran into Jack Bergman Over the weekend, at the UP200, volunteer petition canvassers were circulating through the crowd gathering signatures to help get Dr. Bob on the ballot. Our amazing volunteers approached two men standing alone in the cold to ask for their signatures. "Excuse me," they said. "Will you sign Dr. Bob Lorinser's nomination petition to get him on the primary ballot for US Congress?" The two men looked taken aback. "Should I tell them?" one man asked the other. "Yes, tell them." "I'm Jack Bergman," he said. "I would sign the petition but it might be used against me in the election." Our volunteers didn't recognize him. It could've been the fur hat. It could've been that he's not in the district all that often. In any case, the follow-up question was priceless. Bergman's answer was despicable. "Jack Bergman, while I have you here, may I ask you a question? . . . Do you really think the presidential election was stolen?" "Sorry, I'm not going to get into that. I'm not going to answer that." Yet again, it's the of whether or not President Joe Biden was duly elected the president of the United States. He refuses. Astonishing. = | | | \- FROM DR. BOB -Who is Dr. Bob Lorinser's Favorite President? Good morning, Not being a presidential scholar, knowing the strengths and weaknesses of each, I would rank Presidents Abraham Lincoln, George Washington, and Franklin Roosevelt as the top three. Why? All humans are flawed and products of their time, but considering their character, integrity, and competence, they lead America forward with: A strong vision for the country's future, a sense of service, along with a positive active personality working to make life better for all Effective communication skills rooted in honesty, truth, and transparency. A bold, articulate leader with a great deal of charisma The fortitude to make unpopular decisions while respecting and trusting the American people Crisis management skills and ability to deliver results on issues of vital importance An ability to work with Congress and make wise appointments Moral principles – wisdom, kindness, justice, and courage I want to close my Presidents Day greeting by sharing how important this next election will be for our state, and our Nation. As I have crisscrossed our district, I am reminded how cherished and vulnerable our right to vote is. Democracy is built on inclusion, equal treatment, and participation. Democracy is in danger. It is something we need to fight for and defend against the false narratives. Misguided leaders are trying to make it harder to cast a ballot, and it’s paramount that we defend the right to vote to ensure all eligible voters participate in not only presidential elections, but every election. We can’t be complacent – we can’t rest, and we can’t lose ground. As a country, we will need to work together to look forward – to lift our eyes up above the horizon and decide who we want to be as a Nation. Make no mistake, there are bad actors who are actively working to gain back control of the government and return us to division politics. We can’t let it happen. I am a champion of Democratic policies, and I am practical about how we can achieve them. I value what Democrats have accomplished – traditionally with dignified political temperance. I am not naïve about how difficult the Washington, DC climate is, but as Northern Michiganders and Yoopers, we deserve someone who will do their job with principle. The beauty of our democracy is we can openly disagree with each other, including the President of the United States. This is an essential system of our government's checks and balances. However, in order for the debates to be constructive, everyone across the political spectrum – especially elected representatives – must operate from the fundamentals of truth. I'm disappointed my opponent Jack Bergman can't do that. If you believe your Representative should be more transparent about their belief regarding who is President of the United States, = = to ensure the election of an honest and ethical Congressional candidate? You deserve a change. Happy Presidents Day, Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. = = | | = | = | | # # # END OF MESSAGE** Dr. Bob Lorinser is a democratic candidate for Michigan's 1st District Congressional seat, a district spanning across the Northern lower peninsula and the Upper Peninsula. He would be honored to represent all the residents of the District, including the young and old, people of all genders, those that agree and disagree with him, moderates, and progressives. He is an experienced diplomat, statesman, and physician from Northern Michigan running for Michigan's First Congressional District. With your support, Dr. Bob hopes to serve and represent the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan. Why is he running for Congress? In one word: Service. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. It's time to unite. It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. He strives to be Northern Michigan's voice of reason in Washington, D.C.. He's eager to continue his service. He's incredibly humbled to run and it would be his life's honor to represent you. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: One year later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Every single thing we have accomplished in this past year was only possible because of support from folks like you
#

Team,
It was one year ago this week that we launched our campaign for the United States Senate.
I’m beyond proud of the work we’ve done so far to ensure that working families in Pennsylvania finally get a seat of our own at the table.
Every single thing we have accomplished in this past year was only possible because of support from folks like you. And I am incredibly grateful for the role you have played in bringing us this far.
I have to be honest, though. We’ve got our work cut out for us over these next few months.
It’s going to take an unstoppable wave of momentum for us to be successful in the next phase of this race.
[Will you pitch in $3 to keep our campaign going strong? We need your support today to show the naysayers counting us out that this is a race we intend to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42064539/331475204/-358086307?refcode2=f1a90afb-3493-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220221-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWE5MGFmYi0zNDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tZKRmjZTfUFGXRguy1j8mJwzjPaxQ8VLM8VFkCJuxXk=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42064540/331475205/-358086307?refcode2=f1a90afb-3493-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220221-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWE5MGFmYi0zNDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tZKRmjZTfUFGXRguy1j8mJwzjPaxQ8VLM8VFkCJuxXk=)**
We entered this race with a simple message: In order for working people to finally have a government that works for us, we need to fundamentally change the Senate.
For too long, working people have had to put up with politicians making decisions that affect us when they haven’t spent one single day living in our shoes. It’s time for that to change.
So over the last 365 days, we’ve traveled all across the commonwealth talking to real people who want their voices heard. And I’m proud to say that our bold grassroots coalition includes folks from all 67 of Pennsylvania’s counties.
But we’ve still got a long way to go before we can cross the finish line, and we’re up against many of the traditional gatekeepers that say a gay Black man cannot win this race.
I need your support today to prove them wrong. So what do you say?
[Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to fuel our campaign through the next phase of our race? It’s important that we get as many people to show their support today as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42064541/331475206/-358086307?refcode2=f1a90afb-3493-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220221-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWE5MGFmYi0zNDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tZKRmjZTfUFGXRguy1j8mJwzjPaxQ8VLM8VFkCJuxXk=)
I have to be honest. This will be a tough fight. But I know that if enough of us stand together, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
Thank you,
Malcolm
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42064542/331475207/-358086307?refcode2=f1a90afb-3493-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220221-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWE5MGFmYi0zNDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tZKRmjZTfUFGXRguy1j8mJwzjPaxQ8VLM8VFkCJuxXk=)**

I’ve been able to count on your support in the past and now, I need to know if you’ll pull through for my campaign again. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for reading, Susie Lee | | = | | = Democrat Susie Lee is running for re-election in Nevada’s Third District, which Wall Street Journal has deemed our country’s most competitive House seat. While in Congress, she has led the charge to protect equal rights, fight for workers, and combat climate change. Now, Republicans have lined up four far-right candidates to run against Susie who have spent millions in this competitive race to unseat her. The GOP sees winning Susie’s district as key to re-taking control of the House. Susie can’t take on this fight alone – she needs your help to hold our House Majority. = | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Threatening our way of life
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Big government, big tech, and big pharma hurt us | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b002ad06b192/threatening-our-way-of-life?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

On Saturday, our team barnstormed the state to hear from grassroots activists and make the case that our campaign is best positioned to beat Tim Walz. From Wright County, to St. Louis county, and beyond, one thing was clear: Minnesotans are fed up with ever-encroaching government threatening our way of life. Everyday the governor and his bureaucrats in the DNR, Education Department, and throughout government, continue to impose heavy-handed policies which push us away from normal. Many of our kids are still being masked and indoctrinated in schools, our streets are not safe, and good Minnesotan jobs are being crushed by a hostile business environment!

Help us fight for normal again by [contributing $5, $15, $25, or more today](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b6c365a19a&e=33b11688c1). We won't get normal back if Tim Walz stays in the governor's mansion! We must do better. That was my message on Saturday and my message going forward - and it's absolutely resonating!
---
|
---
| It's time unify and shift our focus to beating Tim Walz. Our campaign is building the movement that can win! We have the groundswell support, we have the winning message, we are [polling neck and neck with Tim Walz](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=784844e6f5&e=33b11688c1), and we have dedicated volunteers who propel us forward every day. Now - we just need you to [chip in and help us build](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=f0f1c57607&e=33b11688c1) up the financial war chest to get us across the finish line in November.

**Here's what we need help with:**
* [Give $25](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=08e0391762&e=33b11688c1) to help us fund a statewide mail campaign
* [Give $50](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=bc49b10149&e=33b11688c1) to help us buy radio ads
* [Give $100](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b4e0a70f11&e=33b11688c1) to help us run targeted social media campaigns to new voters
* [Give $200](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=6301d4bbd0&e=33b11688c1) or more to help create a field team in every congressional district

Our great State has suffered under unilateral control, partisan bickering, and political brinksmanship by far-left parties and politicians. Given our history and resources I truly believe Minnesota can be a beacon rather than a laggard in recovery and healing. We need a new vision, a new prescription. **That is why I am running for Governor.** It’s time for a new direction in Minnesota. Thank you for your engagement and willingness to [help us](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=700361d9e9&e=33b11688c1)[ WIN](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=6e10b3a5c9&e=33b11688c1).

In Freedom,
Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

name: Team Never Again
subject: Honoring Black Activists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Never Again PAC is an organization focused on causing social change through grassroots mobilization. But we weren't the first ones to do this and we can't let the month of February go by without honoring the Black activists that laid the pathway for the social movements of today and of the future. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42065870/331481217/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkY2M0MjEwLTM5OTMtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-DqKdO1-M7C-YjsNr5dDsTysKP17SdzqJtu-Z57kwDs=&emci=c3999f77-fc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4dcc4210-3993-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Team,

Never Again PAC is an organization focused on causing social change through grassroots mobilization. **But we weren't the first ones to do this and we can't let the month of February go by without honoring the Black activists that laid the pathway for the social movements of today and of the future.**

From Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Marsha P. Johnson to the great John R. Lewis, our civil rights are the product of the blood, sweat, and tears of Black innovators and activists. **Sadly, in the 21st century, racial injustice still exists and is being actively perpetrated by the members of the Treason Caucus and with them, the Republican establishment.**

The NAACP was born out of the urgent need for a civil rights organization during the Jim Crow era, and to this day, it continues to be the home of grassroots activism for civil rights and social justice.

Today, in honor of Black History Month, our ask of you will be simple: **donate whatever you can to the NAACP to help them continue their mission to fight for the political, educational, social, and economic equality rights of all persons to be protected and to eliminate racial hatred and racial discrimination.** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42065871/331481218/-1890789315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkY2M0MjEwLTM5OTMtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-DqKdO1-M7C-YjsNr5dDsTysKP17SdzqJtu-Z57kwDs=&emci=c3999f77-fc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4dcc4210-3993-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001)
---

Remember, the Treason Caucus is actively working to suppress the voices accurately depicting the racism of the past and the present. **Civil rights organizations like the NAACP are vital to the political landscape of today to ensure that the clock of progress doesn't move backward or is erased entirely.**

[**So today, will you rush a donation to the NAACP to help them fight for a society where all individuals have equal rights and there is no racial hatred or discrimination?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42065872/331481219/-1890789315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkY2M0MjEwLTM5OTMtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-DqKdO1-M7C-YjsNr5dDsTysKP17SdzqJtu-Z57kwDs=&emci=c3999f77-fc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4dcc4210-3993-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001)

Thank you,

Team Never Again

PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
---
Never Again PAC
PO Box 2153
Purcellville, VA 20134
United States
---

name: JB Smiley
subject: Friend, You Deserve Clean Water
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42066319/331483026/1002998528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODY0ZDA1MS0zYjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caJfINXcrtjcfXbmnR5ovHuRbbB0SUDZRIGjEtxoYrQ=&emci=c5464b9e-3593-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a864d051-3b93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12740612) | Team, Our state motto of “Agriculture and Commerce” was made to represent how Tennessee is one of the most agriculturally and environmentally prosperous states in the country. But this beauty and prosperity is not known to every community within our state. **Communities of color are disproportionately impacted by environmental hazards such as increased levels of pollution and higher rates of toxic landfills. ** In Dixon, a report showed that a lone cluster of solid waste facilities were situated near predominantly black communities. Pollution from these facilities polluted the water of the Eno Road community for years until a lawsuit settlement made the city and county ensure this community had access to clean water. But this is not an isolated issue. **A 2020 report showed that more than half of waterways sampled in Tennessee were too polluted to support their basic functions. ** In the last 20 years, state lawmakers passed several bills to loosen regulations on our waterways. Instead of taking responsibility for their mistakes, the people who are responsible for these problems blamed you. State leaders at the Tennessee Department of Environment say the state's booming population is to blame. **Tennessee deserves better than leaders who shift blame and hinder access to basic necessities. ** I’m running for Governor because I believe that clean water and air are basic human rights, and I want to ensure that we’re fighting for the rights of every individual in our state. **Will you join me in my fight for Tennessee?**

clean_body: | | Team, Our state motto of “Agriculture and Commerce” was made to represent how Tennessee is one of the most agriculturally and environmentally prosperous states in the country. But this beauty and prosperity is not known to every community within our state. Communities of color are disproportionately impacted by environmental hazards such as increased levels of pollution and higher rates of toxic landfills. In Dixon, a report showed that a lone cluster of solid waste facilities were situated near predominantly black communities. Pollution from these facilities polluted the water of the Eno Road community for years until a lawsuit settlement made the city and county ensure this community had access to clean water. But this is not an isolated issue. A 2020 report showed that more than half of waterways sampled in Tennessee were too polluted to support their basic functions. In the last 20 years, state lawmakers passed several bills to loosen regulations on our waterways. Instead of taking responsibility for their mistakes, the people who are responsible for these problems blamed you. State leaders at the Tennessee Department of Environment say the state's booming population is to blame. Tennessee deserves better than leaders who shift blame and hinder access to basic necessities. I’m running for Governor because I believe that clean water and air are basic human rights, and I want to ensure that we’re fighting for the rights of every individual in our state. Will you join me in my fight for Tennessee? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I’m ready to fight for the people; I hope you are too. -JB Smiley Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. It's going to take all us of working together to defeat Bill Lee and elect JB Smiley. Jr., but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails or update your contact information . You can also at any time. = JB believes that when we lock arms, put our differences aside, rally around common beliefs, and carry a unified message to every corridor and community, from the rural roads less traveled to the urban centers, we can build a Tennessee to be proud of, together. = | Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley. name: MarkKelly.com
body:
$25.

What does that amount of money mean to you? Now let us ask:

If you knew contributing $25 would mean Mark Kelly would get re-elected to the Senate this year, wouldn’t it be worth it?

How about if you knew that same $25 would keep Mitch McConnell from becoming Majority Leader again?
Wouldn’t you give that $25 immediately?

What if you knew that $25 would re-elect a man fighting for voting rights, action on climate, lowering drug prices and more? Wouldn’t it be the best $25 you could spend?

Now, we know $25 doesn’t seem like it can do all that. But when everyone is chipping in, it can.

Cause by the time you reach this point in the email, someone has already chipped in their $25. And in order for this to work, they need you to do the same.

And that’s why we’re asking:

Can you please split a $25 contribution to help Mark Kelly defend this seat? It all adds up when everyone is chipping in. That’s how we win. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220221_CGVA_Kelly]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220221_CGVA_Kelly&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220221_CGVA_Kelly&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220221_CGVA_Kelly&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220221_CGVA_Kelly&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220221_CGVA_Kelly&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220221_CGVA_Kelly]
It is absolutely critical that Mark Kelly holds this seat. And the only way that happens is if we’re all in this together.
Team Kelly

**\- FROM TEAM DR. BOB -****Our volunteers ran into Jack Bergman** Over the weekend, at the UP200, volunteer petition canvassers were circulating through the crowd gathering signatures to help get Dr. Bob on the ballot. Our amazing volunteers approached two men standing alone in the cold to ask for their signatures. "Excuse me," they said. "Will you sign Dr. Bob Lorinser's nomination petition to get him on the primary ballot for US Congress?" The two men looked taken aback. "Should I tell them?" one man asked the other. "Yes, tell them." "I'm Jack Bergman," he said. "I would sign the petition but it might be used against me in the election." Our volunteers didn't recognize him. It could've been the fur hat. It could've been that he's not in the district all that often. In any case, the follow-up question was priceless. Bergman's answer was despicable. "Jack Bergman, while I have you here, may I ask you a question? . . . Do you really think the election was stolen?" "Sorry, I'm not going to get into that. I'm not going to answer that." Yet again, it's the**** fourth occasion a constituent has told us Jack Bergman cannot answer the simple, direct question of whether or not Joe Biden was duly elected. He refuses. Astonishing.
---
| |
---
**\- FROM DR. BOB -****Who is Dr. Bob Lorinser's Favorite National Leader?** Good morning, Not being a presidential scholar, knowing the strengths and weaknesses of each, I would rank Presidents Abraham Lincoln, George Washington, and Franklin Roosevelt as the top three. Why? All humans are flawed and products of their time, but considering their character, integrity, and competence, they lead America _**forward**_ with:
* A strong vision for the country's future, a sense of service, along with a positive active personality working to make life better for all
* Effective communication skills rooted in honesty, truth, and transparency.
* A bold, articulate leader with a great deal of charisma
* The fortitude to make unpopular decisions while respecting and trusting the American people
* Crisis management skills and ability to deliver results on issues of vital importance
* An ability to work with Congress and make wise appointments
* Moral principles – wisdom, kindness, justice, and courage

I want to close my Presidents Day greeting by sharing how important this next election will be for our state, and our Nation. As I have crisscrossed our district, I am reminded how cherished and vulnerable our right to vote is. Democracy is built on inclusion, equal treatment, and participation. Democracy is in danger. It is something we need to fight for and defend against the false narratives. Misguided leaders are trying to make it harder to cast a ballot, and it’s paramount that we defend the right to vote to ensure all eligible voters participate in not only presidential elections, but every election. We can’t be complacent – we can’t rest, and we can’t lose ground. As a country, we will need to work together to look forward – to lift our eyes up above the horizon and decide who we want to be as a Nation. Make no mistake, there are bad actors who are actively working to gain back control of the government and return us to division politics. We can’t let it happen. I am a champion of Democratic policies, and I am practical about how we can achieve them. I value what Democrats have accomplished – traditionally with dignified political temperance. I am not naïve about how difficult the Washington, DC climate is, but as Northern Michiganders and Yoopers, we deserve someone who will do their job with principle. The beauty of our democracy is we can openly disagree with each other, including the President of the United States. This is an essential system of our government's checks and balances. However, in order for the debates to be constructive, everyone across the political spectrum – especially elected representatives – must operate from the fundamentals of truth. I'm disappointed my opponent Jack Bergman can't do that. If you believe your Representative should be more transparent about their belief regarding who is President of the United States, I need your support getting to Washington. Can you contribute today to ensure the election of an honest and ethical Congressional candidate? You deserve a change. Have a great holiday, Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. \- Dr. Bob

| | Dr. Bob Lorinser is a democratic candidate for Michigan's 1st District Congressional seat, a district spanning across the Northern lower peninsula and the Upper Peninsula. He would be honored to represent all the residents of the District, including the young and old, people of all genders, those that agree and disagree with him, moderates, and progressives. He is an experienced diplomat, statesman, and physician from Northern Michigan running for Michigan's First Congressional District. With your support, Dr. Bob hopes to serve and represent the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan. Why is he running for Congress? In one word: Service. He has a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation.

Together, with your support, he can fulfill the needs of our communities' everyday citizens and working families. He's confident he can be an effective member of Congress for the 1st District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American.

He will run on a bedrock of principles — wisdom, justice, courage, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law.

You deserve a change. You deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth, and tries to embody all that is best in this great district. You deserve a Congressman with vision, who has the ability to recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who has the ability to build a consensus to achieve that vision.

The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. It's time to unite. It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities.

He strives to be Northern Michigan's voice of reason in Washington, D.C..

He's eager to continue his service. He's incredibly humbled to run and it would be his life's honor to represent you. Please share his message with your friends and family. Victory will not happen without your support and generosity. Vision: Dr. Bob is interested in independent, reasonable solutions that best fit the First District, regardless of which side of the aisle those solutions originate. He is hyperfocused on the reunification of our communities and country.
Regardless of which party voters affiliate, he strives to be the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan's 'voice of reason' in Washington, dedicated to advancing policies that reflect our common goals. Lorinser is confident his developing initiatives will be much more representative of the district's values and priorities than the current incumbent. Dr. Bob stands on certain principles that will guide his policy decisions and seeks to be a true representative of the people of the 1st District. We understand that you care about how the information you provide to us is used and shared. We have developed a Privacy Policy to inform you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of information we receive from users of our website.

Our Privacy Policy, along with our Term & Conditions, governs your use of this site. By using https://www.votedrbob.com/, or by accepting the Terms of Use (via opt-in, checkbox, pop-up, or clicking an email link confirming the same), you agree to be bound by our Terms & Conditions and our Privacy Policy.

If you have provided personal, billing, or other voluntarily provided information, you may access, review, and make changes to it via instructions found on the Website or by emailing us at info@votedrbob.com. To manage your receipt of marketing and non-transactional communications, you may unsubscribe by clicking the “unsubscribe” link located on the bottom of any marketing email. Emails related to the purchase or delivery of orders are provided automatically – Customers are not able to opt out of transactional emails. We will try to accommodate any requests related to the management of Personal Information in a timely manner. However, it is not always possible to completely remove or modify information in our databases (for example, if we have a legal obligation to keep it for certain timeframes, for example). I am not naïve about how difficult the Washington, DC climate is, but as Northern Michiganders and Yoopers, we deserve someone who will do their job with principle. The beauty of our democracy is we can openly disagree with each other, including the President of the United States. This is an essential system of our government's checks and balances. However, in order for the debates to be constructive, everyone across the political spectrum – especially elected representatives – must operate from the fundamentals of truth. I'm disappointed my opponent Jack Bergman can't do that. If you believe your Representative should be more transparent about their belief regarding who is President of the United States, I need your support getting to Washington. Can you contribute today to ensure the election of an honest and ethical Congressional candidate? You deserve a change. Have a great holiday, Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. \- Dr. Bob = | | Dr. Bob Lorinser is a democratic candidate for Michigan's 1st District Congressional seat, a district spanning across the Northern lower peninsula and the Upper Peninsula. He would be honored to represent all the residents of the District, including the young and old, people of all genders, those that agree and disagree with him, moderates, and progressives. He is an experienced diplomat, statesman, and physician from Northern Michigan running for Michigan's First Congressional District. With your support, Dr. Bob hopes to serve and represent the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan. Why is he running for Congress? In one word: Service. He has a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation. Together, with your support, he can fulfill the needs of our communities' everyday citizens and working families. He's confident he can be an effective member of Congress for the 1st District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. He will run on a bedrock of principles — wisdom, justice, courage, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law. You deserve a change. You deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth, and tries to embody all that is best in this great district. You deserve a Congressman with vision, who has the ability to recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who has the ability to build a consensus to achieve that vision. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. It's time to unite. It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. He strives to be Northern Michigan's voice of reason in Washington, D.C.. He's eager to continue his service. He's incredibly humbled to run and it would be his life's honor to represent you. Please share his message with your friends and family. Victory will not happen without your support and generosity. Vision: Dr. Bob is interested in independent, reasonable solutions that best fit the First District, regardless of which side of the aisle those solutions originate. He is hyperfocused on the reunification of our communities and country. Regardless of which party voters affiliate, he strives to be the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan's 'voice of reason' in Washington, dedicated to advancing policies that reflect our common goals. Lorinser is confident his developing initiatives will be much more representative of the district's values and priorities than the current incumbent. Dr. Bob stands on certain principles that will guide his policy decisions and seeks to be a true representative of the people of the 1st District. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: What Side Are You On?
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSQF6pXk_HuRk3nPKuAu5QheG1KoXiT0Ef0vdah3BsG3gT5BNv-utEa9-5pPdBSxaGtliZeowDMmv9QWNqLYmQsI09YxemyM9pWKHcGG3yqw0XFPrHlgqmdFp05IPMHZsLHahmqt8o0EWKRTTcpOFa82Q8neMwM8moZCpC3Srd--pyOOvTCb9vRv3ok-QJpFSkOLuWA3vdQ=&c=oCpD-kotjYyDiuoVSVldUIaM2odhhMmH3RjaD4_9JJBwigZ3IYCvRw==&ch=p94VMhodZ-p4SMj0g1d2agNb4AYRUWlyV4n9-karRou3MgPfMbF03w==)

| Peter,
This November, the election for Governor and the future of Florida presents a simple choice. CHOICE 1: Voters can choose to continue Florida's current trajectory as freedom's North Star - With businesses open, children in schools, Floridians thriving and continuing to be the envy of blue states across the country. CHOICE 2: The other choice is to allow Florida to follow the path of lockdown Democrats' trail of authoritarianism and destruction that has kneecapped communities across the country. Peter, which choice are you making? [TAKE THE SURVEY >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSQF6pXk_HuRk3nPKuAu5QheG1KoXiT0Ef0vdah3BsG3gT5BNv-utEa9-5pPdBSxaGtliZeowDMmv9QWNqLYmQsI09YxemyM9pWKHcGG3yqw0XFPrHlgqmdFp05IPMHZsLHahmqt8o0EWKRTTcpOFa82Q8neMwM8moZCpC3Srd--pyOOvTCb9vRv3ok-QJpFSkOLuWA3vdQ=&c=oCpD-kotjYyDiuoVSVldUIaM2odhhMmH3RjaD4_9JJBwigZ3IYCvRw==&ch=p94VMhodZ-p4SMj0g1d2agNb4AYRUWlyV4n9-karRou3MgPfMbF03w==) [TAKE THE SURVEY>>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSQF6pXk_HuRk3nPKuAu5QheG1KoXiT0Ef0vdah3BsG3gT5BNv-utEa9-5pPdBSxaGtliZeowDMmv9QWNqLYmQsI09YxemyM9pWKHcGG3yqw0XFPrHlgqmdFp05IPMHZsLHahmqt8o0EWKRTTcpOFa82Q8neMwM8moZCpC3Srd--pyOOvTCb9vRv3ok-QJpFSkOLuWA3vdQ=&c=oCpD-kotjYyDiuoVSVldUIaM2odhhMmH3RjaD4_9JJBwigZ3IYCvRw==&ch=p94VMhodZ-p4SMj0g1d2agNb4AYRUWlyV4n9-karRou3MgPfMbF03w==) The tyranny we have seen take hold for two years in states like California and New York will make its way into Florida if we don't fight back. We know the Democrats' playbook. Their only hope is bringing in money from out of state extremists to help them advance their authoritarian, pro-lockdown agenda. Our thriving state is just one election away from falling victim to a Democrat takeover. If Democrats win, our state will fall victim to lockdowns, mandates, and crime-ridden cities. We're in for the fight of our lives and we have no choice but to double down on our efforts to keep Florida free. The choice this November is clear: are you for freedom or are you for lockdowns and heavy-handed mandates? [Take the survey and let our team know if you're on the side of freedom or lockdowns!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSQF6pXk_HuRk3nPKuAu5QheG1KoXiT0Ef0vdah3BsG3gT5BNv-utEa9-5pPdBSxaGtliZeowDMmv9QWNqLYmQsI09YxemyM9pWKHcGG3yqw0XFPrHlgqmdFp05IPMHZsLHahmqt8o0EWKRTTcpOFa82Q8neMwM8moZCpC3Srd--pyOOvTCb9vRv3ok-QJpFSkOLuWA3vdQ=&c=oCpD-kotjYyDiuoVSVldUIaM2odhhMmH3RjaD4_9JJBwigZ3IYCvRw==&ch=p94VMhodZ-p4SMj0g1d2agNb4AYRUWlyV4n9-karRou3MgPfMbF03w==) It's up to us to hold the line and protect freedom in Florida, Peter. I'm counting on your continued support as we fight for the future of our great state. [Let me know what side you're on - Take the survey >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSQF6pXk_HuRk3nPKuAu5QheG1KoXiT0Ef0vdah3BsG3gT5BNv-utEa9-5pPdBSxaGtliZeowDMmv9QWNqLYmQsI09YxemyM9pWKHcGG3yqw0XFPrHlgqmdFp05IPMHZsLHahmqt8o0EWKRTTcpOFa82Q8neMwM8moZCpC3Srd--pyOOvTCb9vRv3ok-QJpFSkOLuWA3vdQ=&c=oCpD-kotjYyDiuoVSVldUIaM2odhhMmH3RjaD4_9JJBwigZ3IYCvRw==&ch=p94VMhodZ-p4SMj0g1d2agNb4AYRUWlyV4n9-karRou3MgPfMbF03w==) Sincerely, Ron DeSantis

name: Skip Vasquez, Field Director
subject: This election will be close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter,
This race will be close, and we need your help to get out the vote ASAP. Can you sign up to phone bank tonight? [https://www.mobilize.us/gregcasarforcongress/event/441217/]
Election Day is one week from tomorrow and early voting ends this Friday, February 25th. That means we have one week to reach as many voters in TX-35 as possible. Our campaign is doing everything we can to Get Out The Vote in this final stretch— but we need your help .
All this week we’re hosting virtual phone banks to encourage Texans to vote early. It couldn’t be easier—you can sign up to make calls from your own home and help us encourage Democrats to make a plan to vote. Can we count on you to volunteer? [https://www.mobilize.us/gregcasarforcongress/event/441217/]
>> SIGN UP TO GET OUT THE VOTE << [https://www.texasdemocrats.org/my-texas-votes-2/]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94297/images/unnamed%20%283%29.png]
This race could be very close, Peter. With four candidates in the race, we expect the race to get to 50% on Election Day to be difficult. So every single vote will make a difference. That’s why it’s critical that you vote early, tell your friends and family to do the same, and volunteer with us to Get Out the Vote!
If we want to create good jobs and raise wages for workers, deliver Medicare for All, protect reproductive rights, and stand up to corporate special interests, then we need to Get Out The Vote right now. Can we count on you to volunteer with us this week? [https://www.mobilize.us/gregcasarforcongress/event/441217/]
Thank you,
-Skip
Skip Vasquez, Field Director
P.S. Can’t make our phone banks this week? You can still help us Get Out The Vote by chipping in here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.21_email] !
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]
Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
Greg Casar for Congress
P.O. Box 301923
Austin, TX 78703
United States

name: Team Schrier
subject: The attacks on reproductive rights aren't slowing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
**Florida Lawmakers Latest To Approve 15-Week Abortion Ban—One Day After Arizona And West Virginia**

"The abortion restrictions are the same as the Mississippi bill the Supreme Court is now weighing—which the conservative-leaning court is expected to uphold." - _Forbes_
The attacks on reproductive rights keep coming, Peter.

Last week, Republicans in Arizona, Florida, and West Virginia's legislatures voted for restrictive 15-week abortion bills. These bills not only limit a person's access to safe and legal abortion, but they don't include any exceptions, and doctors could face jail time or lose their licenses for performing abortions after 15 weeks.

With the Supreme Court making a decision this year on a case that could decide the fate of _Roe v. Wade_ , Republicans in states across the country are passing restrictive abortion bans in the hopes that _Roe_ is overturned. Conservatives hold a 6-3 majority on the Court, so Republicans might get their way.

**[We can't let Republicans restrict access to reproductive care. Will you add your name to stand with Kim in the fight to defend _Roe v. Wade_?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42066955/331486639/-1687647772?ms=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vzagdlhsnd%2Fy7Celp9BKp%2B7CVB4f20djA0eQlc6ZMKI%2F50Lih4OU9Y9GM%2FmaSIBIqbKdgqNwvcdQqyEdxwSaDZKSqwm58w0q9aHhafkv9YD22BwD8Cyv4lvRdnxKJRhjMU9X9l7KB8kS7yaCynXSUqg85hq1x3mjZEOQvnygFpw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4OGUxNy00MDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_M5WKEYM-I6ErEv2j529QavqAPK6wgPXwPaSKi3xx70=&emci=d8ba6940-3193-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b888e17-4093-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42066957/331486641/-1687647772?ms=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vzagdlhsnd%2Fy7Celp9BKp%2B7CVB4f20djA0eQlc6ZMKI%2F50Lih4OU9Y9GM%2FmaSIBIqbKdgqNwvcdQqyEdxwSaDZKSqwm58w0q9aHhafkv9YD22BwD8Cyv4lvRdnxKJRhjMU9X9l7KB8kS7yaCynXSUqg85hq1x3mjZEOQvnygFpw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4OGUxNy00MDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_M5WKEYM-I6ErEv2j529QavqAPK6wgPXwPaSKi3xx70=&emci=d8ba6940-3193-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b888e17-4093-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter – reproductive rights are hanging by a thread. If the Supreme Court overturns _Roe v. Wade_ , access to safe and legal abortion would be banned or limited in at least 22 states overnights. We can't let that happen.

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim is fighting back against any attacks on our reproductive care. She helped pass the Women's Health Protection Act last year to block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care and she's endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund. But she needs to know you have her back in this important fight.

**[Add your name to join Kim in the fight to protect our reproductive health care rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42066959/331486643/-1687647772?ms=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220221_bans_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vzagdlhsnd%2Fy7Celp9BKp%2B7CVB4f20djA0eQlc6ZMKI%2F50Lih4OU9Y9GM%2FmaSIBIqbKdgqNwvcdQqyEdxwSaDZKSqwm58w0q9aHhafkv9YD22BwD8Cyv4lvRdnxKJRhjMU9X9l7KB8kS7yaCynXSUqg85hq1x3mjZEOQvnygFpw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4OGUxNy00MDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_M5WKEYM-I6ErEv2j529QavqAPK6wgPXwPaSKi3xx70=&emci=d8ba6940-3193-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b888e17-4093-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)**

Thanks,

clean_body: Florida Lawmakers Latest To Approve 15-Week Abortion Ban—One Day After Arizona And West Virginia "The abortion restrictions are the same as the Mississippi bill the Supreme Court is now weighing—which the conservative-leaning court is expected to uphold." - Forbes The attacks on reproductive rights keep coming, Peter. Last week, Republicans in Arizona, Florida, and West Virginia's legislatures voted for restrictive 15-week abortion bills. These bills not only limit a person's access to safe and legal abortion, but they don't include any exceptions, and doctors could face jail time or lose their licenses for performing abortions after 15 weeks. With the Supreme Court making a decision this year on a case that could decide the fate of Roe v. Wade , Republicans in states across the country are passing restrictive abortion bans in the hopes that Roe is overturned. Conservatives hold a 6-3 majority on the Court, so Republicans might get their way. | Peter – reproductive rights are hanging by a thread. If the Supreme Court overturns Roe v. Wade , access to safe and legal abortion would be banned or limited in at least 22 states overnights. We can't let that happen. As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim is fighting back against any attacks on our reproductive care. She helped pass the Women's Health Protection Act last year to block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care and she's endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund. But she needs to know you have her back in this important fight. Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

body:
Stay up to date on the latest from Russell Fry's campaign for Congress

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/russellfrysc/russellroundup-8849454?e=7aa6ac5965)
https://secure.winred.com/fry-for-congress/trump-endorse-1
It’s Monday, and that means another installment of Russell’s Roundup, your weekly source for the latest information on Russell Fry’s campaign to send a true conservative to Congress.

============================================================

** (https://www.facebook.com/photo/?fbid=379929073949692&set=a.295195809089686)

Solidly Pro-Life; Fighting for the Defenseless
We marked an important milestone last week in the struggle to protect the unborn. It was the first anniversary of the Fetal Heartbeat and Protection from Abortion Act being signed into law. I am proud to have played a lead role in fighting for its passage in the legislature and was grateful to receive this certificate from South Carolina Citizens for Life.

It was great attending their gala in Florence Thursday night, too! I promise that as your next Congressman I will keep fighting on behalf of our most vulnerable citizens—the unborn—on Capitol Hill.

More People Are Joining Team Fry; Come Join Us!
Our campaign is picking up steam, and we need you to be an important part of it. We’re putting together an array of groups of people who share special interests. Scroll the list below and click the one that’s right for you. Remember, things will only change in Washington when we change who we send there to represent us!

Pro-Life Leaders Coalition: ** Click here to join. (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfbtMqTNFWhVEJND4mEJk445D-o50hkx7AYuN8xE2YHTS9YCA/viewform?fbclid=IwAR0_oXdbD2zG48dp36hlwqQsI6kYjtSIX49uURQ5M4vBxfbAYoev0o7Ae_k)

Grand Strand Leaders Coalition: ** Click here to join. (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeN-1znGgbupoYJhWHCrEbfGB_bH_boAbpmj4od_qlUp5oNHA/viewform?fbclid=IwAR1KQXRJXBUf7bckLVPM0KraVFgJoTmVtWPnjDu1rdLG9Ja7TPuo-eIbrbk)

Spread the Word on Your Car or Truck
We know you’re ready to ditch our current Congressman—who voted to impeach President Donald Trump, and who still proudly stands by that vote—with a Congressman who will proudly stand alongside Trump and with all of us. We need your help to make sure our conservative message reaches people all around the Grand Strand and Pee Dee. Make a donation of $10 or more to Russell’s campaign, and we’ll send you a special Impeach Tom Rice bumper sticker. Think how great it will look on your car or truck. ** Click here to donate (https://secure.anedot.com/fry-for-congress/mm_fry_impeachtomriceanniversary_011222?fbclid=IwAR0b1VEKi0mBY7uBmm1lvJKl81QdyjqPkNmXgQHZifwSNGWvkhHv-Xk2r9o)

name: Chief Val Demings
subject: While Rubio's sleeping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'll put my record up against Rubio's any day
| | |
---
I need you to hear this from me, friend: Marco Rubio and national Republicans are preparing attack ads to defeat me that are deceitful, offensive and flat-out WRONG.
The truth is, Marco Rubio is a career politician who would rather support his megadonors' agenda than attempt to solve the problems Floridians are facing – like lack of affordable housing, expensive child care and the rising costs of gas and groceries.

Rubio and the GOP are desperate to distract voters from the fact that he has hardly EVER lifted a finger for the people of Florida. That's not me, with my decades-long record of public service. **Because, while Rubio was comfortably in his bed sleeping, I was solving problems in my community as a social worker, a police officer and as Orlando's chief of police.**
**Polling has me neck and neck with Rubio. We can win this – but GOP lies could put me seriously behind. [That's why I set an emergency goal to raise $25,000 before midnight to reach more voters and set the record straight. Will you donate $5 now to flip Florida blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42068110/331490189/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2395-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjdmZjZjNi00MDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTe-YHdqn0rfVtRYICAASieftGBNMPBfyVBzV0F179E=)**
Floridians deserve someone who cares more about people than politics. If I win this race, I'll show up for our communities, fight every day for working families and take on special interests like the gun lobby to prevent another parent from losing a child to senseless gun violence.
**I'll put my record up against Rubio's any day. But here's the problem: The GOP is spending millions to buy this seat because they know that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend and expand our Senate majority. **
**I know I can win this race if I have a fair chance to share my story, friend, but I need $25,000 before midnight to reach more voters.[Please, will you donate $5 right now to help me defend myself from GOP attacks, win over more Floridians and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42068111/331490190/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2395-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjdmZjZjNi00MDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTe-YHdqn0rfVtRYICAASieftGBNMPBfyVBzV0F179E=)**

clean_body: I'll put my record up against Rubio's any day | | | I need you to hear this from me, friend: Marco Rubio and national Republicans are preparing attack ads to defeat me that are deceitful, offensive and flat-out WRONG. The truth is, Marco Rubio is a career politician who would rather support his megadonors' agenda than attempt to solve the problems Floridians are facing – like lack of affordable housing, expensive child care and the rising costs of gas and groceries. Rubio and the GOP are desperate to distract voters from the fact that he has hardly EVER lifted a finger for the people of Florida. That's not me, with my decades-long record of public service. Because, while Rubio was comfortably in his bed sleeping, I was solving problems in my community as a social worker, a police officer and as Orlando's chief of police. Polling has me neck and neck with Rubio. We can win this – but GOP lies could put me seriously behind. = Floridians deserve someone who cares more about people than politics. If I win this race, I'll show up for our communities, fight every day for working families and take on special interests like the gun lobby to prevent another parent from losing a child to senseless gun violence. I'll put my record up against Rubio's any day. But here's the problem: The GOP is spending millions to buy this seat because they know that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend and expand our Senate majority. I know I can win this race if I have a fair chance to share my story, friend, but I need $25,000 before midnight to reach more voters.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for stepping up when I need it most. Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. = & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Planned Parenthood wants to silence me
body:
On April 21, I’ll be in court to defend myself as a pro-life whistleblower — and to fearlessly face down Planned Parenthood
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs7op6sv9gs7i6im9o7d893bnt65455k1i0jjn40_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4o36e5o60tjicljbasbm6hrj0stm62orbdpgcaq33cj5c5hm0pjm6eoe9ppkc1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9ddicup7ephkcspm9ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd9v9359da4pa6adgdehf09n5ae6veoem2oihh5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hmeo30cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend, This is a major milestone. **On April 21, I’ll be in court to defend myself as a pro-life whistleblower — and to fearlessly face down Planned Parenthood in their legal fight AGAINST me.** **[Can I count on you, a pro-life champion, to have my back? Your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more today will ensure I can defend our pro-life cause from Planned Parenthood’s legal team and continue Operation Rescue’s critical work.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn94mrin2p6n59tq8m3svlgdlmelf436o6pokhmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hmeo30cjh2bs)**
---
[**Join me in the fight**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z50cmspf6j0jlfvcocbde9a7rmkn18a873to8oc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hmeo30cjh2bs)
---
With your support, Operation Rescue is a FEARLESS defender of life ... and we TELL THE TRUTH about the cruelty and evils about abortion. Planned Parenthood brought a retaliatory lawsuit against me after my undercover journalism project with the Center for Medical Progress exposed their involvement in the illegal trafficking of aborted baby body parts. **Because of this, I’ve spent close to SEVEN YEARS in legal battles defending my right to be a whistleblower ... and now I’ll be in the courtroom again on April 21 for my APPEAL in this case.** I have refused to let any of these fights — even the biggest ones of my LIFE — stop me from advancing my life-saving work with Operation Rescue. [**Will you partner with Operation Rescue right now with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more to ensure we can continue our critical efforts in the fight for life?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za22qdl25qi9c4nkeq4ouo5l0fcoumql16jfp39g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hmeo30cjh2bs)
---
[**Join me in the fight**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf0o6ic7ml4ihajrae081gqp8npk26f3tbdamhb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hmeo30cjh2bs)
---
I’m proud of the work done by the Center for Medical Progress in exposing the unethical activity committed by Planned Parenthood. That work launched a national conversation about the immorality of trafficking in aborted baby remains — a conversation about the cruel, ugly reality of abortion that Pro-Abortion activists don’t want to discuss. But along with the lawsuits I’ve faced as a result of the undercover journalism project, I’ve also been targeted with death threats, had bank accounts investigated, lost my insurance coverage, and the list goes on. As my case advances to fight the court’s unjust ruling, it’s all the more imperative that I have allies who will be in my corner, cheering me on. I’m ready to take this case all the way to the Supreme Court — that’s how important it is for the future of pro-life work like mine! [**Friend, your continued partnership is the only reason that Operation Rescue can continue our life-saving work from the clinics to the courts. Please chip in $25, $50, $75, or more to help us stand up to Planned Parenthood in court.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpu6qor733rvq3hlquhe1u0qgheoh9icd7396g48_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hmeo30cjh2bs)
---
Thank you and God bless,
---
Troy Newman President
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkku2nsnku17a93fe4ddmg4j3mpta3crbhsf26po_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hmeo30cjh2bs)
---
| | P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278

---

name: Capt. Hung Cao
subject: Are you proud to be an American?
body:
I know what it’s like when Communism destroys your country. When I was four years old, my family narrowly escaped the Communi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc1cml11dpbgj0cmejv9ft88eke8eulal7k2khko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5pr0sbge9jm1o3561pjep9kc8pjasb0chi66t36e8qebdb0e1hr6s3nmdqnbc37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchlcoqm1ddjcup32phgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1clgm6or1chi649fg)
Fellow Patriot, I know what it’s like when Communism destroys your country. When I was four years old, my family narrowly escaped the Communist takeover of South Vietnam. Saigon fell just ten days later. I arrived in America as a refugee, a boy without a country. To me, America has always been the bright, shining beacon of freedom in the world. **I cannot express to you how proud and thankful I am to be an American.**

I dedicated my life to the defense of this country and the freedom we hold so dear.

I served the whole world over on missions as a Navy Special Operations Officer. I fought in combat operations in Iraq, Afghanistan and Somalia.

I saw the worst of humanity in our enemies; but I also saw the best our country had to offer in the character of my fellow Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen, Marines and Coast Guardsmen.

**Throughout my _entire time_ as an American and a Naval Officer, I _always_ thought we could rely on our Commander in Chief to lead us to victory - until I saw what happened in Afghanistan under Joe Biden. **

_**I****have five close friends who are being kicked out of the Navy for refusing the Covid-19 vaccine.** These are Special Projects saturation divers, SEAL Team 6 operators, and world class pilots who have given their entire lives in defense of this Republic._ _Now, because of a vaccine for a virus against which they already have natural immunity, they are discarded like yesterday's trash. Some will not receive their benefits after years of service to our country.**This is wrong and no way to thank our men and women for their service.**_

**I knew I had to take action, and that’s why I’m running for Congress in Virginia’s 10th district.**

I hope you’ll join me in our mission to uphold the **freedom of choice** in our great country.

**[Pitch in today to send a retired U.S. Naval Officer to Congress who will FIGHT for the American dream and make America FREE again.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7sm5frikadu41u6bokpghl1asb96r2lg13rvdn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm6ob4chh2bs) **
[**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zimt3s8ac455a5gh2temlmc2c230a79amr20pd2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm6ob4chh2bs) [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z92q3s1g0usta6ifdk0jm8isk04a790ss78qis18_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm6ob4chh2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdcrng2ppu4v6i7hhrgi7jdaj6daqdi49m8c9lm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm6ob4chh2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlc7gkng40284vhbe2ck46c2v83bunqp66cg4qro_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm6ob4chh2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhg9k3fag6226coea9hd2rs4tm69v1rhvqmbetc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm6ob4chh2bs) [**PITCH IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdt4gor2bpdotqnv5je45t1kp5ca4ta409ndicu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm6ob4chh2bs) Thank you, Capt. Hung Cao
Former Navy Special Forces
Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) [**JOIN THE TEAM**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4v17qer8fjm1d8qlup7h4l6m8mid16ol88loe0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm6ob4chh2bs) Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: Calling all Volunteers! WE NEED YOU TOMORROW!
body:
Join Amanda Makki for a Volunteer Meeting Tomorrow/Tuesday, February 22nd! | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a8be00b55f&e=c2296cffff)
---
| ** TEAM MAKKI NEEDS YOU!**
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=652e5bf65c&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [RSVP NOW!](mailto:TeamMakki@amandamakki.com?subject=YES%20Amanda!%20Count%20me%20in%20for%20the%20Volunteer%20Meeting! "RSVP NOW!")
---
| | | Hi Friend,

Team Makki is more motivated than ever and we need your help to keep up with the incredible momentum! We are so grateful for every volunteer who has come out and helped the campaign so far.

We have accomplished so much in these last few months:
* We won the Conservative Grounds in-person straw poll of 300 Republicans by a whopping 68%!
[https://floridapolitics.com/archives/480579-amanda-makki-wins-same-conservative-straw-poll-opponent-anna-paulina-luna-took-last-year/](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=cee47a6cfa&e=c2296cffff)
* We've had more events across Pinellas County than any other Republican in this race!
* We had a huge presence at the Tampa Bay March for Life, where Amanda was the keynote speaker and was interviewed by the local media about her pro-life stance. [https://www.fox13news.com/news/rowe-v-wade-anniversary-attracts-protesters-on-both-side-of-abortion-debate-to-downtown-st-petersburg](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ab1cd1a38d&e=c2296cffff)
* We had an amazing turnout at our 2022 kickoff with over 150 people in attendance and a dozen Pinellas Mayors supporting Amanda’s campaign! [https://youtube.com/shorts/gb1K7-Z1Xh0?feature=share](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=6f8104ab5d&e=c2296cffff)

**If you have been looking for a chance to get involved, to make a difference by fighting for our conservative values, and sending a REAL Conservative to Congress, then we want to personally invite you to attend our kickoff volunteer meeting! **

Come make new friends and join Amanda as we discuss how you can be an Ambassador for Makki and help plan future events!

We’ll see you there!

Team Makki
---
| [RSVP NOW!](mailto:TeamMakki@amandamakki.com?subject=YES%20Amanda!%20Count%20me%20in%20for%20the%20Volunteer%20Meeting! "RSVP NOW!")
---
|
---
|
---
| **You're Invited:
Join Amanda for a Town Hall to discuss Military and Veterans Issues! All are welcome**
---
| [Click here to send Amanda your questions for the Town Hall!](mailto:info@amandamakki.com?subject=My%20question%20for%20Amanda "Click here to send Amanda your questions for the Town Hall!")
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c0fe2f7c7a&e=c2296cffff)
