name: Team Greitens
subject: CAUGHT: Politico Editor Admits Hit Piece on Greitens Based on ‘Unfair’ Anonymous Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Politico Editor Admits Hit Piece on Greitens Based on 'Unfair' Anonymous Poll
---
| St. Louis, MO - Politico was caught last week for publishing a nameless, fake poll peddled by swampy establishment RINOs who are scared of Governor Eric Greitens and President Donald J. Trump America First movement.
[Read how Politico was caught doing the Swamp's dirty work, only to have it backfire on them](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016z_dgKdP2PwAaMeNe916RNbsEnkeDD1xYWcbfINPPVZaVjc5k5P08q8M-3ss67Lyzzv4D29CyedxnLJCBi9zYysX4fFEy23W3CFhI3_aYbmKJXom1SROGpnenOyoV3msx3NJnhvz1cOkdMpvHbKjlIHfGjh7tXFgxPzkU6iDcj9wHww0MpvsIhy8V7IEeqsqRgemcjsEk90uIWx3TnQiozV-8TreEBmE-u1lvy5EwyT-H1LAFRXx6wsS8La5jM2apJ5gFVnUfUDxGrcqVhns-aXnHDOTovaw&c=nAszH3EJmHHLi4scyQqalKWntXJ4kEeJNnoLh7wtshSkACppWPhlow==&ch=hsgRO2cNu7E_qRPoL8IQ9UQ-r2r2iNy1JVx910IZCmV-VuH9LeZBSA==):
Politico Editor Admits Hit Piece on Greitens Based on 'Unfair' Anonymous Poll Breitbart News
Politico ran a hit piece on U.S Senate candidate and former Missouri governor Eric Greitens based on an anonymous poll the site's top politics editor later admitted "felt unfair."
Politico reported on "a recent survey done for a private third-party" that showed Greitens up by four points against Democrat Lucas Kunce in the run for U.S. Senate. Although the pollster's information and other data remained anonymous, Politico attempted to use the poll as an example of a purported divide between Missouri Republicans, despite Greitens being the leading Republican in the Senate race.
Former Trump White House aide Steven Cheung, who's now working for Greitens, called out Politico for their faulty polling. "This is an unnamed poll with no information about who commissioned it," Cheung [tweeted](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016z_dgKdP2PwAaMeNe916RNbsEnkeDD1xYWcbfINPPVZaVjc5k5P08q8M-3ss67LynhvQjycsMkJjtAYcVGd3ab1y3-LQ5mQQ9eDQNb9FPWxoZAqYa8vkS8LRcdS7srkWIV7JoMsyAv0s5y8qAhWeQGL2UFOQOgKHBspfwYTDqGqJTyISZVIoZa6TD2MphqwkOeyTpMJYImQ=&c=nAszH3EJmHHLi4scyQqalKWntXJ4kEeJNnoLh7wtshSkACppWPhlow==&ch=hsgRO2cNu7E_qRPoL8IQ9UQ-r2r2iNy1JVx910IZCmV-VuH9LeZBSA==). "Where are the crosstabs? Where did it come from? What was the sample size? What are the overall numbers? What are the results for the other candidates?"
Aside from referencing the poll's margin of error, Politico provided no other information about this alleged survey.
Cheung said the report was an example of "swampy D.C. insiders" who have consistently pushed a "Never Trump" agenda. "Swampy DC insiders are so fucking scared and desperate they have resorted to running fake, no-name polls," he said. "These are the same Never Trump forces that fought against the movement from Day 1 and will continue to be remembered as losers."
While the source of the anonymous poll is unclear, Senate GOP leader Mitch McConnell does not want Greitens to win the GOP nomination for Senate in Missouri. That's because Greitens has made removing McConnell from the Senate GOP leadership a central plank of his U.S. Senate bid.
Perhaps most interesting is the fact that Politico's top politics editor, Charlie Mahtesian, actually admitted in an email to the Greitens campaign that the report was "unfair" and that publishing anonymous polling goes against the publication's standard practices.
"It's true that we typically won't write about an unnamed poll or one commissioned by a campaign," Mahtesian, the senior politics editor for Politico, said in the email to the Greitens campaign, which was subsequently obtained by Breitbart News. "But on occasion we will, depending on the circumstances - how much of it do we see, how well do we know the source and their motives, who was the pollster, how newsworthy are the findings." Mahtesian continued in the email to acknowledge that Politico's reporting on the poll "felt unfair."
"We felt the circumstances warranted writing - the polling spoke to a key argument in the primary," Mahtesian wrote. "But I can see why it might have felt unfair, or the application of a different standard."
Greitens campaign manager Dylan Johnson called out Politico's tactics and said they "prove that Governor Greitens is dominating this race, and the insiders can't stand it.
"The same fake news media who have lied about Governor Greitens for years are lying again. For all I know that poll was conducted among the activists in the Politico newsroom," Johnson said. "These tactics further prove that Governor Greitens is dominating this race and the insiders can't stand it."
---

Friend,

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Presidents Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers,

Presidents Day is far more than just a day off. It’s time to reflect on the triumphs, and tragedies, of previous and current Presidents.

The holiday celebrates all Presidents, but I want to place emphasis on a few: Presidents FDR and Johnson for their work to lift millions out of poverty, and to the first African American President Barack Obama for expanding healthcare access to so many.

We endured four heartbreaking years under twice impeached, defeated President Donald J. Trump, but then came the light at the end of the tunnel with President Joe Biden’s historic victory!

I want to personally thank all Wisconsinites for showing up in unprecedented numbers to help deliver the win for Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ticket. Now, let’s keep our record numbers up this year!

Together #WeRepresent,

Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

| Peter,
This November, the election for Governor and the future of Florida presents a simple choice. CHOICE 1: Voters can choose to continue Florida's current trajectory as freedom's North Star - With businesses open, children in schools, Floridians thriving and continuing to be the envy of blue states across the country. CHOICE 2: The other choice is to allow Florida to follow the path of lockdown Democrats' trail of authoritarianism and destruction that has kneecapped communities across the country. Peter, which choice are you making? [TAKE THE SURVEY >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RGQuoCpIDD5I1aPlSBQSsF8sXMoBwpwy7nrPa5HggkNW8fzlje9d85kSq_zJKy6sm4LjRVexdZhadudOMeEyEbPCi9GDllpOq-VeKGSrgTOrQtEjSYl3rtejXZ-dhG64r8bda3wUgusu-okASCSrMUtncwwyXfBlK4Yd-wDbUWaD9PVfwqdsooiWnd1a5J1PNNq9nXBStYI=&c=eX9569SShfzQztvSVUciFQ51XuKWN9QgGedU8VZbG1KBN8ygp1NfTw==&ch=Li3ZSTwe0HqpECD4FAh392O6DaoGHoN6alBLtNpLvWX7t2LuMyLSwA==) [TAKE THE SURVEY>>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RGQuoCpIDD5I1aPlSBQSsF8sXMoBwpwy7nrPa5HggkNW8fzlje9d85kSq_zJKy6sm4LjRVexdZhadudOMeEyEbPCi9GDllpOq-VeKGSrgTOrQtEjSYl3rtejXZ-dhG64r8bda3wUgusu-okASCSrMUtncwwyXfBlK4Yd-wDbUWaD9PVfwqdsooiWnd1a5J1PNNq9nXBStYI=&c=eX9569SShfzQztvSVUciFQ51XuKWN9QgGedU8VZbG1KBN8ygp1NfTw==&ch=Li3ZSTwe0HqpECD4FAh392O6DaoGHoN6alBLtNpLvWX7t2LuMyLSwA==) The tyranny we have seen take hold for two years in states like California and New York will make its way into Florida if we don't fight back. We know the Democrats' playbook. Their only hope is bringing in money from out of state extremists to help them advance their authoritarian, pro-lockdown agenda. Our thriving state is just one election away from falling victim to a Democrat takeover. If Democrats win, our state will fall victim to lockdowns, mandates, and crime-ridden cities. We're in for the fight of our lives and we have no choice but to double down on our efforts to keep Florida free. The choice this November is clear: are you for freedom or are you for lockdowns and heavy-handed mandates? name: Brett Guillory for Texas
subject: Oh, Canada!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas
body:
And Why Elections Matter
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sX_le_cJV-CCu7LTFjzVOer-I4SEt-mMPeYjq-YKwKASzQk0_Tte0_nS8JeKBai_UieIDdFxForrkPFOO-PxOxiY6SAHL5PvEW6mq3KLoejvqfabyj8O9dwDRSzRQDs0LGudUDY2YKs0JrIsLrin1czpM-aUPBd7OHYORKmtv24=&c=QDkP_BG4AxbBd7RjWWNt1aZlz7BPtaK7JYsqfbjlLzKOPhPcSb601A==&ch=ChHghDH3GMytBbVJuuuMwnI8ANOpMc6KTRj-cHSjFvxZJwtOyX0QZA==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,
Over the past month, all eyes have been on Canada. Thousands of citizens have taken a courageous stand for their own freedom and for the freedom of future generations. At great personal cost, these patriotic citizens of all colors and creeds have - lawfully - protested their government and its tyrannical mandates. They have truly been an inspiration to all of us who love liberty and strive to keep our own homeland free.
We've also seen how quickly a Western, democratic country can slip from being one of freedom, with its own constitution, to one of dictatorship and tyranny.
Justin Trudeau IS a tyrant.
He is a global elitist drunk on power and is wielding that power as a sledgehammer to crush his own people. Just in the past few days, we've watched as Canadians have had their financial accounts frozen and suspended, had their children removed from them, and then been assaulted and even trampled by Trudeau's thugs. It's been both horrifying and despicable.
So, why am I harping on Canada during the last week of early voting? Afterall, we live in Texas, USA.
Well, it's simple.
Elections Matter.
Who we elect and their willingness to address and call out tyranny and corruption determines how long we as Americans will continue to enjoy our own freedoms and individual rights.
To all who say, "Well, what's happening in Canada would never happen here," take note. It can always "happen here," and whether it does or not is determined by those whom we elect to office. To those who might think our Constitution will always protect us from becoming like Canada, consider the many ways in which our Constitution and our rights have been trampled since the 2020 election.
* Mike Lindell, prominent businessman and American citizen, has been de-banked for wrong groupthink. The silence from many of our leaders regarding this outrage is deafening.
* The January 6 prisoners have been jailed, some in solitary confinement, for over a year without formally being charged. They are political prisoners being denied their constitutional rights, yet so few are willing to speak out on their behalf because of "bad optics."
* Hundreds have had their 1st Amendment rights infringed through censorship and de-platforming.
* Children have and are still being forced to mask in schools.
* American citizens have had to take a vaccine they don't need or want or otherwise lose their jobs.
* In New York and Virginia, citizens were denied organ transplants because they were unvaccinated.
* On Friday, nineteen - Republican \- senators voted FOR continued funding of Biden's tyrannical vaccine mandates. Four other Republican senators didn't even think this issue was worth their time to show up to vote.

Think how different each of these situations would be if we had leaders who truly stood for freedom and for the people they represent. How different would things be if they had the courage to do what is right?
Yes, elections matter.
We need to elect the bold and courageous who aren't afraid to stand up and call out tyranny by its name. We need to elect those that have the courage of the truckers, who will stand toe-to-toe with tyranny itself and not back down. We need leaders who will find the time to show up to vote on major issues that have severe impact on our lives.
How many of your current leaders have you seen publicly and passionately denounce Trudeau and what he is doing to his citizens? (Our president definitely hasn't.) How many of the current candidates have used their platforms to also denounce Trudeau and then loudly proclaim that they stand with the Freedom Convoy and the patriotic, freedom loving citizens of Canada? Tweeting empty, feel-good platitudes of "thank goodness for our Founding Fathers and our Constitution" won't cut it. That only demonstrates either a complete disconnect from reality, ignorance of what we are facing in this country, or a willful decision to not "say too much" because of the blowback it might bring.
Friend, the line between freedom and tyranny is a fine one. We are always just one election away from remaining a free country to becoming that which we despise.
---
I began this campaign with a commitment to fight against all government overreach and protect our freedom, liberty, and our American way of life. Throughout the campaign, I have called out overreach and corruption as it has taken place, and have stood with doctors, parents, and children who have faced censorship, mandates, and more. My resolve to do continue to do so has never been more firm.
We do not live in nice times, but you have my promise to never be complacent and to always guard and protect your rights and liberties. I will always fight for you and will work to ensure that your children, grandchildren, and all future generations grow up in the free America that we have been blessed to know and love.
---
---
| |
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Please pay attention to this House race in Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just added Bill to their list of most vulnerable incumbent House members.
#
Peter,
This is serious: former Trump advisor Catalina Lauf is gaining ground in her bid to defeat Illinois Congressman Bill Foster.
During the last fundraising quarter, the Trump loyalists were lining up for Lauf.
**[We cannot allow Bill to be outraised, Peter. If we don’t close the gap quickly, we risk losing this seat – and with it, our Democratic House majority. Will you split a $5 contribution right now to Bill Foster’s campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42069006/331493982/1059282954?refcode=dd_em_220221_1_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExMDNjMS00NjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqE9tJGXWmhOsr4IsQu6CGsc0MYOXjoxelOhcQFoa2o=)**
The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just added Bill to their list of most vulnerable incumbent House members. He’s one of just two Illinois Democrats on the list right now.
Bill has been a strong champion for Illinois families during his time in office. He is also one of the few scientists in Congress and has been a leading advocate for listening to the experts during the COVID-19 pandemic. We need his voice in Congress for evidence-based policy in Washington.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: For a limited time
body:
I hope you’re having a good day today.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqh42pmm26ki3qnupabm28e4k7csiup69ubb1re0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm1oj2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpb8t1ksqpnas9imopnaojicirj9dr561oeepj6c5i31pth6uq3asb1etjj8p30cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libbcj7m9o6ct70mdgmfc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp9a64qi5c1e80j6intd36lqe0s59g6lflkp43jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm1oj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zloejbgr1h09vvdts965o6a0e18k0uvgd6rsklbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm1oj2c9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3quj768k5d6fgaqqrge1rp87ddnog18jutgldv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm1oj2c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z19jvl8gmcfrdoob4icjmt42s3ser2ephrfi0eko_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5hm1oj2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
I hope you're listening.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3snnngg985ulor831v67bphjo3acmdafrvkbbvg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4ojie1gn8cr7m9rmedj0eep76t9h6jinco336jie4pb4sgqe2d9je8onco716srt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9ddic1p70phkcipm6ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgmaob7c1g68or24no)
I hope you're listening.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztpqt8hrngd63s3j3gbpcpls9ofli0hogjrgn4j8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5jm0o34cdh2bs)
This is the most important email I've ever sent you.
President Trump just declared the election we're about to face may be the most important one in AMERICAN HISTORY.
**I hope you were listening. I certainly was.**
Trump talked about the Radical Left's dangerous effort to ruin our economy and country. He talked about the unprecedented surge of illegal immigration. [**Everything we worked so hard to build will be reduced to nothing if we don 't fight for it RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmt8o1idd44kr1gbjph3glu3nr1e9k3fjbtocnl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5jm0o34cdh2bs)
If that's not enough to convince you, I just heard some devastating news:
**My fellow Pro-Trump Conservatives were just DOWNGRADED in the latest Fox News polling. The battle for control of our country is now STATISTICALLY TIED!**
That's why I'm coming to you now with an urgent request.
If you believe in Trump's vision for the future of America, I'm asking YOU to step up now to help Pro-Trump Conservatives in every state.
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT:
RUSH SUPPORT TO PRO-TRUMP CONSERVATIVES](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrhlp6g5cn5o9s18upui4nkegpivhmdee0953h68_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5jm0o34cdh2bs)**
Our polling lead just evaporated before our very eyes.
Unfortunately, I don't see a path forward for us unless you step up right now. Without more support, we will lose. _It 's that simple._
The polls are too close to call and every last dollar makes a huge difference.
[**So for the last time: can you help?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd6osshr431m4tbgch7p0uqji5tivbhi1ln5b6ug_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5jm0o34cdh2bs)
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

President Trump just declared the election we're about to face may be the most important one in AMERICAN HISTORY. I hope you were listening. I certainly was. Trump talked about the Radical Left's dangerous effort to ruin our economy and country. He talked about the unprecedented surge of illegal immigration. If that's not enough to convince you, I just heard some devastating news: My fellow Pro-Trump Conservatives were just DOWNGRADED in the latest Fox News polling. The battle for control of our country is now STATISTICALLY TIED! That's why I'm coming to you now with an urgent request. If you believe in Trump's vision for the future of America, I'm asking YOU to step up now to help Pro-Trump Conservatives in every state. Our polling lead just evaporated before our very eyes. Unfortunately, I don't see a path forward for us unless you step up right now. Without more support, we will lose. It 's that simple. The polls are too close to call and every last dollar makes a huge difference. name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: My thoughts this Presidents Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42069850/331498155/-2081290588?refcode=jtk1163-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGQ5MjUyNy00OTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lZz1ugTODDjrytChVztNaOiEZrDpFxQct4NWpLmq-CU=&emci=d99664fc-f390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=18d92527-4993-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,
It's Presidents Day, a day in which we pause to celebrate our country's best leaders. From Abraham Lincoln to Barack Obama, I'm so proud of the great presidential administrations that have ushered in a brighter future for the American people.
I am especially proud of President Biden's leadership today. When he first took the oath to preserve, protect, and defend our country, he had a lot of work to do to get the U.S. back on track. A little over a year later, his leadership has helped our country recover from Trump's damaging legacy.
So far, President Biden has supported Americans throughout the pandemic, signed a once-in-a-generation infrastructure package, and committed to fighting climate change. Because of his leadership, I am so optimistic about the road ahead as we continue to work to deliver our Democratic agenda.
I'm thankful for President Biden today – and all those before him who fought for a better country.
Sincerely,
Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d99664fc-f390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/18d92527-4993-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGQ5MjUyNy00OTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lZz1ugTODDjrytChVztNaOiEZrDpFxQct4NWpLmq-CU=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

| Peter,
Have you read the latest?
Business Insider: Democrats are in mask messaging chaos as Republicans gleefully shame AOC and Stacey Abrams for going without face-coverings
Yep! Radical Democrats like Stacey Abrams spent months offering their full throated endorsement of mask and vaccine mandates...
And then were caught not following the rules they helped put into place.
How does the old adage go?
"Rules for thee and not for me!"
Well, thanks to our hardworking - and incredibly generous - grassroots team at Stop Stacey, we have taken the now infamous photo of maskless Stacey Abrams posing amongst a room full of masked students and sent it to a few hundred thousand of our closest conservative friends in Georgia to truly showcase Stacey's hypcrisy.
As expected, the feedback was incredibly positive...and folks are joining our fight to Stop Stacey and Save America!
At the end of this week, we are going to send out another round of text messages to targeted voters but need your help to fund it.
[Think you can chip in $15, $100, or even $300 before Friday at Noon?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S8hlxDG3RvkusiXpwJIPvpRf5MqykK9VrR5l1zNwRbp5tnuNMecDFnUbJGO2lxZd2QvLMjrr6Amoajq_inYXNOgrD-FPytznx4kbMrlIW-s2dRVcxfJHN7xBx9n9x3UxhQkLW2mllnrrBvoTEfrH3sii5QHLmujyiFR0wkhXzZMyZCkl3KcjUg==&c=hRQf7wcTSkrjWbqAPcwqAHm2rJx9bcmNMsWP8KVyUNH05d8VnCQ8Gw==&ch=7fINhDVUe6jsmpKOdpF8k0u0cncU37U8jdU97LadxJO-rrR45bqBIg==)

Brace yourselves for tax hikes, job-killing regulations, and government mandates that will undermine your freedom and way of life.
[So chip in whatever you can - $15, $100, or $300 - and consider it an investment into your future.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S8hlxDG3RvkusiXpwJIPvpRf5MqykK9VrR5l1zNwRbp5tnuNMecDFnUbJGO2lxZd2QvLMjrr6Amoajq_inYXNOgrD-FPytznx4kbMrlIW-s2dRVcxfJHN7xBx9n9x3UxhQkLW2mllnrrBvoTEfrH3sii5QHLmujyiFR0wkhXzZMyZCkl3KcjUg==&c=hRQf7wcTSkrjWbqAPcwqAHm2rJx9bcmNMsWP8KVyUNH05d8VnCQ8Gw==&ch=7fINhDVUe6jsmpKOdpF8k0u0cncU37U8jdU97LadxJO-rrR45bqBIg==) If we Stop Stacey NOW, we can ensure a better and more prosperous TOMORROW!

body:
Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?... |
Dear Peter,

Will you help me **FIRE Liz Cheney** and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to _"bring it."_

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39b1578beee242329a88f7f44659fc64&_e=YnvU_uUqKrJ7l0SuaUXvnIamE8Cvli0YHp7hatVbVnOzMb_mqmlQofekwqCADJ2usxVV1RGPPnquvkRxBT7rfWxJ24aujKss5DblYPQcYKT5CDYQDy2jwh3nsXnWqBKtlbmt0A2XT0UXzjXtnyoeNHBvQf40nn7FWpKLg34slANHNeDH5TjIum9c_Yw0UuhTVYnG74UpxRZroGsJMvEIeCmS4pnFbFiIHP2CtxSWcra6l7i5vEqCq9I334Gvc4vf_ubiCahakMVYSOjqO6-aVzMUUwoHFWpZMvsWtfN969B1fxZDdZGJRR5zgsDI7SC5FNIq5V_hn-MCSnhngn68LGgWA5SrNo35skCAPDuS5hrs6SJps8osrQ6X126LOHQ8LSInWIpSg6a-65lWEF-YGx2i82svin4rL3JLAM7Z3Xw%3D)

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise _millions_ for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a _60 Minutes_ interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney. My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America. | | Paid for by: HAGEMAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 4157 Cheyanne, WY 82003 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ingrid=20Centurion?=
subject: Volunteers Zoom Call Tomorrow and Centurion Townhall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT INGRID CENTURION
body:
We need your support on 3/1/22 | | |
---
|
---
| | Hi Friends,

I need your full support on 1 Mar at the Fleet Reserve, 99 Wisteria Rd, Goose Creek, SC. The set up team please arrive at 430PM, for banners, tables and rehearsal. Order of events, Prayer, Pledge of Allegiance, National Anthem, MC introduces Guest Speaker, then Ingrid, Questions. Everyone in the room must register and should have name tags. The table for donations, and selling Centurion gear must be manned. It will be a great event and time to get to know the constituents. Centurion team will be in full force. Our team is growing with dedicated Patriots who want to send a real Conservative woman warrior to Congress that represents America and family values. God Bless.

Go to the campaign **[Events](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=fc5d3135a7&e=bb02dd73bf)** page for details.
---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY (FULL FORCE) :
1\. Communicate with the Campaign. We need to know if you're showing up.
2\. Join us for the weekly campaign volunteers meeting: [https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85985792074?pwd=dlZBblZaRXRvRGczczRmYiswMkVMZz09](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=0cb544177c&e=bb02dd73bf)
3\. Host a House Party.
4\. Sign up for Campaign Training/Appreciation Meetings.
5. Sign up for Door Knocking and Phone banking.**

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion
---
| |
---
| Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_P.S. We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign. Please consider making a_[ _donation_](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=24a9b85fcf&e=bb02dd73bf) _[today](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=7ab1403ee7&e=bb02dd73bf)_ _._

We are one week away from the February fundraising deadline, and Kat needs your support.
We are steadily approaching the November elections, and the Radical Left is dead-set on holding onto power. Out-of-state liberal elites are dumping millions of dollars into Florida because they hate what we stand for - which is freedom and liberty.
Kat isn't going to let the Far-Left storm our state and destroy what makes Florida great. Dear Peter,

**Our God-given right to Self-Defense is under attack like never before.**

Radical Marxists Democrats want to take our guns. They say it every day.

And never before has the threat been so real!

_Because while the Democrats and RINOs are working to take away your guns, they are at the same time working to_ :

• Defund the police. • Empty jail cells of violent criminals. • Pass "no prosecution" statutes for crimes - even some violent crimes
**And George Soros-funded prosecutors around the country are simply refusing to enforce the law, letting drug dealers, rapists, and even murders go free to commit more violent crimes.**

It's no wonder crime is skyrocketing out of control and in many cities across America its no longer to walk the streets.

Make sure you are ready to defend yourself, your family, and your property. **[ENTER TODAY
FOR YOUR CHANCE TO WIN!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59684233:sKwqtfHmN:m:1:2365227053:EC4F7505F0681AA47D2974670740CCB6:r)** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59684233:sKwqtfHmN:m:1:2365227053:EC4F7505F0681AA47D2974670740CCB6:r)
We'll be choosing the winner at random on , and if you enter today you could end up with a brand-new Zastava M93 .50 Caliber Rifle.

**Though contributing is not required in order to enter or win, I also hope when you do enter you will** **[chip in $20.22 to my America First campaign for Congress as well](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59684233:sKwqtfHmN:m:1:2365227053:EC4F7505F0681AA47D2974670740CCB6:r).**

We must elect a congress of America First fighters, men and women who understand the Second Amendment, who know that our God-given rights are not to be taken away by radical leftists and weak-kneed RINOs.

I am such a fighter.

But I must have your support to get there!

**[So please, when you enter to win, consider a contribution to my campaign as well by chipping in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59684233:sKwqtfHmN:m:1:2365227053:EC4F7505F0681AA47D2974670740CCB6:r).**

The future of our great nation is too important to leave in the hands of RINOs and radical Democrats.

Sincerely,

Bo Hines

clean_body: Also from PhRMA and hardly any donations under $200. | | | Peter, A few weeks ago, Kyrsten Sinema’s fundraising filings for the last quarter of 2021 came out. And the filings are full of big names...from the Republican Party. Billionaire GOP donors including Ken Langone, Harlan Crow, and Nelson Peltz. ExxonMobil. The American Petroleum Institute. PhRMA. A private prisons company. Rupert Murdoch's Fox Corp. That's whose cash Sinema filled her coffers with — and that's who she works for. Only 2% of her money came from donors who gave $200 or less. It's no wonder she's so unresponsive to her constituents. And it's no wonder she's done everything in her power to obstruct President Biden's agenda. She works for the same powerful interests that the Republican Party does: billionaires and big corporations. Sinema raised nearly $1.6 million in just three months — from GOP donors, corporations, and hardly any donations under $200. If you want to know who Kyrsten Sinema is listening to, all you have to do is follow the money. If we’re going to oust Sinema and compete with her GOP mega donors, we need to keep growing our grassroots power. She may have over $5 million on hand, but we’ve got the momentum: thousands of small-dollar donors are dedicated to defeating Sinema. Let's do this, Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . name: Dave Chase
subject: I’m sorry, but wtf?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2398%2E3611125%2E3mjWu4 ][IMG]

Look, I’m going to level with you: we’re struggling to keep up
with GOP spending in our battleground race.

First, we were competing against $40 million, which was already an absurd
amount of dough.

Then just a week later, that number jumped to $56 million.

Now... it's being reported that the GOP is spending $81 million to keep Tim
from flipping this seat.

How the heck are we supposed to compete with that? This puts us at a HUGE
disadvantage.

Team, every time I come up with a new plan of attack, the GOP
drops another YACHTload of cash into this race that majorly sets us back.
Unless our grassroots team really steps up in the next few weeks, I’m
worried we won’t be able to compete.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8080?t=1014&amount=28&akid=2398%2E3611125%2E3mjWu4 ]I know that we can always depend on folks like you, and I’m hoping you
can come through by rushing a $28 donation—can you help out? What we don’t
have in dark money, we more than make up for in loyal supporters committed
to the cause.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8080?t=1015&amount=28&akid=2398%2E3611125%2E3mjWu4 ]Donate $28 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8080?t=1016&amount=50&akid=2398%2E3611125%2E3mjWu4 ]Donate $50

In a fair fight, Tim has what it takes to defeat whichever right-wing
candidate the Republicans anoint as Trump’s preferred talking head. But if
these millionaire Republicans keep outspending us at every turn, we won’t
even get that far.

Nothing would make Mitch McConnell happier than to see this campaign
stumble—he’s beaming at the thought of retaking the Senate, believe me.

Tim needs your help to make sure that doesn’t happen, because winning in
Ohio is the only way to defend and expand our Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8080?t=1021&amount=28&akid=2398%2E3611125%2E3mjWu4 ]Can you rush a donation right now to counter GOP spending and give Tim

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Help me fight RINO corruption
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
They're trying to keep me off the ballot | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066181?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=0453840f48&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Dear Patriot:

Tomorrow, I’m driving down to our State Capitol in Little Rock in order to file to get on the ballot.

The Republican Party of Arkansas doesn’t want me on the ballot—since the very first day of my campaign, the corrupt RINOs who control the GOP have done everything they can to silence me.

The Arkansas GOP is an incumbent protection racket, designed to prevent grassroots America First candidates like myself from challenging crooked corporate stooges like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack.

This fall,**the Carroll County GOP threw me offstage** at its Lincoln Day Dinner when I called out my opponent—to his face—for certifying the stolen 2020 election and voting with Nancy Pelosi for her Sham January 6th Witch Hunt.

Then, **the Republican Party of Arkansas disavowed me** as a “racist, sexist, bigot,” blacklisting me as a “non-recommended candidate.”

**Look at how easily they turn into cancel culture leftists -- calling me named like "bigoted" and "sexist," just like the Communist Democrats! **

_They’re treating me the _same _way that they treated President Trump._

**Of course, the reason they talk like Democrats is because they _are _Democrats.**

The very next day, **the GOP got me banned from my online payment processor** , Anedot.

In December, **the America Last Republican National Committee banned me from WinRed, their own fundraising platform**.

_Tomorrow, I have to pay the Arkansas GOP—the same thugs who are trying to drag my name through the mud—a**$15,000** “filing fee” just to get on the ballot._

Keep in mind that this is one of the _highest_ —if not _the _highest—filing fees in the entire country, while Arkansas remains one of the _poorest_ States in the country.

**The _only _purpose for such a high barrier of entry is to protect their Establishment cronies from candidates like myself—candidates who actually represent the American people.**

I have my paperwork in order, and I have my $15,000 check in hand, ready to go, even though it kills me to have to give these devils such a large sum.

Legally, they can’t keep me off of the ballot.

__But I know they’re going to try to__.

I’m personally invested in this struggle, in our fight for America’s future. **I put $30,000 of my own money into this campaign.**

**[_Help my campaign offset the cost of the GOP's $15,000 ransom fee by pitching in today._

_Defy the RINO Establishment by chipping in today. Each contribution sends them the message that they can't protect their cronies from Patriot primary challengers for a second longer--that we are coming __for_ _ them_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=dc21d5d318&e=eda539b26b)**

Remember: They’re not just trying to silence and smear me; they’re trying to silence and smear YOU.

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=9863e8fa2e&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=69b2f5241c&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: BREAKING: Biden wants a $770 billion defense budget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Reuters reports that President Biden will ask Congress for a defense
budget exceeding $770 billion for the next fiscal year, citing the need to
“modernize the military.” Sources suggest that the figure could actually
exceed $800 billion, $50 billion more than Trump’s last defense budget.

“Modernize the military” will mean padding the pockets of defense
contractors like Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, and their
shareholders. Defense companies gave big to Congressional Democrats and
Biden in 2020 and now these corporations are counting on corporate
Democrats to champion their interests.

We won’t take a cent from defense companies and are working to elect
candidates who will fight for the people — not the military-industrial
complex. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95820?refcode=em20220221-22038&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=22038%2E1203867%2EigXqzY ]Support our work today with a $3 contribution.
Going up against massive defense companies won’t be easy, but Justice
Democrats are always ready for a fight.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95820?refcode=em20220221-22038&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22038%2E1203867%2EigXqzY ]Contribute $3

When asked during his campaign if he would support Medicare For All, Joe
Biden said no. He said “you got to look at the cost”. But when it comes to
increasing an already inflated military budget, there is no limit.

We’ve seen it before. The same politicians who dismiss Medicare for All,
and other social programs as “too expensive” champion a bloated defense
budget, including kickbacks to defense, aerospace, and technology
companies.

Congress needs to spend less on war and more funding our progressive
priorities to meet the nation’s needs at home. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95820?refcode=em20220221-22038&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22038%2E1203867%2EigXqzY ]Will you contribute
$3 to stand with the Squad, and the other JDs in Congress,
in opposition of this outrageous military spending?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95820?refcode=em20220221-22038&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=22038%2E1203867%2EigXqzY ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=22038%2E1203867%2EigXqzY ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=22038%2E1203867%2EigXqzY ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220221-22038-footer&t=1026&refcode2=22038_1203867_igXqzY&akid=22038%2E1203867%2EigXqzY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=22038%2E1203867%2EigXqzY

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: not the email we had hoped to share
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
These goals are NOT arbitrary. Reaching them is what we need to re-elect Mark.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to rush an urgent donation to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. PLEASE give us a chance to explain why this request — especially this morning — is so important.
Here’s the truth:
We are behind on our fundraising goals for February. Not out-of-reach behind, but behind enough that hitting them will be a stretch.
For context, we needed about 100,000 individual donations to hit our numbers. As of this morning, we are only halfway there with just seven days to go.
These goals are NOT arbitrary. Reaching them is what we need to win this election. They’re what we need to reach voters and defend Mark from the attacks being thrown at him by McConnell-backed super PACs and corporate special interest groups.
So, as you can see, the timing is not great. At all. And we need a BIG day today to catch up. What do you say?
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign TODAY? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because it all adds up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220221-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2156_6688874_uB3VXj&akid=2156%2E6688874%2EuB3VXj)

| | Peter,

We all knew that Biden was going to undo all of the work President Trump did while in office to our economy but **we never knew it was going to be this bad.**

**Inflation is at near all time highs, gas prices are approaching $4 and $5 a gallon.**

And we're on the verge of _war with a nuclear super-power, Russia. _

There's only one way to stop Biden, **we must take control of Congress and the Senate.**

Frank Pallone has been an enabler for Biden's disastrous policies and**I'm going to make sure that comes to an end.**

**We need to raise a heck of a lot of money to beat Pallone** because he has special interests and national party support that will pump in millions to save him.

They know t**his race is winnable** and with your support we can do it...

[A contribution of $5, $25, $50, or even $100 can go a long way in supporting our movement to](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=b6f47ef7fc&e=146fae137d)[ send Pallone into retirement >>](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=fed12e262a&e=146fae137d)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, We all knew that Biden was going to undo all of the work President Trump did while in office to our economy but we never knew it was going to be this bad. Inflation is at near all time highs, gas prices are approaching $4 and $5 a gallon. And we're on the verge of war with a nuclear super-power, Russia. There's only one way to stop Biden, we must take control of Congress and the Senate. Frank Pallone has been an enabler for Biden's disastrous policies andI'm going to make sure that comes to an end. We need to raise a heck of a lot of money to beat Pallone because he has special interests and national party support that will pump in millions to save him. They know this race is winnable and with your support we can do it... | Hey, Peter – it’s Max the Dog here. As I’m sure you’re fur-miliar, building a movement for real progressive change is a team effort. My dad John has been working so hard to grow our campaign and share his vision for a more just Maryland, and I’ve been trying my dog-gone hardest to keep up. **That’s why today, I’m so excited to introduce you to the newest (and furriest) members of Team King: Barkley and Loki Siri!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42071194/331507389/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220221-b1_fr_full-MAX_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220221-b1_fr_full-MAX_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220221&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=MAX_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b7274f10-5493-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzI3NGYxMC01NDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fz7LfVOuABiHPPIm3Bl6zjR9eHdpbF4HdXyWvoaZKDQ=) When John told me that Michelle was joining the ticket as his running mate, I barked for joy with excitement. So when I found out her dogs would be joining our pack too, I nearly howled at the moon because I was so thrilled. I’m wagging my tail just thinking about all the canvassing walks and parades that we’ll enjoy together! But first, we need to get down to business. I’ve overheard John saying it’s been a slow month for fundraising so my new friends and I want to be sure we make up the gap and don’t fall behind. John and Michelle’s February fundraising deadline is one week from today and after confur-ing with my new teammates Barkley and Loki, we set a goal to raise $28,000 by next Monday. _**[Can my new friends and I count on you to show your support for John and Michelle today by contributing towards their end-of-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42071195/331507390/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220221-b1_fr_full-MAX_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220221-b1_fr_full-MAX_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220221&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=MAX_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b7274f10-5493-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzI3NGYxMC01NDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fz7LfVOuABiHPPIm3Bl6zjR9eHdpbF4HdXyWvoaZKDQ=)**_

clean_body: I’m taking a break from chasing squirrels in the backyard to give you the biggest PUPdate ever: we have two NEW furry friends joining the team! | = | Hey, Peter – it’s Max the Dog here. As I’m sure you’re fur-miliar, building a movement for real progressive change is a team effort. My dad John has been working so hard to grow our campaign and share his vision for a more just Maryland, and I’ve been trying my dog-gone hardest to keep up. That’s why today, I’m so excited to introduce you to the newest (and furriest) members of Team King: Barkley and Loki Siri! = When John told me that Michelle was joining the ticket as his running mate, I barked for joy with excitement. So when I found out her dogs would be joining our pack too, I nearly howled at the moon because I was so thrilled. I’m wagging my tail just thinking about all the canvassing walks and parades that we’ll enjoy together! But first, we need to get down to business. I’ve overheard John saying it’s been a slow month for fundraising so my new friends and I want to be sure we make up the gap and don’t fall behind. John and Michelle’s February fundraising deadline is one week from today and after confur-ing with my new teammates Barkley and Loki, we set a goal to raise $28,000 by next Monday. = | = I’m so excited that our pack is growing and that more supporters – human and pets alike– are joining us to bring real change to Maryland. But enacting change takes resources, and unfortunately, old tennis balls just won’t cut it. That’s why my new friends and I are asking you: = Barkley, Loki, and I have some important squirrel chasing to get back to, but we’ll see you next time! Max the Dog = * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our _. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220221?refcode=lpfe220221_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220221?refcode=lpfe220221_m]
We are only 8 days out from Primary Day!
Our campaign sets fundraising targets so we can do what we need to as a campaign to win on Election Day. That’s how we can hold this seat in Congress and accomplish our legislative goals — like protecting voting rights and reproductive rights.
Our team is setting a goal to raise $10,000 by Primary Day. Reaching that goal will set us up for success in this final push to the election. Please consider making a contribution if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220221?refcode=lpfe220221_m]
Together, we’ve been able to reach our campaign goals, and I know with your continued support, we can do it again now during this important moment for our campaign.
Thank you for being a part of our team,
Team Lizzie

| | Every campaign is backed by hard-working individuals toiling behind the scenes towards victory. Brent's campaign is no different, and we have been extremely fortunate to have formed a team that works so well together. I am Jason DiPane, Brent's Campaign Manager, and I would like to take a moment and introduce you to a few members of the staff that are hard at work behind the scenes.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/c0NyPBUSK/c?w=W0pTSgvz3sxdUSi7y1gM22tH8mh6Znf89RhrXooQeSw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXRlYW1fZW1haWwmYW1vdW50PTEwMCIsInIiOiIyZDZiZWJiNC0xMjExLTQ2YTMtZThjOC02MTIzNWM4ZDA4MDEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| |
---
| Mike DalesandroChief Political StrategistWhile Mike is well known to many politicos of WA-03, he is the newest addition to our team. Mike brings over 17 years of campaign and local government experience. He served two terms on Battle Ground City Council and two years as Mayor. He’s consulted on numerous successful campaigns at the city and county level, focusing on overall strategy and communications.
---
| |
---
| Soumyo Lahiri-GuptaChief Political Director/Deputy Campaign ManagerRaised in New Mexico, Soumyo (shoh-moe) is a recent law school graduate who has spent more than half of his life working on political campaigns.
He has worked on races at every level: local, state, and federal. With a passion for politics and a drive to help others, he
---
| | brings a wealth of campaign experience to Brent’s push to flip Washington’s 3rd Congressional District. Throughout his career, Soumyo has gained the skills necessary to broker political connections, energize fundraising, recruit volunteers, and engage voters.
---
| |
---
| Jason P DiPaneCampaign ManagerI am a family man & US Army Veteran. I bring to the team the leadership skills I learned during my service time as well as skills I have collected throughout my life by rarely staying still. My resume includes restaurant management, graphic design, photography, retail service, and charity work.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/c0NyPBUSK/c?w=KX2_hAilMm0_cTngU3yvz5yJHZ22fIvmBe1OxXgnupo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXRlYW1fZW1haWwmYW1vdW50PTEwMCIsInIiOiJiOTlkZjk5My02ZTQzLTQzMTctNWFiZi1jNjc4MWFjYjM4ZTEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| | This is by no means a complete list. There are many people we count on for support and guidance. It is a testament to Brent's character and ideals that he has attracted many people so dedicated to saving our Democracy that they do whatever they can to help, rarely accepting credit beyond a "thank you". None of this would be possible without the people of WA-03 and around the nation who have contributed financially. This is a local race with a national impact. We need people in office like Brent - people who care more about getting the work done than getting the credit for doing it. Lately, it seems our government has become more "theater" than it has been "for and by the people". In my opinion, this needs to change. I stand with Brent and work on his behalf because he is an upstanding and honest man who isn't afraid to seek advice or to admit that he has more to learn. I believe he is part of a new generation of legislators who will work with each other for ALL of the people.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/c0NyPBUSK/c?w=qWs0MuBJRYBaRGolotTd8ccBveN9v9YeROC07EaI6gY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXRlYW1fZW1haWwmYW1vdW50PTEwMCIsInIiOiI4YTEzODQwNS1kYTM5LTRjMmItNzE2Ni1kMTk0ZjNlNDRiY2MiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| | Our campaign's current focus is voter outreach and engagement. We recently gained access to the "golden standard" of voter outreach, Votebuilder. We are putting the final touches on print media for handouts. Yard signs and vehicle stickers are freely available to anyone who asks for them. None of this is free, and we need your continued support to continue the momentum that currently has us polling in FIRST PLACE! TOGETHER WE WILL [#FLIPWA03](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/c0NyPBUSK/c?w=MBioaOmfLi5bArRVeWejyCyAyB2xw3XiBC9ngNXQwRc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9zZWFyY2g_cT0lMjNmbGlwd2EwMyZzcmM9dHlwZWRfcXVlcnkiLCJyIjoiMDJmOWYwOTYtNzExMy00OTdiLTg3NTYtN2UwNTM0MDY0N2FiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)!

| I want to represent WA-03 to:
* Defend your rights as [working people](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/c0NyPBUSK/c?w=C2AWMy5QqQO_xv3N478M6ySQUXe-O1e3foVmDUJ_Rxg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzk4Tmt1NWM4Zj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiZzdGF0dXM9RHJhZnQmY2lkPTAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMCMvbWFpbiIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) and families.
* Aim for the [healthcare we all deserve](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/c0NyPBUSK/c?w=Ja3C4UPFD3zLpYIYco56KF_465JmsHAoTkrrCvzeQk4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vaGVhbHRoY2FyZSIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), written into law.
* Protect a [woman's bodily autonomy](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/c0NyPBUSK/c?w=SQIgJj0NhORQUkoPKcAPxA1poc7bNo-bclAmBdKibGc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDMiLCJyIjoiM2ZmNDY0NzAtMWFlZi00ZmVkLTI2YTktMzU0NDRiZTdkOTAyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) with protected reproductive care, written into law.
* Securing our [education system with the teaching](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/c0NyPBUSK/c?w=yJXaUT4M9xX8oxcbcBB96XqWT0peajMvgq4ZHKCkGCk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vZWR1Y2F0aW9uIiwiciI6IjNmZjQ2NDcwLTFhZWYtNGZlZC0yNmE5LTM1NDQ0YmU3ZDkwMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9) of facts, good or bad.

clean_body: Every campaign is backed by hard-working individuals toiling behind the scenes towards victory. Brent's campaign is no different, and we hav | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Exciting Team Announcements! | | | | Every campaign is backed by hard-working individuals toiling behind the scenes towards victory. Brent's campaign is no different, and we have been extremely fortunate to have formed a team that works so well together. I am Jason DiPane, Brent's Campaign Manager, and I would like to take a moment and introduce you to a few members of the staff that are hard at work behind the scenes. | | | | | | Mike DalesandroChief Political StrategistWhile Mike is well known to many politicos of WA-03, he is the newest addition to our team. Mike brings over 17 years of campaign and local government experience. He served two terms on Battle Ground City Council and two years as Mayor. He’s consulted on numerous successful campaigns at the city and county level, focusing on overall strategy and communications. | | | Soumyo Lahiri-GuptaChief Political Director/Deputy Campaign ManagerRaised in New Mexico, Soumyo (shoh-moe) is a recent law school graduate who has spent more than half of his life working on political campaigns. He has worked on races at every level: local, state, and federal. With a passion for politics and a drive to help others, he | | brings a wealth of campaign experience to Brent’s push to flip Washington’s 3rd Congressional District. Throughout his career, Soumyo has gained the skills necessary to broker political connections, energize fundraising, recruit volunteers, and engage voters. | | | Jason P DiPaneCampaign ManagerI am a family man & US Army Veteran. I bring to the team the leadership skills I learned during my service time as well as skills I have collected throughout my life by rarely staying still. My resume includes restaurant management, graphic design, photography, retail service, and charity work. | | | | | This is by no means a complete list. There are many people we count on for support and guidance. It is a testament to Brent's character and ideals that he has attracted many people so dedicated to saving our Democracy that they do whatever they can to help, rarely accepting credit beyond a "thank you". None of this would be possible without the people of WA-03 and around the nation who have contributed financially. This is a local race with a national impact. We need people in office like Brent - people who care more about getting the work done than getting the credit for doing it. Lately, it seems our government has become more "theater" than it has been "for and by the people". In my opinion, this needs to change. I stand with Brent and work on his behalf because he is an upstanding and honest man who isn't afraid to seek advice or to admit that he has more to learn. I believe he is part of a new generation of legislators who will work with each other for ALL of the people. | | | | | Our campaign's current focus is voter outreach and engagement. We recently gained access to the "golden standard" of voter outreach, Votebuilder. We are putting the final touches on print media for handouts. Yard signs and vehicle stickers are freely available to anyone who asks for them. None of this is free, and we need your continued support to continue the momentum that currently has us polling in FIRST PLACE! TOGETHER WE WILL ! | | | | | I want to represent WA-03 to: Defend your rights as and families. Aim for the , written into law. Protect a with protected reproductive care, written into law. Securing our of facts, good or bad. | | If a friend forwarded you this email, don't miss the next! | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

body:

President Trump just declared the election we’re about to face may be the most important one in AMERICAN HISTORY.
**I hope you were listening. I certainly was.**
Trump talked about the Radical Left’s dangerous effort to ruin our economy and country. He talked about the unprecedented surge of illegal immigration. [**Everything we worked so hard to build will be reduced to nothing if we don’t fight for it RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jpxv-1zevp-4qqlpo4/)
If that’s not enough to convince you, I just heard some devastating news:
**My fellow Pro-Trump Conservatives were just DOWNGRADED in the latest Fox News polling. The battle for control of our country is now STATISTICALLY TIED!**
That’s why I’m coming to you now with an urgent request.
If you believe in Trump’s vision for the future of America, I'm asking YOU to step up now to help Pro-Trump Conservatives in every state.
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT:
RUSH SUPPORT TO PRO-TRUMP CONSERVATIVES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jpxv-1zevq-4qqlpo5/)**
Our polling lead just evaporated before our very eyes.
Unfortunately, I don’t see a path forward for us unless you step up right now. Without more support, we will lose. _It’s that simple._
The polls are too close to call and every last dollar makes a huge difference.
[**So for the last time: can you help?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jpxv-1zevr-4qqlpo6/)
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

name: Letitia James
subject: Upholding John Lewis’ legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42071427/331508289/265476937?code=jtk318-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUzMGZiYi01NTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yl62AlWOxEg58rvziGrN9J3XjqvN61V0ypW5uMc-ACs=)
---
Peter, I wanted to take a moment to honor the Civil Rights hero John Lewis. Today would have been his 82nd birthday.

**Congressman John Lewis spent his entire life fighting to defend the most powerful nonviolent weapon that we have: the right to vote.** He led the legendary march for civil rights in Selma, took the stage during the March on Washington, and spent decades in Congress fighting for our most fundamental rights.

**But despite all his hard work, the sacred right to vote is once again under attack. I’m dedicated to honoring John Lewis’ legacy and defending equal access to the ballot box for all, but I can’t do this alone. So I must ask:[In honor of the late John Lewis, will you add your name to our petition and stand with me to defend voting rights for every American?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42071428/331508290/-1855486036?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk318-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUzMGZiYi01NTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yl62AlWOxEg58rvziGrN9J3XjqvN61V0ypW5uMc-ACs=&emci=6591f1fe-e490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=50e30fbb-5593-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42071429/331508291/-1855486036?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk318-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUzMGZiYi01NTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yl62AlWOxEg58rvziGrN9J3XjqvN61V0ypW5uMc-ACs=&emci=6591f1fe-e490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=50e30fbb-5593-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
---
**Peter, little by little, Republicans are working to undo the progress that Civil Rights heroes like John Lewis have spent their lives achieving.** In 2021 alone, the GOP introduced over 440 voter suppression bills that would disproportionately burden communities of color. Even the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, appropriately named after the man who fought tirelessly to protect this right, remains tangled up in the Senate months after it cleared the House.

**I refuse to give up on protecting our most sacred right, but I can’t win this fight without your support, Peter. I need at least 2,000 signatures before midnight tonight, so please: [Will you sign my petition to fight for voting rights for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42071430/331508292/-1855486036?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk318-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUzMGZiYi01NTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yl62AlWOxEg58rvziGrN9J3XjqvN61V0ypW5uMc-ACs=&emci=6591f1fe-e490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=50e30fbb-5593-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42071431/331508293/-1855486036?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk318-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUzMGZiYi01NTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yl62AlWOxEg58rvziGrN9J3XjqvN61V0ypW5uMc-ACs=&emci=6591f1fe-e490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=50e30fbb-5593-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)

subject: Hillsdale Co. Sheriff Endorses Brown for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
“I am proud to endorse a great man and leader for the office of Governor.”– Sheriff Scott B. Hodshire, Hillsdale County | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
## Hillsdale Co. Sheriff Endorses Michael Brown for Governor

Peter – I'm honored to announce that I've received the endorsement of Hillsdale County Sheriff Scott Hodshire today.

Sheriff Hodshire has been an effective leader in the fight against the opioid crisis and is a strong advocate for school resource officers. As we rebuild public safety in the state, his experience will be valuable.
---
|
---
| _“Captain Mike is a breath of fresh air. Mike is pro law enforcement with a lot of experience in the field. I know Mike will not order mandates that are against your Constitutional rights. I feel like Mike is the only candidate that will fulfill his campaign promise once elected as our Governor. I am proud to endorse a great man and leader for the office of Governor.”_ **– Sheriff Scott B. Hodshire, Hillsdale County**

Sheriff Hodshire joins a growing list of endorsements including State Representative Beth Griffin, St. Joseph County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite, Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli, Berrien County Commissioner Mac Elliott, and rocker Ted Nugent.
---
|
---

name: Carole King
subject: re: this year’s elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Hi, do you have a minute?
| | | Hi -- I'm writing to you _personally_ to ask you to complete the DSCC General Election Focus Group today. Please, let me quickly explain what that means and why I'm reaching out to you.

The future of the Supreme Court -- in fact, I'd go so far as to say the future of our democracy -- depends on not just holding but EXPANDING our Democratic majority in the Senate this year. I, for one, am going to do everything I can to help our great Democratic Senate candidates pull this out, and **I'd like _you_ to join me.**

When the odds are stacked against us -- because of the polls, because of history, because of Mitch McConnell and his megadonors -- we are all left wondering what _we_ can do to help. And yes, donating to expand our majority so we can stop McConnell from pilfering **_another_** Supreme Court seat is a great way to take action (**[by the way, you can do that by clicking this link](https://go.dscc.org/go/6738?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3073%2E9716520%2EXDw0CH)**).

But engaging with Democratic Party leaders is another _great_ way to get involved. The DSCC General Election Focus Group offers an opportunity for informed and engaged grassroots Democrats to share their feedback with top party leaders, and the DSCC Senior Leadership Team specifically wants to hear from YOU.

The DSCC will be sharing the results of this focus group survey with me tomorrow at 10:00 A.M. -- **and _I'd love for your responses to be included._**

**It'll be quick and easy. Will you join the DSCC General Election Focus Group _right now_? Here's a personalized link so we'll know that you responded:
[www.dscc.org/Carole-Focus-Group/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/6738?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3073%2E9716520%2EXDw0CH)**

Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have already caused so much damage to our country and our democracy. And unless we stop them from retaking the majority, they're going to go right back to blocking our attempts to rebuild the wreckage they left us.

But you have the power to stop them right now! You and the other Democrats who’ve been invited to join this focus group will provide critical input to Democratic leaders, and you were chosen _specifically_ for this purpose.

**We can do this if we work together! Please join the DSCC General Election Focus Group using your personalized link immediately:
[www.dscc.org/Carole-Focus-Group/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/6738?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3073%2E9716520%2EXDw0CH)**

Thank you so much, and I hope to see your responses soon!

\- Carole | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/6737?amount=5&t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3073%2E9716520%2EXDw0CH)Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority. And yes, Carole really did write this email.
| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/6737?amount=5&t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220221-CaroleKing-SurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3073%2E9716520%2EXDw0CH)

| |

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=3&refcode2=3073_9716520_XDw0CH&akid=3073%2E9716520%2EXDw0CH)**.

name: Bud Pierce for Governor
subject: Save Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bud Pierce for Oregon
body:
This is cancer doctor Bud Pierce, and in case you haven’t heard, I’m re-entering the race to become Oregon’s Governor in 2022.
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rqDk71s_waS891U4i5jbb3KBlzwT970nEqXIjndC1X5o5EK7zkkNRvsmZBmy5GKGCJB4AlKNqWmdsBrxY4Jadt1jNz9xhDLPJhEZXC_hQlYV0jxIv1xjwD-B_LdzSwDsLNDVeylGB24uBv89VGGc-papLyAeHKnT27sb_NIOqc1XjKDGRgZTHHeVYvXsGHQCPBnmOlMs6Te_3Khcqv8Ylg==&c=A9OC1MYFFBW9Qp-PJ6WhkT8MfnhV6Ti3bDtipFt0wso64HiJNcmnqg==&ch=pKHyurjUdlIHpC1Ft0VxcHsk0iiP_hHU85qozvwdplkSjy41blpFmw==)
---
| Peter,
This is cancer doctor Bud Pierce, and in case you haven't heard, I'm re-entering the race to become Oregon's Governor in 2022.
On December 1st, the day after I announced my candidacy, tragedy struck. The greatest sadness and devastation of my life occurred when my loving wife, Selma, was struck by a car and killed instantly while out walking, and I had to turn to my God for strength and comfort.
What I learned from the grieving process is that human life is filled with loss, and the greater the love of that which is lost, the greater the pain.
But loss and government are intertwined; it is the government's job to create and enforce laws that protect and prevent us from loss, while also preserving self-determination, liberty, and freedom.
And our leaders here in the great State of Oregon, unfortunately, haven't been holding up their end of the bargain.
It's never been clearer that we need a change of pace and a steady, healing hand to save our state.
I hope my candidacy brings about the pathway back for Oregon. Help me end the days of rampant destruction, homelessness, and financial loss. [Support my campaign, and help me save Oregon!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rqDk71s_waS891U4i5jbb3KBlzwT970nEqXIjndC1X5o5EK7zkkNRvsmZBmy5GKGCJB4AlKNqWmdsBrxY4Jadt1jNz9xhDLPJhEZXC_hQlYV0jxIv1xjwD-B_LdzSwDsLNDVeylGB24uBv89VGGc-papLyAeHKnT27sb_NIOqc1XjKDGRgZTHHeVYvXsGHQCPBnmOlMs6Te_3Khcqv8Ylg==&c=A9OC1MYFFBW9Qp-PJ6WhkT8MfnhV6Ti3bDtipFt0wso64HiJNcmnqg==&ch=pKHyurjUdlIHpC1Ft0VxcHsk0iiP_hHU85qozvwdplkSjy41blpFmw==)
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TO MY CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rqDk71s_waS891U4i5jbb3KBlzwT970nEqXIjndC1X5o5EK7zkkNRvsmZBmy5GKGCJB4AlKNqWmdsBrxY4Jadt1jNz9xhDLPJhEZXC_hQlYV0jxIv1xjwD-B_LdzSwDsLNDVeylGB24uBv89VGGc-papLyAeHKnT27sb_NIOqc1XjKDGRgZTHHeVYvXsGHQCPBnmOlMs6Te_3Khcqv8Ylg==&c=A9OC1MYFFBW9Qp-PJ6WhkT8MfnhV6Ti3bDtipFt0wso64HiJNcmnqg==&ch=pKHyurjUdlIHpC1Ft0VxcHsk0iiP_hHU85qozvwdplkSjy41blpFmw==)
---
| I thank you for your support and generosity.
Sincerely, Dr. Bud Pierce
---

With just 8 days left until the primary, Cuellar is doing all he can to get re-elected. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRVsqlnbY87OngO9IRuW-QlvMBXPUQgTSgvv1ZSR8TH_A4coZ8K8XY2XWPz4mniaUlkZf6zQlALJyMyY3Ci0xmmpA080gA5tGBQZ4o2bIqTyR0KoLgX0ICrZ3BpC1fe_VizpqhyfEiRlecXq0vtoJ3-NVaFLOZQBBoOFBkTr88Ft40qlqlEb3lhYK5LlaIT8ChbDAUw9zUKcS-tsncxc71wcNo7rwej-Yenmp-YVWAm2lmfabPhVGBWV57G8-Iglo8Q/3jr/h9HqjWbtTvqdzA_xUu8maA/h0/MgMgfp8wEOHOOuG4rVJBkEDpzGF8O-NNSspexcAYTNo) Peter, Henry Cuellar is going on the offensive to try and get re-elected. **FIRST:** Henry Cuellar saw our momentum to send Jessica to Congress as a threat and went up on TV to attack Jessica and undermine our campaign. **AND NOW:** A new wave of Henry Cuellar “supporters” have suspiciously taken to Twitter to tweet their support in the last days before the election — and it looks to us that Henry Cuellar has a bot problem. 🤖 This is a bizarre turn of events — but we’re not surprised. And we refuse to be distracted by antics from Henry Cuellar. [**_We’re focused and ramping up our GOTV efforts to get the word out about our movement to bring bold, progressive change to South Texas. If you’re in a place to do so, will you contribute $5 now to help Jessica get closer to the finish line before the primary on March 1?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCRzjgu9WulTlSeIu3fAi7xIIMxPjIQVqve7r2LDpaqH_d7xnOkeuNRUZznxoByZyYfkfKMhAWfDfw6rxYp2nNkQmKuhF50X7KOnVbAdy3MRcwMH7VjhJ3rV_ByHQ9EwYU8VjoVJfzRPovbbrWYx24B8gMxyiYui8bUCe_F1uFwSI8A3v8lKOiUhGCyPOkBtxvc9zUKpb2V8digT6Sfc3_Bsl8KmPbo95sq94oxlol5ZjjGr9o-DJ16zBDG5m28mInwpX1y_6eZ0spjyN2pJss6N3WfYTpISP17BKNUf-cv51TIUw9ADuOT12VarCOS3TNHX8LL7IhGdyudeklXX626Q/3jr/h9HqjWbtTvqdzA_xUu8maA/h1/DUOcLjK7E61kZddTJHhw4l8_aMU7xfH1ZuU7LdzN3WM) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCRzjgu9WulTlSeIu3fAi7xIIMxPjIQVqve7r2LDpaqH90XEv_PQvAUY107P3SH390K1Ui3t3jWbGAg7JTbYFFZx27cDJoZNlI64a4iXREK6K7bRd12RyFsZv7tPU9EAkHrYxTLl2ym9ufR_Ang8njDn2CdIJvUM493QPotgpN13B45XKUhc2cs8Os9HoRRiTSp3v64Ka4DIMHzAwwiCi6hz1pSgdCAd1FDRVUsnDYVMn6gY9kA1ltG1zZNkqKvpInU11PBvy12MUNQ7yQMrKJ5Lbhp8NHXE7Rb4k0zxfVESPR1azaE6feLtYXGt-9YAvEzx0Ajh3TIq8WN2xvl4lCww/3jr/h9HqjWbtTvqdzA_xUu8maA/h2/Sp4Z3riDGxBSNPXeUsxCisrSyJpMd7-yIGIsLYepCDc) **Don’t forget, Peter →** Henry Cuellar is still under investigation by the FBI.
