clean_body: With just 8 days left until the primary, Cuellar is doing all he can to get re-elected. | | | Peter, Henry Cuellar is going on the offensive to try and get re-elected. FIRST: Henry Cuellar saw our momentum to send Jessica to Congress as a threat and went up on TV to attack Jessica and undermine our campaign. AND NOW: A new wave of Henry Cuellar “supporters” have suspiciously taken to Twitter to tweet their support in the last days before the election — and it looks to us that Henry Cuellar has a bot problem. 🤖 This is a bizarre turn of events — but we’re not surprised. And we refuse to be distracted by antics from Henry Cuellar. Don’t forget, Peter → Henry Cuellar is still under investigation by the FBI. He’s also spent the past 16 years aligning himself with the anti-choice lobby, the NRA, and fossil fuel corporations. South Texans have had enough of Henry Cuellar. They know it would be way too risky to re-elect him and are hungry for new representation. That’s why Jessica is committed to advancing our progressive values in the halls of Congress. As a Laredo native and the daughter of Mexican immigrants, she’s seen first-hand that the rules of this country weren’t written for everyone. She’s ready to help change that by fighting to protect reproductive freedom, tackle the climate change crisis, hold corporations who pollute our planet accountable and fight the NRA to implement common-sense gun safety laws. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We appreciate all you do, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: HAPPY PRESIDENTS DAY (via DCCC)
subject: 46,000 pro-Biden signatures requested >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Wish President Biden a Happy Presidents Day!
| | | [SIGN THE CARD: Wish President Biden a Happy Presidents Day! >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)
---

Today is Presidents Day!

On this special occasion, we can't help but reflect on how PROUD we are of President Biden and all he's done for our country.

And as Joe kicks off his SECOND year in the White House, we want to make sure this is his BEST Presidents Day yet!

**That 's why we're calling on 46,000 of our best supporters to sign his Presidents Day card before midnight tonight:**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)

From day one in the White House, Joe has worked tirelessly to get our country back on track after four years of Donald Trump.

He helped PASS the American Rescue Plan, INVEST in America's infrastructure, and RESTORE our standing on the international stage.

**And today, we want to show Joe just how proud we are of all that he 's done as President.**

So please, can Joe count on seeing your name on his card before midnight?

---
[QUICKLY: Sign Joe's Presidents Day card before midnight >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46430879&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MjM0MzM4NQS2&l=14438646&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46430879&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MjM0MzM4NQS2&l=14438646&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

body:

---
| | | I'll be blunt, Friend.

Tonight is another important deadline for 2022 -- election year. If we miss this goal, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy and hello to 3 more years of Biden and Pelosi's America _Last_ agenda.
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsofiqjpehsf6h0uqljivs719uoirs9r1nelujdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5jmeoj3c9h2bs)
---
**Here 's where we stand:**
* The Democrat Machine is planning an all-out assault on our 8 GOP Young Guns we need to secure a Republican Majority this fall
* Big Tech continues to censor conservative voices and defend their Democrat allies
* The Fake News media continues to spread lies and misinformation about our House Republicans
* Pelosi and her House Democrats are raking in HUGE fundraising numbers...

Are you paying attention? The cards are stacked against us, Friend. If Democrats keep uniform control of Washington, Trump's legacy OVER. _**[Please rush $15 by midnight to help us crush this fundraising deadline!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmrk0poccv07lccvdpdro61tsq9h2aqo76t362qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5jmeoj3c9h2bs)**_

Every dollar counts, Friend. Please do your part to secure a better future for our country!

Kevin McCarthy

As Leader of the House Republicans, I'm committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. name: Team Victoria
subject: Free Meet & Greet with Victoria Virasingh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91626/images/Screen%20Shot%202021-12-02%20at%202.18.31%20PM.png] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Hello Friend,
The campaign is holding a virtual Meet & Greet with Victoria Virasingh on Thurdsay, February 24th from 5pm-6pm EST. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-feb24]
This Meet and Greet will take place over Zoom and is a great opportunity to get to know Victoria and ask her questions in a personal setting, and meet with other like-minded people who care about Virginia's 8th. There is no cost to attend the event so RSVP today.
A Zoom link will be provided upon RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-feb24] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-feb24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-feb24]
RSVP Here!!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-feb24]
Thank you!
Team Victoria
Sign Up for the Event Here!!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mandg-feb24]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]

Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/Victoria4VA] || Twitter [https://twitter.com/Victoria4VA] || Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/victoria4va/]

Arlington, VA 22207
United States

subject: MICHAEL REAGAN ENDORSES CHARLIE FOR GOVERNOR
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Charlie For Governor**
body:
| | | [ ](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=14be9fadcc&e=df21354de5)
---
| **ON THIS PRESIDENTS DAY, RONALD REAGAN'S SON MICHAEL REAGAN ENDORSES CHARLIE FOR GOV.**
“There are a lot of Republicans who say they are ‘Reagan Republicans.’ I know one who really is: Charlie Gerow. When my dad first ran for President Charlie Gerow was with him. Through the years Charlie always fought for the Reagan Revolution.

"Charlie Gerow will be a great Governor of Pennsylvania. He’s a champion for individual freedom and a strong economy. He’s the man to beat Josh Shapiro and turn things around in The Keystone State.

"Although my father isn’t with us any longer, we all know how deeply concerned he was about preserving freedom and for the future of our great nation. I am now carrying that flame and I proudly endorse Charlie Gerow for Governor of Pennsylvania.”
---

name: Lauren Micek Vargas
subject: My husband, Tony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I wanted to be the one to reach out this time.

|
---

| | I know you usually hear from my husband Tony.

But today, I told him I would reach out instead. [**_I wanted to personally tell you why I’m so proud of my husband, why he deserves your support, and give you a peek into our family. I hope you’ll take the time to read it until the very end, but if you have to log off, could you please chip in $10 before you go? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072150/331511787/1129282168?refcode=20220221_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlYjk1Mi01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJ5GA58SRy24MySvGiKrEb4QcRkgB7BS6YPgyzAotK0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072153/331511789/1129282168?refcode=20220221_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlYjk1Mi01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJ5GA58SRy24MySvGiKrEb4QcRkgB7BS6YPgyzAotK0=)
_Tony hitting the campaign trail with our daughter Ava!_ Tony is the hardest working person I know.

When he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done.

Tony believes in American businesses -- that’s why he secured Covid relief funding for them in the Nebraska legislature.

Tony believes in American families -- that’s why he raised funds for our communities during the pandemic.

Tony believes in American workers -- that’s why he demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like his dad. [**_Now, I’m asking you to believe in Tony. I’ll be honest: My husband’s opponent doesn’t have the interests of our community at heart. That’s why Tony is determined to win this race, but he can’t do it alone. Can Tony count on you to rush in $10 before midnight to fund his fight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072154/331511791/1129282168?refcode=20220221_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlYjk1Mi01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJ5GA58SRy24MySvGiKrEb4QcRkgB7BS6YPgyzAotK0=) One of the things I love most about Tony is that this isn’t about politics for him.

It’s deeply personal.

He fights tirelessly for low-income families because he grew up in poverty.

He fights tirelessly to improve our public schools because of his years as a teacher.

And at the end of every day, he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father. [**_I wish I didn’t have to ask for money, but Tony is still $1,038 short of his fundraising goal -- and if he misses his goal, he’ll have to make drastic budget cuts to his campaign at a critical moment. That’s why I’m asking: if you believe in Tony like I do, could you rush in $10 before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072155/331511793/1129282168?refcode=20220221_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlYjk1Mi01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJ5GA58SRy24MySvGiKrEb4QcRkgB7BS6YPgyzAotK0=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072156/331511794/1129282168?refcode=20220221_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlYjk1Mi01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJ5GA58SRy24MySvGiKrEb4QcRkgB7BS6YPgyzAotK0=)

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. clean_body: I wanted to be the one to reach out this time. | | | I know you usually hear from my husband Tony. But today, I told him I would reach out instead. = = Tony hitting the campaign trail with our daughter Ava! Tony is the hardest working person I know. When he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done. Tony believes in American businesses -- that’s why he secured Covid relief funding for them in the Nebraska legislature. Tony believes in American families -- that’s why he raised funds for our communities during the pandemic. Tony believes in American workers -- that’s why he demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like his dad. = One of the things I love most about Tony is that this isn’t about politics for him. It’s deeply personal. He fights tirelessly for low-income families because he grew up in poverty. He fights tirelessly to improve our public schools because of his years as a teacher. And at the end of every day, he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for supporting my husband, Lauren (and Ava and Luca!) | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . body:
This sticker will look great on a notebook, water bottle, or car!
#
We’re facing our next end-of-month fundraising deadline in exactly one week. And with only 28 days instead of the usual 30 or 31, we need a major push to make sure we don’t fall short.
We’re going up against Greg Abbott’s $62 million dollars in campaign cash and we need your help to fight back and prove that we have the resources to win this race. So we’re going to send a free sticker to everyone who donates to this email!
[Make your first contribution and we’ll send you a free sticker so you can show your support for Beto for Texas!](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52528?refcode=ema20220221-176945&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=176945%2E444211%2ESeOGoJ)

Team Beto

name: Team Warner
subject: How you can help elect Democrats in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Can you help us make up the gap?

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072179/331511873/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE1MzNhOS01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziFLKhGy_Z8UUq7MKJUVuE5W7CWLS539elyt7ziHHOM=&emci=be87843f-4e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8f1533a9-5b93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, If you ask Mark what it takes to elect more Democrats here in Virginia he’ll tell you two things — strong candidates, and a strong state Democratic party. The party isn’t just about the organization or the staff; it’s about the Virginians from all walks of life who work together to make real change happen in the Commonwealth. Mark knows this as well as anyone, from his time helping to rebuild the Democratic Party of Virginia (DPVA) as party chair in the ‘90s and from seeing those efforts pay off in the years since. That’s why Mark asked us to reach out to you today. The Democratic Party of Virginia (DPVA) plays such an important role in electing Democrats up and down the ballot here in the Commonwealth. But because of the pandemic, they haven’t been able to hold the major in-person events that give them the resources they need to reach voters and get them to the polls. [_**We can’t elect Democrats in Virginia without them. Pitch in $5 today to support all the work Mark and the Democratic Party of Virginia are doing to make Virginia blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072180/331511874/-383253631?refcode=mw_em_220221_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE1MzNhOS01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziFLKhGy_Z8UUq7MKJUVuE5W7CWLS539elyt7ziHHOM=) The most recent elections didn’t go the way we wanted. But our team and the DPVA are already working hard to make sure Virginia goes blue again. We’re building the kind of grassroots infrastructure needed to talk to voters frequently, spread the word about Democrats’ successes at the local, state, and federal level, and hold Republicans accountable. And all of this will pay off in a big way when we keep the U.S. Senate and House blue in 2022, and take back the House of Delegates in 2023. But we can’t do it without your help. A lot of the great events that raise the money DPVA needs for their work haven’t happened since 2019. Can you help us make up the gap? [_**Chip in $5 today so our team and the Democratic Party of Virginia can keep working to elect Democrats.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072181/331511875/-383253631?refcode=mw_em_220221_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE1MzNhOS01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziFLKhGy_Z8UUq7MKJUVuE5W7CWLS539elyt7ziHHOM=) Thank you, Team Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072182/331511876/-383253631?refcode=mw_em_220221_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE1MzNhOS01YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziFLKhGy_Z8UUq7MKJUVuE5W7CWLS539elyt7ziHHOM=)**

**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 21, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Drug Cartels are recruiting teenagers through TikTok to smuggle people and drugs. It's part of the cartels' whole infrastructure for all kinds of profitable illicit activities that are bad for our country. Ken Paxton will always fight to secure our border.

**Link: [https://www.foxbusiness.com/politics/texas-investigating-tiktok-over-human-and-drug-smuggling-posts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=15455d760a874f4da150d67c3fddc657&_e=DEwXr0E-UY4ifPPWejzkY26-vMI0-00_JkK1XZsXgTacpgI6EyXgb4KMMqEd8RFqFaITs_s2JlvpjpBSkMM4NKrR49wgSgW9QZeFF2GuL9rIBl9_X8yR9BueZQpW3uD74qkt8riRJHamAb3b3QjYdxXTdPa6XR8nsE-md3LvjlmmF4FKJ-WLbnFPL_B0w7_WNzVITT0U2lE8zAXNgpjeOv3Ra6VNqg77hk5X-DAXg5znART8kDQI7vBvU4XymctvrzG4oqqQnvU-Gmgx8WrWIdipwqw61NV8I47rR_dUHajDzr-RRnG2bP_KRxvUSFFwJv74P2XF0wbqm15F3QkQJC1Q90J6KygAaFsnj8vGroM%3D)**

**Theme of the Day: Battling the Cartels**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Soros-funded leftist District Attorney Jose Garza is attacking Austin Police for protecting us against the 2020 BLM riots. We should defend those who protect us – instead of those who commit crimes. Ken Paxton stands in support of the cops that Garza wants to destroy. These officers deserve the presumption of innocence until proven guilty.

~ The City of Denton has in place a mask mandate for city employees in contravention of the existing Texas mask mandate ban. This is not a new policy and this is not a new order. The City of Denton is openly defying this ban after the Texas Supreme Court has repeatedly upheld its authority in this matter. Ken Paxton will continue to battle COVID mandates at every turn.

~ The Department of Homeland Security has revealed that over 62,500 migrants were released into the US in January. This is completely unacceptable. Ken Paxton will continue his efforts to hold Joe Biden accountable for creating this crisis at our southern border.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=15455d760a874f4da150d67c3fddc657&_e=DEwXr0E-UY4ifPPWejzkY-zwxOuU_EG5JYpwrmr8glvOxQiOnFBAqlHLxELyXiVeikKAAxJC8cd8M7zkFKisQIaJKtwUnFzFElM41S74Ue5gcsZrFC-sBjWHin9X4JrKj8-zp4WJSxdwX3noGsyAmfJ55le1Pw1NUlhI9sO46ixSl3_4zM0LnePu2b-6iEJZlQ-rIuQZ2piLqlLzwl0FiTLaG84wg_WlFWJYZ-q7QG1ApMz5gmGM0VtYGjlpCSRdlYGuYgwZskNtaVWYogz4LQ%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: When this photo was taken:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight ...
| | |
---
Peter – when this photo was taken, I had no idea that I would grow up to become the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. But I did know one thing: Public service and giving back to your community matter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072317/331512728/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk705-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWI1OWQxYy01ZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5kKbwQz9LwKaAWi7O7FQGjMKqhAYSVmfwIjF7-ABCY=)
You see, I don't come from a political dynasty, but my mom’s father served as a lieutenant in the Dubuque Fire Department, and my dad’s father earned a Purple Heart serving our country in World War II. Growing up, my parents instilled that sense of service in me. **They taught me that when someone asks for your help because there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes.**
That's why, when I saw that my community needed someone to fight for them, I stepped up and ran for a seat in the Iowa House of Representatives, even though I was only 25 years old. It's why I ran for Congress against a man twice my age and won – even though plenty of folks said I didn't have the experience, that it wasn't my time.
It's why I'm going to defeat Sen. Grassley and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate. **I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But I also know that nobody will fight harder than I will to flip this seat and fight for Iowans.**
Right now, Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans are ready to show him the door, but I need your help to compete with GOP spending. **You see, tonight, I'm still $6,317 short of my next fundraising goal at 11:59 p.m. tonight.**
**[So please, can you donate $5 right now to elect the youngest woman senator, give working families in Iowa a real leader in Washington and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42072318/331512729/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk705-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWI1OWQxYy01ZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5kKbwQz9LwKaAWi7O7FQGjMKqhAYSVmfwIjF7-ABCY=)**

clean_body: I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight ... | | | Peter – when this photo was taken, I had no idea that I would grow up to become the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. But I did know one thing: Public service and giving back to your community matter. = You see, I don't come from a political dynasty, but my mom’s father served as a lieutenant in the Dubuque Fire Department, and my dad’s father earned a Purple Heart serving our country in World War II. Growing up, my parents instilled that sense of service in me. They taught me that when someone asks for your help because there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes. That's why, when I saw that my community needed someone to fight for them, I stepped up and ran for a seat in the Iowa House of Representatives, even though I was only 25 years old. It's why I ran for Congress against a man twice my age and won – even though plenty of folks said I didn't have the experience, that it wasn't my time. It's why I'm going to defeat Sen. Grassley and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate. I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But I also know that nobody will fight harder than I will to flip this seat and fight for Iowans. Right now, Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans are ready to show him the door, but I need your help to compete with GOP spending. You see, tonight, I'm still $6,317 short of my next fundraising goal at 11:59 p.m. tonight. = | | = With Senate control on the line here in Iowa, the GOP will do everything in their power to stop our campaign. I'm counting on grassroots donors like you to stand with me and make up this gap tonight. With gratitude, – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you watched the Super Bowl in Los Angeles and looked into the stands, you saw California politicians, celebrities and elites having the time of their lives - with not a mask in sight. Yet the next day, millions of California kids were forced to wear a mask for 8 hours at school.
**At this point the liberals aren 't even trying to hide it -- they want to impose mandates on others because it's not about a virus but about control.**
AND just this week, three radical school board members in San Francisco were recalled after two years of forcing school children to wear masks all day. _**Even in the bluest parts of California, parents are sick of the left taking out their virtue signaling on children.**_
My job as governor is to be the defender of our state, so it doesn't faze me when the Biden Administration and his radical left cronies attack me for putting Florida's children first.
If they had it their way, Florida school children would still be in masks and our schools would be closed, and I can promise you that will _**never**_ happen under my watch.
Help me continue to defend Florida from the Democrats' political theater that they are sickeningly taking out on our kids. Ron DeSantis

name: Team Morganize
subject: Just hours until the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
There are just hours until Morgan faces off against Josh Mandel
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220221-695-footer-ak&t=2&akid=695%2E90090%2EU8SV5W)
Hey,
There are just hours until Morgan faces off against Josh Mandel for our latest debate in the race to represent Ohio in the U.S. Senate. Morgan could not be more ready to take the fight to right-wing extremism head on.
**This is a huge test of our campaign.** With just weeks until our primary election, we have to show the strength of our movement, and time’s running short. While Morgan has been talking with voters across the state and pushing back against Republicans at every turn, the out-of-touch party establishment has backed Tim Ryan – _who still hasn’t debated any candidate in this race._
**[Before the debate tonight, can you rush a $5 contribution to make sure our campaign can remain competitive?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26210?t=3&akid=695%2E90090%2EU8SV5W)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26216?refcode=em20220221-695&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=695%2E90090%2EU8SV5W)**
Morgan’s strong progressive ideas and commitment to Ohio’s communities are a huge contrast with Josh Mandel’s far-right, extremist, conspiracy-theory-driven priorities. We cannot allow someone who disavows the separation of Church and State anywhere NEAR the U.S. Senate.
But another huge difference is that Morgan doesn’t take a single dollar from corporate PACs or special interests. Our 100% grassroots-funded campaign relies on supporters like you chipping in whatever they can to help stay in this fight.
That’s why we’re asking: **[Can you make a contribution before tonight’s debate to show Morgan that she’s got a movement on her side?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26210?t=23&akid=695%2E90090%2EU8SV5W)**
Thank you,
Team Morganize
P.S. [**You can tune into the debate live at 7:30pm ET at this link!**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26219?t=24&akid=695%2E90090%2EU8SV5W)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220221-695-footer&t=25&refcode2=695_90090_U8SV5W&akid=695%2E90090%2EU8SV5W)**
---

Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

Friend,
If you watched the Super Bowl in Los Angeles and looked into the stands, you saw California politicians, celebrities and elites having the time of their lives - with not a mask in sight. Yet the next day, millions of California kids were forced to wear a mask for 8 hours at school.
**At this point the liberals aren 't even trying to hide it -- they want to impose mandates on others because it's not about a virus but about control.**
AND just this week, three radical school board members in San Francisco were recalled after two years of forcing school children to wear masks all day. _**Even in the bluest parts of California, parents are sick of the left taking out their virtue signaling on children.**_
My job as governor is to be the defender of our state, so it doesn't faze me when the Biden Administration and his radical left cronies attack me for putting Florida's children first.
If they had it their way, Florida school children would still be in masks and our schools would be closed, and I can promise you that will _**never**_ happen under my watch.
Help me continue to defend Florida from the Democrats' political theater that they are sickeningly taking out on our kids. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

| | Kamala Harris flew to Europe last week to discuss the border crisis in the Russia-Ukraine dispute. **But she still hasn't visited our own US border to look at the travesty unfolding under the Biden Administration's bumbling leadership.** Biden put Kamala in charge of our own southern border, _which is far from secure._ 154,000 illegal immigrants crossed the border last month, and Kamala is in Europe. When I am in Congress, I will make securing our southern border one of my top priorities. **[We need to protect our borders at home. Hi Derek! **We’re expecting a ruling any day now from Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court finalizing the district maps for Congress.** This means new district lines and less than three months before the primary to reach voters that are new to the district. Now, we need to go all in to communicate with new voters about the high stakes of our election, where our majority in the House hangs in the balance. But that takes significant resources, so we’ve set a goal of raising $20,000 to cover these costs. **[Will you help us reach our goal with a donation of $25 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42065946/331481624/-1668125556?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220221_CD_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA0ZDA1ZC0zOTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5AYkX3szRBZ_oBv87GQrDuIpp5TCzbeW7eVre_3SZ0=)** This Presidents’ Day, join me in this campaign committed to investing in the future of Pennsylvania and fighting for our common good. **[Make a donation today to help us continue this fight through the primary and to election day in November!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42065947/331481625/-1668125556?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220221_CD_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA0ZDA1ZC0zOTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5AYkX3szRBZ_oBv87GQrDuIpp5TCzbeW7eVre_3SZ0=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

This means new district lines and less than three months before the primary to reach voters that are new to the district. Now, we need to go all in to communicate with new voters about the high stakes of our election, where our majority in the House hangs in the balance. name: Giffords.org
subject: Taking on the NRA is not easy. It is not cheap. But it’s what we must do.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
We send a number of fundraising emails, quite possibly more than some of your family and friends. So we thought it important to explain why these fundraising emails are so important to our work.
Here is the truth:
Taking on the NRA is not easy. It is not cheap. You know that. But it’s what we must do.
Now, what you might not know is that the vast majority of the donations we receive come from people chipping in small amounts of money. Most donations come in response to emails like this one.
So when you see us go toe-to-toe with the NRA this election cycle; when you see us pass laws at the state level that will save lives from gun violence — it’s emails like this that make it possible.
But that means from time-to-time we have to ask. And today is one of those days. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Giffords today to help Gabby continue the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220221-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1600_3935704_fdVl--&akid=1600%2E3935704%2EfdVl--)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

clean_body: Friends - We send a number of fundraising emails, quite possibly more than some of your family and friends. So we thought it important to explain why these fundraising emails are so important to our work. Here is the truth: Taking on the NRA is not easy. It is not cheap. You know that. But it’s what we must do. Now, what you might not know is that the vast majority of the donations we receive come from people chipping in small amounts of money. Most donations come in response to emails like this one. So when you see us go toe-to-toe with the NRA this election cycle; when you see us pass laws at the state level that will save lives from gun violence — it’s emails like this that make it possible. But that means from time-to-time we have to ask. And today is one of those days. name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Are whistleblowers protected?
body:
On April 21, I’ll be in court to defend myself as a pro-life whistleblower — and to fearlessly face down Planned Parenthood
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zckv5mqnag7samf1klhah71bombkbmg64pt55jk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5ge0o75chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hffdlmcepjec76m2q71pr1c3hj7chh61qr5cj1elgm9p3nc9gbepr769i36shh63jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmcdb76ko6fdr5coob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9g6t61i80o9399sern8c2cp5bi6tv5h6gkk24vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5ge0o75chh2bs)
---
| | Friend, This is a major milestone. **On April 21, I’ll be in court to defend myself as a pro-life whistleblower — and to fearlessly face down Planned Parenthood in their legal fight AGAINST me.** **[Can I count on you, a pro-life champion, to have my back? Your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more today will ensure I can defend our pro-life cause from Planned Parenthood’s legal team and continue Operation Rescue’s critical work.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv03hdvp4g0jjfqbi6ngqshlv27arvjurjkmosj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5ge0o75chh2bs)**
---
[**Join me in the fight**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7j0ud96qeaade5u7e0qgg8ea6co83bavisqlms0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5ge0o75chh2bs)
---
With your support, Operation Rescue is a FEARLESS defender of life ... and we TELL THE TRUTH about the cruelty and evils about abortion. Planned Parenthood brought a retaliatory lawsuit against me after my undercover journalism project with the Center for Medical Progress exposed their involvement in the illegal trafficking of aborted baby body parts. **Because of this, I’ve spent close to SEVEN YEARS in legal battles defending my right to be a whistleblower ... and now I’ll be in the courtroom again on April 21 for my APPEAL in this case.** I have refused to let any of these fights — even the biggest ones of my LIFE — stop me from advancing my life-saving work with Operation Rescue. [**Will you partner with Operation Rescue right now with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more to ensure we can continue our critical efforts in the fight for life?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhujp07st46s64r71p0371jicqmgjifiic2cubso_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5ge0o75chh2bs)
---
[**Join me in the fight**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq9005d9oqttlfrb3ucab3kllvuf1upkdqbrd8eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5ge0o75chh2bs)
---
I’m proud of the work done by the Center for Medical Progress in exposing the unethical activity committed by Planned Parenthood. That work launched a national conversation about the immorality of trafficking in aborted baby remains — a conversation about the cruel, ugly reality of abortion that Pro-Abortion activists don’t want to discuss. But along with the lawsuits I’ve faced as a result of the undercover journalism project, I’ve also been targeted with death threats, had bank accounts investigated, lost my insurance coverage, and the list goes on. As my case advances to fight the court’s unjust ruling, it’s all the more imperative that I have allies who will be in my corner, cheering me on. I’m ready to take this case all the way to the Supreme Court — that’s how important it is for the future of pro-life work like mine! [**Friend, your continued partnership is the only reason that Operation Rescue can continue our life-saving work from the clinics to the courts. Please chip in $25, $50, $75, or more to help us stand up to Planned Parenthood in court.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvqpsc6mj4qqj8hiogmg35fl0k17j1kk9a2g6e9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5ge0o75chh2bs)
---
Thank you and God bless,
---
Troy Newman President
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znvp68im2gi5j7rb8a12g18pmg5m5jssvem3vo38_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c5ge0o75chh2bs)
---
| | P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278

---

As you know, politics is not my thing, but I am so tired of politicians making promises and not coming through. I am so tired of good people being left behind because they’re not represented by a super PAC. If you feel the same way I do, you know it's time for new leadership. As his wife, I can say definitively that Ken always lives up to his word. He is born to lead, and he is committed to bringing the priorities of real people to the US Senate. All the best, Juliana Russell Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today. ** Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene is an "Absent Representative"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter –– these days, Marjorie Taylor Greene is being called the “Absent Representative." She's everywhere to be seen except in her own district, listening to voters.
Marge is spending her time getting kicked off committees, hanging around with Matt Gaetz, and defending the insurrectionists that threatened the lives of her colleagues. All while avoiding the kitchen table issues at hand.
Northwest Georgians need leadership that is willing to work hard on the issues and spend time listening to the interests of the people. Marjorie Taylor Greene has shown time and time again that she is not able to do that.
From day one, my campaign has been fueled by listening to the people and being inside the community. There will never be a question of who I represent — that answer will always be the people of GA-14.
If you believe we deserve better in 2022, chip in $20.22 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1209] Your support directly funds our in-district efforts.
Together - we will win,
Holly McCormack.

---
Friend,
---
Polls continue to show that a majority of Wisconsin voters will NOT vote to reelect radical liberal Tony Evers, and it’s clear why...
---
At every turn, Evers has taken the side of rioters, special interests, liberal unions, or the “woke” mob over the people of Wisconsin.
---
But when we win this governor’s race, that all changes on DAY ONE.
---
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount to help me FIRE Tony Evers.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=5a162c75fde74b329858db0d5ca5d54e&_e=YpK2UefXSu3zD-Z1mM_tqE35pUyNJxJY7AXxegPCAazM5q81pO5PuQ_3X08PLOeOaMCQSzdwivqlEpNbo8bP4PaMawy4Xt8BScjZXwgArUNB0M2eE6rsnSU9k4Rf6907M6UsNcX78QiLqT76lPiaH-nyKZVt5mzBvkKxEWv9bCbYsVReefcepFCdgW63i4UwNOA7gGp399HhnZbmb4TWy66IG5VtqGMz6C1Fkw94cCvjft9G1P8ZlClQvA_y2ebtjphCOqMxzEXzEfdvz9fo94PrbfFjvv_gCb0KSacXwAtgtcmqSNymRSIYQiPGjSLAJCE7YXdWF7mHqafEILAJAP2QMZjuhbWZK4NXxrG2QmjJyGE61mXaYNFtC5cYX3iER9I_xPM5y73iRpMMN0J1vWSujBFovxjh-iHUaHtEq35CNRehsDuSlIF717rqFFfjljOZRNQe7tZ-jCcs3q2_mhx7b8mHZVGyygEsCjVT2-9QPDThKmLOnBKdkr68RqQ4j6po2_5O6pXqlLag1K9OoA%3D%3D)**
---
**As your next governor, you have my word, I will have the most aggressive first 100 days in office in our state’s history to undo the damage Evers has caused. I will:**
---
**_
* Ban ballot harvesting, eliminate ballot boxes, and abolish the WEC
* Put 1,000 more cops on the street, institute mandatory bail minimums, and FIRE liberal DA John Chisholm
* Ban vaccine mandates and fight for YOUR freedoms
* Unmask our kids and allow parents to decide what’s best for their own children
* Break up the FAILED Milwaukee Public Schools system
_**

---
_**... just to name a few.**_
---

clean_body: The Left won’t know what hit them. | Friend, Polls continue to show that a majority of Wisconsin voters will NOT vote to reelect radical liberal Tony Evers, and it’s clear why... At every turn, Evers has taken the side of rioters, special interests, liberal unions, or the “woke” mob over the people of Wisconsin. But when we win this governor’s race, that all changes on DAY ONE. As your next governor, you have my word, I will have the most aggressive first 100 days in office in our state’s history to undo the damage Evers has caused. I will: Ban ballot harvesting, eliminate ballot boxes, and abolish the WEC Put 1,000 more cops on the street, institute mandatory bail minimums, and FIRE liberal DA John Chisholm Ban vaccine mandates and fight for YOUR freedoms Unmask our kids and allow parents to decide what’s best for their own children Break up the FAILED Milwaukee Public Schools system ... just to name a few. But to take back our great state and put my plan into action, I need YOU fighting by my side. During my time as Lt. Governor to Governor Scott Walker, we advanced the most conservative agenda in Wisconsin history. The first 100 days of the Walker-Kleefisch administration drove Democrats and the liberal media insane. Just wait until these next 100 days – they won’t know what hit them. But without your support, our mission to make Wisconsin once again work for YOU is in jeopardy. Evers may be tanking in the polls, but he’s also sitting on a war chest of $10.5 MILLION in cash on hand, and we can’t take a single thing for granted in this race, Friend. ** Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. name: Mike Crispi
subject: Crispi for Congress - ICYMI - Monday, February 21, 2022
body:
HAPPY PRESIDENTS DAY and THANK YOU for subscribing to the CRISPI FOR CONGRESS newsletter!

----------

Starting today, you will receive weekly emails keeping you up to date on Mike Crispi's campaign for Congress in NJ-4 as well as what's new in the district.

EVENT ANNOUNCEMENTS

----------

Tomorrow, Tuesday February 22, Mike will be hosting a town hall in Lacey Township, Ocean County. This will be NJ-4's FIRST TOWN HALL SINCE 1982. That's right, Congressman Chris Smith hasn't held a town hall in 40 years. What does that say about how the Congressman feels about the people of NJ-4?

Mike Crispi knows that YOU deserve a VOICE. Come by, say hello, and make YOUR VOICE heard!

|

|

|

|

|

|

MIKE IN THE NEWS

----------

Mike's America First message is resonating with the people of NJ-4. Check out this article below from American Greatness on why NJ-4 needs a new voice in Washington!

|

|

|

( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=40.7.1.7a29c06b0841e9360f5dba5897f6a923 )

|

|

|

https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=40.12.1.0c6d964104f5127590ef070156169e2b

WHY WON'T CHRIS SMITH DEBATE?

----------

It's been nearly a month since Mike Crispi challenged Congressman Smith to a debate to answer for his failures in Washington. Smith has voted repeatedly to take OUR RIGHTS away and is helping Biden and the radical left destroy our country.

Call Congressman Smith's office at (732) 780-3035 and tell him you want him to debate Mike Crispi. YOU deserve answers!

|

|

|

|

|

|

Thank you for checking out our newsletter and stay tuned for more. And as always, thank you, thank you, thank you for your support!

Please share, donate, and spread the word.

America needs YOU!

|

|

|

->

name: Research @ Hern for Congress
subject: Who is your favorite Republican president?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
This Presidents’ Day, we want to know who your favorite Republican president is. Read more >>>
| | | Peter, We’ve had some incredible leaders in America — especially Republican ones. Abraham Lincoln is widely regarded as one of the best, if not THE best president in American history for freeing the slaves. He was also our first Republican president. Teddy Roosevelt was known as "the conservation president," and cleared the path to later establish the National Park Service. Ronald Reagan’s leadership ended the Cold War, broke apart the Soviet Union, and tore down the Berlin Wall. He also brought about a conservative revival in America. Donald Trump put America FIRST for four years, and fought the swamp to Make America Great Again. **Is one of these Republican presidents your favorite? Or is it someone else? Please respond to our survey to let Kevin and our team know who your favorite Republican president is.**
---

body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220221&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220221&amount=28]
Team,
This is a people-powered campaign.
We’re able to host campaign events, purchase yard signs, pay staff, print lit, and get out in the new district because of the contributions of people just like you.
Since Elissa first ran for Congress, one of her main goals has been ensuring voters know where her priorities lie: in their communities on the issues they care about. It’s why during her first election, she pledged not to accept a dime of corporate PAC money.
Not accepting money from corporations lets her vote her conscience and take a stand for what she knows is right, but it also means that she has to rely more on grassroots donors than a candidate that can count on big corporate checks to fund their campaign.
The power is shown in the numbers: 88% of our contributions are $100 or below.
Unfortunately, Elissa’s opponent hasn’t even pretended to care who he takes money from. The vast majority of funding for his state legislative races came from corporate backers and from other PACs. In fact, during his previous elections, just 12% of his contributions came from actual individuals.
The voters of the new 7th district deserve to know that their member of Congress is fighting for them, not corporate backers. Will you chip in $5, $10, or $15 to fund Elissa’s people powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220221&amount=28]

subject: My campaign is under attack.
body:
Dear Fellow Patriot,

I’ve got bad news: my opponents in this race have teamed up to attack me.

And it may not surprise you to know that their attacks aren’t about my policies of border security, election integrity, ending our dependence on China, and standing up to the Biden Regime.

Instead, their attacks are based on lies about me personally meant to mislead voters in the district.

Will you help me fight back with a donation of $1000, $500, $250, or $100 today? Please contribute at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate.

| Peter, Did you see the news? We are having our first SUPER SATURDAY on February 26th all across Ohio!
Join Senator Matt Dolan at the home of Hilliard City Council President Pete Marsh for coffee and donuts as he kicks-off his statewide day of action!
If you don't live in Franklin County, don't worry, we have door-to-door kick-offs across the state. You can sign-up to make phone calls from your home as well.
More details and launch locations can be found on the flyer below and be sure to [RSVP here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yQUqN-8eDWhZUo1L4K37XoRFmjOlrbJz52qL6YiJDnX24WxLBFQ-TugqVlc9nCwE55A3jY3d1GYQFt9BjiCHCP9o63l4kfnL6E1DHG5l0rJUSfz1ikQcmLULn3fNbqqGeUtyQ5hJbxr2EWHXddxQcw==&c=kdKvnQ_6mkBDg9V9STMZDBodIHxY63vW6FBVKEOS1NLkqmnFQcQquw==&ch=_uQ7hrfih-4d8RDPalsRH5qwJJczIAPWZ3crPPtsntfryeC-0R4C1Q==) Please share with anyone else who may be interested, too!
---

Peter,
---
_Breitbart_ has reported that 2 million illegal immigrants were stopped at our southern border last year, and another 500,000 made it into the United States without detection.
---
**It’s time to FINISH THE WALL and SEAL THE DAMN BORDER!**
---
If we don’t, millions more will make the perilous journey and further overwhelm our already strained border communities.
---
_Without a secure border, we won’t have a country for much longer..._
---

As the daughter of immigrants who fled Castro’s Cuba, I’ve been particularly outspoken on the issue of border security and immigration.
---
Because at the end of the day, I believe the first step to solving this problem is simple: _We have to finish the wall and fully defend our southern border._
---
Biden and Kamala’s radical open-borders agenda is hurting American communities, it’s hurting those who risk their lives to cross the border illegally, and it’s hurting those who followed the rules and immigrated here legally.
---
The only people it helps are violent drug cartels and human smugglers who are making BILLIONS off our undefended border.
---
Ignoring the issue won’t make it go away. I’m taking action to solve this decades old problem, but I’ll need your continued support as I go toe-to-toe with the liberal open-borders lobby.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to support me as I continue my fight to SECURE our southern border and pass comprehensive immigration reform.**](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=804f3dedf27d416e92fb4825a04d4683&_e=158HQtLCcCAB51suoLYH6a728_iwRndZDUuTdpSbdXcAieV6n4SiPLvj-LQDBfLwFHGxY6tlbOTMPKnIWs5godlzPkK8i27oORpEZa61G3yMwVJnYyXV6ALJEVScKdXd2gTcfNHpwS_wAa5Rf8DP0kCzJQDZmR8dd8RLy294wXdobu_GkBlT4EfYj8g7UdjS4O2OOiu3bChbA6cbqFVbSkzh4QQ_cS3ZtXKvq-lAvzP8ivqV9rxsl2NN8bYsB4Jrl3bWFZNVDEeN4qZ3mq2UqLaadwa_cMr1vFsIxhJEFkdXEHwaD1ormNsrCzv5eGuciArtyJVs5mN8cam6eiA1Rmi9VSGJGbF7lvppKqN4gVNSaHFZjCpbA4TB5uwiqOr9P6KT2w28umipcKQYJH8xhcNyFEbw8jG05vHn52EUW8aQlBOA0oRvW2DyW-YQOKK8t03316y62tRUuWO_8oAuwWFEwwcu-sQpHvNju1UPHkmMov_mW20JRQaP75JDjLbr)

clean_body: It’s past time for action. | Peter, Breitbart has reported that 2 million illegal immigrants were stopped at our southern border last year, and another 500,000 made it into the United States without detection. It’s time to FINISH THE WALL and SEAL THE DAMN BORDER! If we don’t, millions more will make the perilous journey and further overwhelm our already strained border communities. Without a secure border, we won’t have a country for much longer... As the daughter of immigrants who fled Castro’s Cuba, I’ve been particularly outspoken on the issue of border security and immigration. Because at the end of the day, I believe the first step to solving this problem is simple: We have to finish the wall and fully defend our southern border. Biden and Kamala’s radical open-borders agenda is hurting American communities, it’s hurting those who risk their lives to cross the border illegally, and it’s hurting those who followed the rules and immigrated here legally. The only people it helps are violent drug cartels and human smugglers who are making BILLIONS off our undefended border. Ignoring the issue won’t make it go away. I’m taking action to solve this decades old problem, but I’ll need your continued support as I go toe-to-toe with the liberal open-borders lobby. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Liz (Team Benson)
subject: Check out Jocelyn's CNN op-ed on how voters can save democracy
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Over the weekend, Jocelyn co-authored a powerful op-ed for CNN about the work voters must do this year to protect our democracy. Their message: Our democracy simply cannot afford for any of us to sit out this fight."

Read the op-ed below and contribute to Jocelyn's re-election campaign so she can continue leading this fight. [>>ttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022122]
secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022122 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022122

If voters don’t stop it, election deniers could kill American democracy
by Jocelyn Benson and Shirley N. Weber

As the chief election officers in California and Michigan, we are charged with ensuring and protecting the votes of over 30 million Americans – roughly 20% of the total registered voters in our country.

We work to make sure that every eligible citizen is registered, has the information they need to vote, has their vote counted correctly and can have rightly placed faith in a complex electoral process – one made more onerous by the continuing Covid-19 pandemic.

We join with thousands of elected and appointed local election officials to fulfill this mission. This is the charge of every secretary of state and state election official across the country.

With that in mind we pose this question: Who do you want running elections in your state? An election denier who refuses to acknowledge the will of the voters in 2020 and who was present during the tragic US Capitol insurrection in January 6 2021? A candidate who aims to rewrite the history of the 2020 election, falsely repeating debunked allegations that voting machines in Georgia flipped votes cast for former President Donald Trump to President Joe Biden? Or would you prefer a civil servant and dedicated advocate for democracy committed to defending and strengthening the most fundamental American right?

This choice – a choice between truth and lies, autocracy and democracy – will be on the ballot in our states and dozens of others this November. There are already nearly two dozen candidates running to be the chief election officer in their state who question the legitimacy of President Biden’s win in 2020 and support efforts to both restrict access to the ballot and institute changes that would allow officials to invalidate or overturn results at will.

One has called for the dissolution of the bipartisan Wisconsin Election Commission, which fairly administers elections in the Badger State; another proposed a bill in the Arizona state legislature that would allow that partisan body to simply overrule a secretary of state’s decision to officially certify the results of an election.

Three candidates have appeared at events with prominent members of the QAnon movement and one proudly restates the group’s outlandish conspiracy theories, which are unworthy of being restated here.

By calling into question President Biden’s certified victory, these candidates have shown us who they are: individuals willing to, if given the authority, nullify the voice and will of the voters if they dislike the results in elections they oversee. And in supporting extreme, anti-democratic changes to voting laws that will make it more difficult for citizens to access the ballot box, they demonstrate an un-American commitment to partisan goals over truth and democracy.

But we want to be clear: This will only happen if the American voter allows it.

Because this fall, voters in California, Michigan and across the country will have a clear opportunity to reject candidates who run on a platform of party over country. They can hold accountable those seeking to use their platforms and authority to erode confidence in our election system and deny those willing to overturn the will of the voters the ability to do so.
In 2022, voters can act to ensure anyone with the explicit mission of overturning democracy fails to ascend as the chief election officer of their state.

Indeed, the American voter is the only one who can save our democracy from those seeking to serve as election officials, secretaries of state and attorneys general who would be poised and empowered to overturn elections at will.
We say this not to be alarmist, but rather to be pragmatic about what’s in front of us in this pivotal election year.
When we took our oaths of office as secretaries of state, and when we walk into our office each day, we do so not as Democrats or Republicans but as Americans. We carry out our sworn constitutional duties and fulfill our roles in the invaluable democratic process.

It’s time for those of us – Democrats, Republicans and Independents – who care about our democratic institutions to take the threat in front of us seriously.

There are 26 secretary of state races across the country this year – and in some states, elections for county clerks and other local election officials as well. In numerous states from coast to coast, the Big Lie is on the ballot.

Rejecting misinformation, suppression and election tampering will take all of us. We urge you to get involved by supporting candidates who are committed to protecting our democratic institutions – donating your time or money if you’re able and, first and foremost, making your voice heard at the polls in both the primary and general elections in your state.

Our democracy simply cannot afford for any of us to sit out this fight.

clean_body: Over the weekend, Jocelyn co-authored a powerful op-ed for CNN about the work voters must do this year to protect our democracy. Their message: Our democracy simply cannot afford for any of us to sit out this fight." Read the op-ed below and contribute to Jocelyn's re-election campaign so she can continue leading this fight. [>>ttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022122] secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022122 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022122 If voters don’t stop it, election deniers could kill American democracy by Jocelyn Benson and Shirley N. Weber As the chief election officers in California and Michigan, we are charged with ensuring and protecting the votes of over 30 million Americans – roughly 20% of the total registered voters in our country. We work to make sure that every eligible citizen is registered, has the information they need to vote, has their vote counted correctly and can have rightly placed faith in a complex electoral process – one made more onerous by the continuing Covid-19 pandemic. We join with thousands of elected and appointed local election officials to fulfill this mission. This is the charge of every secretary of state and state election official across the country. With that in mind we pose this question: Who do you want running elections in your state? An election denier who refuses to acknowledge the will of the voters in 2020 and who was present during the tragic US Capitol insurrection in January 6 2021? A candidate who aims to rewrite the history of the 2020 election, falsely repeating debunked allegations that voting machines in Georgia flipped votes cast for former President Donald Trump to President Joe Biden? Or would you prefer a civil servant and dedicated advocate for democracy committed to defending and strengthening the most fundamental American right? This choice – a choice between truth and lies, autocracy and democracy – will be on the ballot in our states and dozens of others this November. There are already nearly two dozen candidates running to be the chief election officer in their state who question the legitimacy of President Biden’s win in 2020 and support efforts to both restrict access to the ballot and institute changes that would allow officials to invalidate or overturn results at will. One has called for the dissolution of the bipartisan Wisconsin Election Commission, which fairly administers elections in the Badger State; another proposed a bill in the Arizona state legislature that would allow that partisan body to simply overrule a secretary of state’s decision to officially certify the results of an election. Three candidates have appeared at events with prominent members of the QAnon movement and one proudly restates the group’s outlandish conspiracy theories, which are unworthy of being restated here. By calling into question President Biden’s certified victory, these candidates have shown us who they are: individuals willing to, if given the authority, nullify the voice and will of the voters if they dislike the results in elections they oversee. And in supporting extreme, anti-democratic changes to voting laws that will make it more difficult for citizens to access the ballot box, they demonstrate an un-American commitment to partisan goals over truth and democracy. But we want to be clear: This will only happen if the American voter allows it. Because this fall, voters in California, Michigan and across the country will have a clear opportunity to reject candidates who run on a platform of party over country. They can hold accountable those seeking to use their platforms and authority to erode confidence in our election system and deny those willing to overturn the will of the voters the ability to do so. In 2022, voters can act to ensure anyone with the explicit mission of overturning democracy fails to ascend as the chief election officer of their state. Indeed, the American voter is the only one who can save our democracy from those seeking to serve as election officials, secretaries of state and attorneys general who would be poised and empowered to overturn elections at will. We say this not to be alarmist, but rather to be pragmatic about what’s in front of us in this pivotal election year. When we took our oaths of office as secretaries of state, and when we walk into our office each day, we do so not as Democrats or Republicans but as Americans. We carry out our sworn constitutional duties and fulfill our roles in the invaluable democratic process. It’s time for those of us – Democrats, Republicans and Independents – who care about our democratic institutions to take the threat in front of us seriously. There are 26 secretary of state races across the country this year – and in some states, elections for county clerks and other local election officials as well. In numerous states from coast to coast, the Big Lie is on the ballot. Rejecting misinformation, suppression and election tampering will take all of us. We urge you to get involved by supporting candidates who are committed to protecting our democratic institutions – donating your time or money if you’re able and, first and foremost, making your voice heard at the polls in both the primary and general elections in your state. Our democracy simply cannot afford for any of us to sit out this fight. secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022122 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022122] [] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: Scheller Doubles Down Against Debating Kevin Dellicker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
So Kevin will debate without her: Mar. 2 at 6 PM at Villa Lentini in Coplay | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=13b56ab959&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
# **Announcing our First Debate...Without Lisa Scheller**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

This is starting to get ridiculous.

Even though the primary election is now just twelve weeks away, Lisa Scheller still refuses to debate her only declared Republican opponent: me.

I asked her at a televised press conference again ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8b5b0e99fb&e=1090c5c412)), and she refused again. So we are proceeding without her.

You are invited to a town hall forum where I will take questions from Lehigh Valley voters.

**Where: Villa Lentini Ristorante (2700 Balliet Street, Coplay PA 18037)
When: Wednesday, March 2nd. Doors open at 6:00 p.m. Program begins at 7:00 p.m. **

Seating is limited, so please RSVP to [kevin@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com?subject=Town%20Hall%20RSVP&body=I%20will%20attend%20the%20town%20hall%20on%20March%202%20at%206%20p.m.%20at%20Villa%20Lentini%20in%20Coplay.%20%0A%0ANumber%20of%20people%3A%20%0ANames%3A). The forum is free and open to the public. The restaurant will be open if you'd like to buy dinner.

My team and I had a very busy and productive week campaigning, visiting lots of interesting places and meeting hundreds of local citizens. It's encouraging to see so many people committed to KEEP AMERICA FREE.

Sincerely,

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8e7d05f91e&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=290209444c&e=1090c5c412)
---
Thank you to the Northampton County Republican Committee for letting me address the annual Lincoln Day Breakfast in Bethlehem.

Kevin is hard at work to promote **Strong Families** , **Good Jobs** , and **Safe Communities**. Here's what happened since our last update.
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| **Promoting the Great Outdoors**

That's my dad and my son Eli hunting in the Fall of 2011 in the woods of Lynn Township, Lehigh County. I took my three sons hunting and fishing when they were very young and they've grown up to be good stewards of our environment. Introducing young people to the great outdoors builds strong families and teaches respect for God's creation. That's why I was pleased to attend this year's Whitetail Deer Classic Banquet at the Northampton Community Center on Saturday. I got to meet with hundreds of dedicated volunteers working to pass along the values of conservation and sportsmanship to the next generation. [Learn more](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ff7eaad6e1&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
---
| **God Bless our Healthcare Workers**
I had the privilege of touring Lincoln Tech in Allentown to meet with instructors and students in training programs for healthcare workers. Our healthcare workers are on the frontlines of patient care and have worked long hours under dangerous conditions. Thank you for your commitment to our community. We support you and salute your selfless service. [Learn more](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5a4763a852&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=bccd64eeea&e=1090c5c412)
---
| **38 Ways to Counter Chinese Aggression**

Today I wrapped up my series on the Top Ten reasons why China is not our partner. All the posts are available on my website [blog](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c02ebefe05&e=1090c5c412) with a summary post [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=283d3ff29f&e=1090c5c412). It lists 38 specific things that we can do right now to prevent a Cold War with China or something worse.
---
|
---
| | **Kevin Dellicker in the Community**

Here's where I've been since our last campaign update:

Lodge 40 Fraternal Order of Police, Bucks, Lehigh & Northampton counties via Zoom
Family Meet and Greet, Bethlehem, PA
Tour of Lincoln Tech, Allentown
Meeting with local leaders, Carbon County
Press Conference on Debates, Allentown
Berks County Patriots, Hamburg
Northampton County Republican Committee, Lincoln Day Breakfast, Bethlehem
Whitetail Deer Classic Dinner, Northampton
Live Music Meet-and-Greet, Bangor

**Upcoming Events**

**Monday, 02/22: Guest appearance on AM 790 WAEB Bobby Gunther Walsh

Tuesday, 02/22: Reception at Bovino's Pizza**
331 North Courtland Street, East Stroudsburg, PA 18301 | 5:00 PM to 6:30 PM

**Tuesday, 02/22: West End Republican Committee**
Cherry's Family Restaurant, 539 Interchange Road (Rte. 209) | 7:00 PM

**Thursday, 02/24: Northampton County Republican Committee**
2523 Willow Park Road, Bethlehem Township, PA 18020 | 7:00 PM

**Friday, 02/25: District 11 Wrestling Tournament**
Freedom High School, Bethlehem, PA | All day

**Saturday, 02/26: Lehigh County Lincoln Day Breakfast @ Hyatt Place**
621 Grange Road, Allentown PA 18106 | 7:30 AM

**Wednesday, 03/02: Meet & Greet/Petition Signing @ Dolce Mamma Grille**
4505 Bath Pike, Bethlehem PA 18017 | 1 PM – 2:30 PM

**Wednesday, 03/02: Town Hall @ Villa Lentini Ristorante**
2700 Balliet Street, Coplay PA 18037 | 6 PM – 8 PM

Email kevin@dellickerforcongress.com with questions or visit our Facebook page.

**[Kevin Dellicker for Congress | Facebook](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=60c76cc6cb&e=1090c5c412)**

---

name: Greg Lopez for Governor HQ
subject: Reminder: The Fight for the Soul of Colorado Begins!
body:
Jared Polis Enters the Governor's Race
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
County Party Officer,
This is C. J. Garbo, Greg's campaign manager. I am writing as Jared Polis announced yesterday he is running for governor, and I am glad to be working for the only candidate who can defeat him in November.
I am exhausted from the fear-mongering, the tyranny, and being told what is best for me and my family by those who are incompetent, cannot manage a budget, and decide they can choose best which business is essential and non-essential for me and my community.
IT STOPS NOW.
[County Party Officer, please consider supporting our campaign with a few dollars so we can ramp up our offensive against a Governor who fancies himself accountable to no one](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WkSUfOkD-1WkhdcfPpX6rQDvn6jOPVfPuMYenao4cErtgrYbsaWlUdwS08JZPDmlz0wv2R5WxBvmKSIniD9McUCsPfUC5VabugyfjNdRlEL8nwvHfJiZEiqFiROpv4lBHRyClGGY5kd4ohpqGptyww==&c=K-VmZ8AMszdsH2dB9wf_leM19qJzyEK8QEA6-w7q_qgggJixvnOwGA==&ch=6yvosJ5Y89DW-FLy4WtgUwk8O4bkaBcEm3HyRkrQ6nHYER52JjvvAA==)[.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WkSUfOkD-1WkhdcfPpX6rQDvn6jOPVfPuMYenao4cErtgrYbsaWlUdwS08JZPDmlz0wv2R5WxBvmKSIniD9McUCsPfUC5VabugyfjNdRlEL8nwvHfJiZEiqFiROpv4lBHRyClGGY5kd4ohpqGptyww==&c=K-VmZ8AMszdsH2dB9wf_leM19qJzyEK8QEA6-w7q_qgggJixvnOwGA==&ch=6yvosJ5Y89DW-FLy4WtgUwk8O4bkaBcEm3HyRkrQ6nHYER52JjvvAA==)
Nobody will outspend Jared Polis. However, with your help, we can continue to finance Greg's effort to out-smart and take votes away from him to victory!
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WkSUfOkD-1WkhdcfPpX6rQDvn6jOPVfPuMYenao4cErtgrYbsaWlUcrXpfBf2c78Rvo-vLWm3FJVhJpw1wCzREippWtnP2GOLpECvg283u1HVKKfrPbTnGsa39E6A-u9tkEFn_HGYpxjcTsRwWwZbdbBzZZAEO1utUJ0wBr9eWfpKBzD9TephnwfzfRbnEJZgMztLQjbN-z_06QOU1q9IQ==&c=K-VmZ8AMszdsH2dB9wf_leM19qJzyEK8QEA6-w7q_qgggJixvnOwGA==&ch=6yvosJ5Y89DW-FLy4WtgUwk8O4bkaBcEm3HyRkrQ6nHYER52JjvvAA==)

#LopezListens, and he is the only candidate who can capture the Hispanic vote, as well as Unaffiliated and Democrat voters who feel betrayed by Jared Polis.
With your support, Greg will take his campaign into the heart of communities where no other Republican campaigns: Denver, Arapahoe, and Adams counties.
Greg is putting people over politics and will be one of us for all of us.
Thank You So Much, C. J. Garbo Campaign Manager, Greg Lopez for Governor P.O. BOX 1413 Parker, CO 80134 [www.Lopez2022.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WkSUfOkD-1WkhdcfPpX6rQDvn6jOPVfPuMYenao4cErtgrYbsaWlUWWYIxLbDYLoZRGWR95JGKfSe8Vyd6AILryf3VnAUf1U1gyGdqWofiVC6ncKxCB0WmejL9LS7yLWjzE_Azo8bQZnjK894aJutQ==&c=K-VmZ8AMszdsH2dB9wf_leM19qJzyEK8QEA6-w7q_qgggJixvnOwGA==&ch=6yvosJ5Y89DW-FLy4WtgUwk8O4bkaBcEm3HyRkrQ6nHYER52JjvvAA==)

name: January 6th Committee Update [Team Mosely]
subject: Liz Cheney 𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐀𝐂𝐊𝐄𝐃 by the RNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress P

I raised both of my children here in Nevada. So many of my core memories are centered around this state: enjoying its natural beauty, spending time with our friends and family, and getting to know neighbors. I wouldn’t give it up for the world.
But look, I wouldn’t be here if it wasn’t for the opportunities that were made available to me while growing up. I was fortunate enough to have parents that always had a source of income, even if things came down to the wire that month. On top of this, I was heavily involved in afterschool activities that taught me the values of leadership at a young age.
The reality is, we’ve had over 40 years since then to make sure these exact opportunities are available to every family. And while we’ve made some progress, we still have a long way to go.
If we want to pave the way for success for Nevada, its future generations, and hard-working families like mine, we need leadership that’s going to fight for it – and that’s exactly what I’ve been doing in Congress.
**The fight for equal opportunity for all hasn’t been easy but, it sure as hell has been worth it. I’m running for re-election in my district to give Nevada’s future generations a fair shot and I need your help.**
[**Can you chip in $5 or more to help my campaign win re-election and keep up the fight to expand opportunities across every corner of Nevada?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075015/331527164/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220221_FR_ThatGirl_A0_na_U1_X1_M2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWI5ZmEwZi03MzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AtS68JS3DU6UNSzLbykhjzWPq2KNHK0b7O7DOMeOkZI=)
