clean_body: | | | = Folks, do you recognize this girl? I grew up in a working-class family as one of eight siblings. My parents taught me the values of hard work, compassion, and perseverance that I’ve carried with me through life and led me to where I am today. = | | | = I raised both of my children here in Nevada. So many of my core memories are centered around this state: enjoying its natural beauty, spending time with our friends and family, and getting to know neighbors. I wouldn’t give it up for the world. But look, I wouldn’t be here if it wasn’t for the opportunities that were made available to me while growing up. I was fortunate enough to have parents that always had a source of income, even if things came down to the wire that month. On top of this, I was heavily involved in afterschool activities that taught me the values of leadership at a young age. The reality is, we’ve had over 40 years since then to make sure these exact opportunities are available to every family. And while we’ve made some progress, we still have a long way to go. If we want to pave the way for success for Nevada, its future generations, and hard-working families like mine, we need leadership that’s going to fight for it – and that’s exactly what I’ve been doing in Congress. The fight for equal opportunity for all hasn’t been easy but, it sure as hell has been worth it. I’m running for re-election in my district to give Nevada’s future generations a fair shot and I need your help. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s continue down the path of progress. With gratitude, Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148

name: Team Jazz
subject: Join our day of action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
Right now, I believe we are at a moment in our history where we have the opportunity to tackle our defining challenges to ensure we don’t pass them on to the next generation. I’m running for Congress because change can't wait, like health care for every person, nutritious food for every neighborhood, and reforms to our unjust and often predatory criminal justice system.
With Election Day just 127 days away, we need lots of people to work together now to make sure we reach enough voters with our message, win our June 28 primary, and take this critical open seat for progress.
Please, join us at noon this Saturday at Flowers High School as we launch a day of action to safely knock doors across Prince George's and discuss the issues that matter most with voters >>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/c-kYi2bo30qYDI--knuu9Q2]
GET DETAILS AND RSVP » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/c-kYi2bo30qYDI--knuu9Q2]
With the urgency of now,
Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

name: Nicolaus for U.S. Senate Team
subject: Happy Presidents Day
body:
Today we celebrate the Presidents of the past and present.

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=presidents_day_22&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Today we celebrate the Presidents of the past and present. We continue to look towards the future. We celebrate the presidents who helped our country, we mourn those who were taken from us, and we teach our children about those who acted in ill will towards our country. We must not be afraid to talk about, teach, or learn about our history. We must work to learn and understand our history so that we do not make the same mistakes our ancestors did. __ Together we can Be The Change and we can build a future for our children and grandchildren to thrive in. **[Help us build a future that is equitable and just by donating $25 right now and showing that we are ready to Be The |

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075072/331529282/1783234547?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220221_FR_HATEASKING_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2QzOTFjNS03MzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgCaU0Asxg9eeXkicEwhHwY6EauMxiGNYXy9InalhQ4=) Hi — Eddie Geller here.

Can I be honest with you?

I hate asking for money. It sucks. A lot. [ But you know what sucks even more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075073/331529283/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220221_FR_HATEASKING_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2QzOTFjNS03MzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgCaU0Asxg9eeXkicEwhHwY6EauMxiGNYXy9InalhQ4=)

[Scott Franklin’s extreme record in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075074/331529284/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220221_FR_HATEASKING_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2QzOTFjNS03MzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgCaU0Asxg9eeXkicEwhHwY6EauMxiGNYXy9InalhQ4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075075/331529285/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220221_FR_HATEASKING_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2QzOTFjNS03MzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgCaU0Asxg9eeXkicEwhHwY6EauMxiGNYXy9InalhQ4=) Look — we can build an economy that works for _everyone_ , expand health care coverage, protect our democracy, and address the climate crisis. [ But that starts with voting out far-right politicians like Scott Franklin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075076/331529286/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220221_FR_HATEASKING_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2QzOTFjNS03MzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgCaU0Asxg9eeXkicEwhHwY6EauMxiGNYXy9InalhQ4=)

I hate asking for money but I have to. clean_body: I hate asking for money. | | | = Hi — Eddie Geller here. Can I be honest with you? I hate asking for money. It sucks. A lot. = = = Look — we can build an economy that works for everyone , expand health care coverage, protect our democracy, and address the climate crisis. = And now, thanks to redistricting, we have our best shot at flipping FL-15 since 1992! So — while asking people for money is one of my least favorite things (ever!) — I know that flipping Florida’s 15th District is worth it. I hate asking for money but I have to. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Election Integrity - I Need Your Help
body:
| Peter -- More campaigns are calling for a forensic audit of caucus data. People who did not attend caucus were added as delegates, and delegates voted through on caucus night were removed. For the most part, volunteers are working tirelessly to compile this information and get it to campaigns in a timely manner, but there are a few bad apples. These are entrenched interests that are set on doing whatever it takes to dishonestly stack the deck in favor of their unpopular establishment candidates. **This is election fraud! Plain and simple.** Career politicians are a cancer that defy the founders’ intent for public servants, and they weaken our party. We must unite to remove this cancer! **Our campaign has led the fight for transparency in this race.** [Our press release](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rBhB1H0Y-0KAXn8Uxy6DRlbeS_ey0R5yLd62eka5dH6Yxig9N17eM6Q2xbSkFei3MgMO200JSIihZPQydIz0uy0&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_integrity_fundraising&n=1) makes it clear that a Paul Gazelka staffer in Morrison County improperly rigged their delegate lists. We MUST fight this corruption head-on. Like President Trump in 2020, I am calling for a full audit, recount, and investigation of the caucus attendees and delegates lists. **We deserve total transparency!** We have to hold our own party accountable and to ensure the people are truly represented. If we stay silent as our own party fails to hold a fair election, then we are just as bad as the Democrats. We will win this battle and we will win this race by shining light on truth and exposing corruption. **I need your help to do this.** [Your contribution of $25, $50, $100, or more will go directly toward our fight for draining the swamp and rooting out corruption.](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_integrity_fundraising&n=2) This scandal needs to be addressed and I will not stop until this situation is rectified. **Your donation will save our party’s election integrity and hold the bad actors accountable. Not all of the data misreporting is done intentionally and that is why we need a full audit, so we know of all the fraud and mistakes.** Will you stand with me and call for a full audit, recount, and investigation of the Caucus results? With your donation we will secure our elections and Save Minnesota from corruption. | [](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_integrity_fundraising&n=3 "Fight Election Fraud Now!") [Fight Election Fraud Now!](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_integrity_fundraising&n=3)
---
**Thank you!!**
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
ElectNeil.com
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_integrity_fundraising&n=4). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_integrity_fundraising&n=5), software for leaders.

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Join our day of action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
Right now, I believe we are at a moment in our history where we have the opportunity to tackle our defining challenges to ensure we don’t pass them on to the next generation. I’m running for Congress because change can't wait, like health care for every person, nutritious food for every neighborhood, and reforms to our unjust and often predatory criminal justice system.
With Election Day just 127 days away, we need lots of people to work together now to make sure we reach enough voters with our message, win our June 28 primary, and take this critical open seat for progress.
Please, join us at noon this Saturday at Flowers High School as we launch a day of action to safely knock doors across Prince George's and discuss the issues that matter most with voters >>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/c-kYi2bo30qYDI--knuu9Q2]
GET DETAILS AND RSVP » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/c-kYi2bo30qYDI--knuu9Q2]
With the urgency of now,
Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

clean_body: I wanted to give you a quick update about where we’re at in this campaign. | | | Peter, I wanted to give you a quick update about where we’re at in this campaign. Our movement to fight back against the Tennessee GOP’s gerrymandering might seem like an uphill battle, but Odessa is determined to fight like hell for working families here in Tennessee, no matter what. To do that, we’ll need our grassroots supporters to step up. I’m putting together entirely new spreadsheets and projections about what it takes financially to win a red-to-blue seat. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Peter, I’m proud to work for a candidate who won’t take one dime from corporate PACs, unlike the many Republicans in Middle Tennessee. This campaign wouldn’t be possible without grassroots supporters stepping up every day. Thank you, and have a great start to your week! Aarica Marsh Finance Director, Odessa for Congress | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

---
**Do you support Social Security?**
---

---

Team -- A major poll by AARP shows that Americans almost **_universally_** support Social Security!

**But despite its widespread popularity, key Republican senators have hatched a plan to GUT Social Security behind closed doors.**

Millions of Americans depend on the Social Security benefits **_they earned_** through decades of hard work -- so we've launched an urgent LIVE POLL to confirm the AARP’s numbers. **We still need 61 responses from 18326 -- tell us where you stand before the poll expires at MIDNIGHT:**

**Do you support Social Security?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6694?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220221-BreakingNews-AARPSocialSecurity-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220221-BreakingNews-AARPSocialSecurity-Pros-sl1&akid=3040%2E9716520%2ErE-32b)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/6694?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220221-BreakingNews-AARPSocialSecurity-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220221-BreakingNews-AARPSocialSecurity-Pros-sl1&akid=3040%2E9716520%2ErE-32b)

subject: Who is Your Favorite President?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
[[Survey Enclosed] | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=dddeebb5cb&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | Peter -

**_On Presidents' Day, we honor the patriots who have led our nation and celebrate the birth of George Washington._**

America has been blessed with incredible leaders who have defended the Constitution and inspired our nation to achieve greatness. __We've also had our share of duds_ _\- with Joe Biden already earning a spot amongst the worst leaders America has ever seen.

Friend,

I’m writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America’s truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we’ve endured over the past two years, _and we’re taking action._

**That’s right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fc90ddff5ad5442a821953bf77103145&_e=LtxaJYHxKivUX0ZpkQ4tWTQHpaF6NQ1ACXHFvyGFygx5c4_czQqqcHBZvdUNBYrJwArgQHCKtLG2NC9M2u5Cig-ri2zU6pCZrYxFVL0oiodHXZ-yxdphOn7djY83F-2tH8wXWKuhIvmIJacLSjOF_8fF7GYHHNVjoj6Ra3ASizCWaqD0Dl4aMKFMWXOffhrYMhmzGycbeJ6Bgfgdkwr0oFKnDDqSSeiSbCUxVIRMjDf6brHr6mowMw4X0Un3Ep6uV3Zi-ig3IL8mF3D2nsVjB7OS2nb_pIb-puN1f5eTQDOBGuE9JVBKcf7kiyaczyMtwOYnbJyF8e4NFcH6JQypJxoNbBF0kcHcHn52cHodJaU-2gfzF4Ylh_CDE9MMRoIO "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We’ve had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it’s just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN’T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don’t stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fc90ddff5ad5442a821953bf77103145&_e=LtxaJYHxKivUX0ZpkQ4tWTQHpaF6NQ1ACXHFvyGFygx5c4_czQqqcHBZvdUNBYrJwArgQHCKtLG2NC9M2u5Cig-ri2zU6pCZrYxFVL0oiodHXZ-yxdphOn7djY83F-2tH8wXWKuhIvmIJacLSjOF_8fF7GYHHNVjoj6Ra3ASizDRMnbsix_7KJ5wWve0-1l8Ve5GXs8DXX1jXmp2iWQYzD44Aq8OWToTvxMbuU49PFJCKlmprhNr5GhikiWzSwzpXbOlbnbLG2cFdAiPWCnKy5_y8qJ1nz-AoBffRj4RjP7u4gXjZCVpRXLEGKkA_o6uPzn8LiQqxiN-Nol3aY526n--b9ylrGp7CEUmWw7h8YQZX2A_sbmZpJYYndE9Hugq "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: The GOP needs to cull its ranks of active insurrectionists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075272/331536547/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTM2NWYxNi03NzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfKfnqHGuhh4ypxgY6oo5lbvJY1vSrPtKY802-HHMlg=&emci=09862284-7693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=35365f16-7793-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075273/331536552/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTM2NWYxNi03NzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfKfnqHGuhh4ypxgY6oo5lbvJY1vSrPtKY802-HHMlg=&emci=09862284-7693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=35365f16-7793-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**

clean_body: Hello, It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.” Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well. Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over. January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy. An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur. The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can – and we must_ – protect our democracy. Thank you for always being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) | Peter,
You and I both know it...
By waiting to remove the statewide mask mandate until other Democrat governors did so, Steve Sisolak revealed his complete inability to make timely decisions that are in the best interest of Nevadans.
It was the perfect example of why he's the wrong choice for our state - and why we're going to make him a one-term Governor on November 8th, 2022.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Can I tell you a story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6159?t=6&akid=1303%2E878179%2EGe33o0) Can I tell you a story, folks?

During the Great Depression, my great-grandfather walked miles every morning to the local steel mill to see if they were hiring any workers. Along with hundreds of others, my great-grandpa hoped he would be one of the few to get picked—even if just for a few hours of work.

He was rarely selected. But he still made that walk every single day, every single month.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: My family taught me a lot about determination, perseverance, and doing what’s right. I’ll never forget where I came from or who I’m fighting for.

**Because with all the chaos and partisan gridlock happening in Washington, you need someone who will roll up their sleeves and get to work—no matter how many miles the walk is.**

But right now I’m in the fight of my life. Mitch McConnell is hellbent on retaking the Senate majority. My GOP opponents are spending more than $40 million to keep Ohio red. And we’re expecting a barrage of attacks to hit us any day now. **[So, I’m asking for your support. Will you make a contribution of $5 or more to help me flip this seat so we can make some progress in the Senate? clean_body: | Can I tell you a story, folks? During the Great Depression, my great-grandfather walked miles every morning to the local steel mill to see if they were hiring any workers. Along with hundreds of others, my great-grandpa hoped he would be one of the few to get picked—even if just for a few hours of work. He was rarely selected. But he still made that walk every single day, every single month. Here’s why I’m telling you this: My family taught me a lot about determination, perseverance, and doing what’s right. I’ll never forget where I came from or who I’m fighting for. Because with all the chaos and partisan gridlock happening in Washington, you need someone who will roll up their sleeves and get to work—no matter how many miles the walk is. But right now I’m in the fight of my life. Mitch McConnell is hellbent on retaking the Senate majority. My GOP opponents are spending more than $40 million to keep Ohio red. body:

|
---
| | Hi Friends,

I need your full support on 1 Mar at the Fleet Reserve, 99 Wisteria Rd, Goose Creek, SC. The set up team please arrive at 430PM, for banners, tables and rehearsal. Order of events, Prayer, Pledge of Allegiance, National Anthem, MC introduces Guest Speaker, then Ingrid, Questions. Everyone in the room must register and should have name tags. The table for donations, and selling Centurion gear must be manned. It will be a great event and time to get to know the constituents. Centurion team will be in full force. Our team is growing with dedicated Patriots who want to send a real Conservative woman warrior to Congress that represents America and family values. God Bless.

Go to the campaign **[Events](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=9ac3219866&e=bb02dd73bf)** page for details.
---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY (FULL FORCE) :
1\. Communicate with the Campaign. We need to know if you're showing up.
2\. Join us for the weekly campaign volunteers ops meeting 7PM Tuesday: [https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85985792074?pwd=dlZBblZaRXRvRGczczRmYiswMkVMZz09](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=fdf50265e4&e=bb02dd73bf)
3\. Host a House Party.
4\. Sign up for Campaign Training/Appreciation Meetings.
5. Sign up for Door Knocking and Phone banking.**

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion

name: Team West Live Poll
subject: Should Washington do more to lower prescription drug costs?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
We’re missing 3 responses! | **🟢 TEAM WEST LIVE POLL 🟢** | **DID YOU KNOW?** **Prescription drug prices in the U.S. are more than 250% times higher than almost anywhere else in the world.** Oregonians shouldn’t have to choose between putting food on the table and life-saving prescription medicine. Our leaders in Washington got elected to deliver results for the American people, not serve Big Pharma. We want to know if you agree with us: **Do you believe Washington must do more to lower prescription drug costs?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075856/331552230/629521889?amount=5&refcode=ea.880ab3f2-7e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.880ab3f2-7e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBhYjNmMi03ZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNQ5V4k92RD8lC846E2s-KBVucvyWljRQCQIU3XKXgY=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075858/331552232/629521889?amount=5&refcode=ea.880ab3f2-7e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.880ab3f2-7e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBhYjNmMi03ZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNQ5V4k92RD8lC846E2s-KBVucvyWljRQCQIU3XKXgY=)
---|---
_Your response will be instantly recorded._
Listen, the claim that we have “the greatest health care system in the world” would be laughable if it wasn’t so poisonous. Matt’s a scientist, but it doesn’t take a Ph.D. to know that we can do _A WHOLE LOT_ better.
Big Pharma giants and insurance companies are squeezing the heck out of business, as the prices of our medicines become unaffordable.
And to make matters worse: Congress has the power to change it all, yet they’re sitting on their a**ses, collecting fat campaign checks from Big Pharma and their corporate overlords.
When will enough be enough? We need Washington to fight Big Pharma’s greed and our broken healthcare system, not be a part of it.
Matt’s running for Congress to be the voice we desperately need in the fight to lower prescription drug costs, but until then, we want to know where you stand, friend.
We’re missing 3 responses from active Democrats like you! Don’t miss your chance to give us your thoughts: **Do you believe Washington must do more to lower prescription drug costs?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075860/331552234/629521889?amount=5&refcode=ea.880ab3f2-7e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.880ab3f2-7e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBhYjNmMi03ZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNQ5V4k92RD8lC846E2s-KBVucvyWljRQCQIU3XKXgY=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42075862/331552236/629521889?amount=5&refcode=ea.880ab3f2-7e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.880ab3f2-7e93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBhYjNmMi03ZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNQ5V4k92RD8lC846E2s-KBVucvyWljRQCQIU3XKXgY=)
---|---
_Your response will be instantly recorded._
Thanks for your response,
Team West

Not content with their heavy-handed voter suppression bills in 2021, the AZ GOP are coming up with dozens of ways to suppress voters in November’s elections.

The AZ GOP are throwing everything they have at us in hopes of ensuring GOP victories in 2022. They have proposed everything from **allowing the legislature to overturn election results to completely banning early voting.**

We’ve been successful in organizing opposition against the worst bills, but there’s still a chance bad voter suppression legislation will get passed.

If we flip the governor’s mansion and the AZ legislature, we stop these efforts in their tracks.

name: SarahForWisconsin.com
subject: Republicans have raised more than $200 million to take back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, and Sarah is the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson in the most recent head-to-head poll. The Washington Post is even reporting that she "could be the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson." We'll be direct: Wisconsin could be the tipping point for Senate control, and Sarah is the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson in the most recent head-to-head poll. _The Washington Post_ even reported that she "could be the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson."

The problem is, the guy has more than $2.1 million already in the bank — that’s more cash on hand than anyone in this race. When you combine that with what Donald Trump and national Republicans have reported raising, they’ve got more than $200 million to take back the Senate.

We know Sarah can defeat Ron Johnson, but she didn’t step into this race with a Rolodex full of right-wing donors — and she’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs. Instead, Sarah relies on a LOT of grassroots supporters like you chipping in to messages like these, and the response is always incredible.

**Will you make a contribution to help our campaign compete with the millions of dollars Republicans will spend to protect Ron Johnson? subject: What’s your opinion of Joe Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress |
body:
How does Joe Biden measure up to past presidents? [](http://links.donatetohealey.com/u/click?_t=b85a497f2e8f41748b694630e904c604&_m=0f149eecc5ec46dd84d58fb014639568&_e=Cm0_fJquEkV9p-29d6HgqQa0XFBbG8ly2PfBipDTIW_QwID7WgbwU_t5Z246EHmCO6M4Ebxm74UGbjuNaPi8MZYUjU05rf5aRZoLebRRj1JgX6qzE3SJXat2ejgSfal062mFxlUJgN6z1-xvoQMJRnCbQaKzh9eb-mri5InrTYixqixBFqBhM_1V-TF1MNCVKcDN0dGJBF6lwUh8y7JC54MLpBXG8KvkaS5QziWZvEfHcek0UOK6go--w_sbJBYAc8u32XK12jqdygZos5VhRrwHHLENWwu1Qfqvsmi8tGWkcu2JCnmtP7LtyA86XHgy0rRJ3GvIkM2LS7iBG_ogLucdlHZiOV_00VgacPogM9WXOITt5xQdp_xah0CqMfwdIlTlDc-qTDBifSRyzWQRsekq9V_ZNA0LpPYrx-Wu9PL-Z8rUzz_OZFbS7Jm-qiLk) Friend, Happy Presidents’ Day, New Jersey! We’ve been blessed with some excellent leaders throughout history, and it all started with George Washington’s oath of office in 1789. **Since Washington, we’ve had 45 other presidents – some great, and some terrible... namely the current President, Joe Biden.** His weak leadership in Washington is why we’re seeing record inflation, as well as soaring prices at the gas pump and on grocery store shelves. Everywhere you look, there is a crisis and a President who will not act. FiveThirtyEight recently took an average of presidential job approval polls and it showed that **53% of Americans DISAPPROVE of Joe Biden’s job performance.** Are you one of the 53% who is fed up with Joe Biden’s failures? clean_body: How does Joe Biden measure up to past presidents? Friend, Happy Presidents’ Day, New Jersey! We’ve been blessed with some excellent leaders throughout history, and it all started with George Washington’s oath of office in 1789. Since Washington, we’ve had 45 other presidents – some great, and some terrible... namely the current President, Joe Biden. His weak leadership in Washington is why we’re seeing record inflation, as well as soaring prices at the gas pump and on grocery store shelves. Everywhere you look, there is a crisis and a President who will not act. FiveThirtyEight recently took an average of presidential job approval polls and it showed that 53% of Americans DISAPPROVE of Joe Biden’s job performance. Are you one of the 53% who is fed up with Joe Biden’s failures? Take our quick 1-minute survey: Are you unhappy with Joe Biden’s job performance? I look forward to reading your responses. Thanks, Bob Healey Jr. | | | | Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress | | P.O. Box 999, Edison NJ, 08818 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: Team Benson on the road
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
This past weekend my team reached every convention and I had a presence at every convention held all across the State of Minnesota. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=da552c38b1&e=9d6926af69)
---
| [VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=be9b87b136&e=9d6926af69 "VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE")
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,

Happy President’s Day - and happy birthday to George Washington. We are so fortunate to live in a blessed country.
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=63103df52f&e=9d6926af69)
**CONVENTION KICK-OFF**

As a Republican candidate for governor, I have the privilege of meeting many people across the state who are share our conservative values and are ready for a more prosperous Minnesota.

This past weekend my team reached _every convention_ \- Aitkin County, Blue Earth County, Cass County, Pine County, Renville County, Saint Louis County, Winona County and Wright County - _earning delegates across the State of Minnesota_.

I am the only candidate in the race who can beat Tim Walz. My record speaks for itself: I have the MOST conservative record of any candidate running for Governor.

When I was first elected, I promised myself to always stick to my principles, and I’ve done just that and will continue to do that as your next Governor.

I hope you will join my campaign and volunteer today.

[Join with me and fellow Minnesotans by volunteering ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=7d47557fb6&e=9d6926af69)and [donating to help me connect with voters across the state so together we can beat Tim Walz and bring common sense back to Minnesota](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c923fe710d&e=9d6926af69).

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=638e6cdf4a&e=9d6926af69)
**Michelle Benson **
[Candidate for Minnesota Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=071bace61e&e=9d6926af69)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike?=
subject: We need you!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | I’m Mike Rakebrandt and I’m running to unseat Andrew Garbarino in the 2nd Congressional District of New York. Like many of you, I was upset with Congressman Gabarino’s reckless decision to support Biden’s $1.2 trillion dollar "Infrastructure Bill". This betrayal goes against the Republican and Conservative platforms that got him elected. Unfortunately, Garbarino has a history of betraying us in the short time he's been in Congress. From his vote to not object to the Certification of the 2020 presidential election, ignoring the request from more than 100 representatives from Arizona, Wisconsin, Michigan, Pennsylvania and Georgia to provide at least 10 more days so they could investigate the discrepancies, to his support of the partisan witch hunt that is known as the January 6 Commission, wherein he defied GOP leadership and President Trump, Garbarino is truly a RINO. His continued defense of his voting record shows just how tone deaf and insulting he is to his constituents and the party as a whole.
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### Mikes Resume
---
| Mike grew up in Brooklyn and joined the US Navy at 22 years old. He proudly served for over nine years as a submariner, and then a hospital corpsman alongside USMC infantry battalions in the Middle East. In 2004 while deployed in Iraq, he was wounded in combat. For his bravery and service, Mike was awarded the Purple Heart and the Navy Achievement Medal with Combat Distinguishing Device.
---
With a desire to rejoin public service and fulfill a childhood dream, Mike joined the NYPD in 2007. He was promoted to the Detective Bureau in February 2013. Always willing to step up to the most challenging assignments, both in the Navy and now with the NYPD, Mike knows he is at his best when he's serving our country and our community with honor, dignity and courage. Mike lives in Holbrook, NY with his wife Lauren, his four children, and their dogs Luna and Jupiter.
---
|
---
| [Read More](https://mikerakebrandtforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d296b76944609124692089402&id=fb7dd1ca5c&e=2362dddf1b "Read More")
---
|
---
| |
---
### What we need
We are fighting for every American Family against a corrupt political machine that seeks to control you and your family without regard for your feelings or wellbeing. This has been demonstrated time and again in Covid mandates, heath care workers being fired, first responders being fired, out of control inflation, and American parents being labeled as "Domestic terrorists" by those wishing to instill a hateful, and divisive curriculum in our schools. The weaponization of bureaucracy against us, and legislation designed to further restrict our rights and freedoms are just further examples of this. We can fight back and win this culture war, but only with your help.
---
|
---
| |
---
### How to help
We need all you to help us fight back. We are asking for cash donations, and volunteers to walk with us for petition canvassing in March. We would also appreciate sharing this email by sending it to everybody you can. This is not just our fight, it is all of ours, and we must stand up now. So please, share our social media posts, donate whatever you can, set up meet and greets, and come walk with us. together we win! [www.mikerakebrandtforcongress.com](https://mikerakebrandtforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d296b76944609124692089402&id=2d0cc546cf&e=2362dddf1b)
---
|
---
| |
---
### Upcoming events
10-13 Club National Chapter of Long Island March 2,2022 @7:00 PM
Ridgewood Station Tavern
3231 Sunrise Highway, Wantagh, NY
Queens Village Republican Club March 3, 2022 @7:30 PM
Bellerose Jewish Center
254-14 Union Tpke, Floral Park, NY
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://mikerakebrandtforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d296b76944609124692089402&id=b126521c43&e=2362dddf1b)
---
| | [](https://mikerakebrandtforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d296b76944609124692089402&id=f6ed484f74&e=2362dddf1b)
---

Campaign to elect Mike Rakebrandt For Congress125 Ballad CirHolbrook, NY 11741-3835

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[I'm about to ask you to rush $3 before my critical midnight deadline in nine hours, but first I need to pull back the curtain and explain how everything - EVERYTHING - just changed in the race for the Democratic Majority. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)**

My heart dropped at these latest updates:

- Republicans officially **OUTRAISED** Democrats by more than $1 million
- Shocking predictions now show they're likely to **RETAKE** our Majority
- And a **DEVASTATING** new poll revealed Republicans just took the LEAD I won't mince words with you:

Things are not looking good.

Our best chance of winning this election and saving our Majority rests on outraising Republicans.

****[Hear me loud and clear: I will stop at nothing to keep Trump, McConnell, and McCarthy from ever holding an ounce of power again- but I can't do it alone. So I'm calling for 1,200 Democrats to rush $3 before midnight. Can I count on you? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)****

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues CIA for Records of Contacts with Indicted Clinton Campaign Lawyer Michael Sussmann
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) seeking records of meetings and phone conversations between any CIA personnel and former Clinton campaign lawyer Michael Sussmann, who has been charged in Special Counsel John Durham’s investigation with making a false statement to a federal agent.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 21, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58128&L=26831&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWljaGFlbC1zdXNzbWFubi1jb250YWN0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Judicial Watch Sues CIA for Records of Contacts with Indicted Clinton Campaign Lawyer Michael Sussmann](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58128&L=26831&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWljaGFlbC1zdXNzbWFubi1jb250YWN0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** On February 11, Durham, who is investigating the origins of the Trump-Russia investigation, filed a motion, which focused on potential conflicts of interest related to the representation of Sussmann, who has been charged with making a false statement to a federal agent. Sussmann has pleaded not guilty. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58128&L=26831&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWljaGFlbC1zdXNzbWFubi1jb250YWN0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58128&L=26811&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9ydGgtY2Fyb2xpbmEtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Judicial Watch Settles North Carolina Voter Roll Lawsuit after State Removes over 430,000 Inactive Names from Rolls](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58128&L=26811&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9ydGgtY2Fyb2xpbmEtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** In June 2019, the U.S. Election Assistance Commission (EAC) released data showing that voter registration rates in a significant proportion of North Carolina’s 100 counties were close to, at or above 100% of their age-eligible citizenry – statistics considered by the courts to be a strong indication that a jurisdiction is not taking the steps required by law to remove ineligible registrants. Judicial Watch’s analysis also showed that at the time of the EAC report the entire State of North Carolina had a registration rate close to 100% of its age-eligible citizenry. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58128&L=26811&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9ydGgtY2Fyb2xpbmEtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---|---

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) seeking records of meetings and phone conversations between any CIA personnel and former Clinton campaign lawyer Michael Sussmann, who has been charged in Special Counsel John Durham’s investigation with making a false statement to a federal agent. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 21, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | On February 11, Durham, who is investigating the origins of the Trump-Russia investigation, filed a motion, which focused on potential conflicts of interest related to the representation of Sussmann, who has been charged with making a false statement to a federal agent. Sussmann has pleaded not guilty. ---|--- | | | | | In June 2019, the U.S. Election Assistance Commission (EAC) released data showing that voter registration rates in a significant proportion of North Carolina’s 100 counties were close to, at or above 100% of their age-eligible citizenry – statistics considered by the courts to be a strong indication that a jurisdiction is not taking the steps required by law to remove ineligible registrants. Judicial Watch’s analysis also showed that at the time of the EAC report the entire State of North Carolina had a registration rate close to 100% of its age-eligible citizenry. ---|--- | | | | | The anti-Trump operation used the “assistance of researchers at a U.S.-based university who were receiving and analyzing large amounts of Internet data in connection with a pending federal government cybersecurity research contract.” ---|--- | | | | = | = Pushing a Department of Defense (DOD) initiative to recruit and promote minorities, a senior Pentagon official proclaimed this month that diversity, equity and inclusion will help the U.S. military achieve critical missions and make forces more lethal. “Diversity, equity and inclusion in the military are necessities for the United States,” according to Bishop Garrison, a senior advisor to Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin who worked as a defense and homeland security official under Obama and a foreign policy advisor on Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaign. = ---|--- | | | MyNewsLA.com The conservative judicial watchdog group Judicial Watch filed the taxpayer lawsuit in August 2019 against then-Secretary of State Alex Padilla on behalf of plaintiffs Robin Crest, Earl De Vries and Judy De Vries. Judicial Watch argues that California’s quotas for women on corporate boards violates the California Constitution’s equal protection clause and asks the court to permanently enjoin any expenditure of taxpayer funds to implement the quotas. == The Washington Examiner Black Lives Matter filings reveal prominent Democratic lawyer Marc Elias and another longtime ally of former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton have taken on key roles in the charity amid scrutiny over its leadership and finances. “There seems to be very little daylight between the Democratic Party and Black Lives Matter,” Tom Fitton, the president of Judicial Watch, a conservative legal foundation, told the Washington Examiner, adding, “An avowedly Marxist organization is now being represented by the most prominent Democratic Party lawyer in the country. ... Does that say more about BLM or more about the party operatives that are now seemingly running the show there?” == = CNS News Two non-profit organizations, CatholicVote and Judicial Watch, recently filed a Freedom of Information Act lawsuitagainst the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) because they failed to provide requested information about their communications with Catholic-affiliated agencies at the border and the agencies’ alleged role in the surge of illegal immigrants over the last year. = = = = = = = | CLIPS = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

body:
Read what's new with Tanya's campaign. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2ff7b555d1a4/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-6776145?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
The momentum behind Team Tanya continues to grow. Our team is out there knocking on doors and Tanya is speaking with the grassroots all over AZ-04. We can feel the energy building and would love for you to join our movement. If you're interested, hit reply and we'll tell you how you can get involved!

**ENDORSEMENT ALERT**

Winning for Women, a national group committed to helping strong, viable female candidates in their primaries and general elections, endorsed Tanya this week. A record number of women have filed to run for federal office this year and Winning for Women has only endorsed 19 so far. Tanya is proud to be one of them! It's also worth noting that Winning for Women has a strong track record of success - 87% of their endorsed candidates win their primary. This shows that Tanya has what it takes to go the distance and keep fighting for East Valley families.

**It's Petition Time!! Can You Help?**

We need to get as many petition signatures as possible to get Tanya on the ballot, as well as to show the Democrats that we mean business by blowing past our signature total goal.

If you haven't signed Tanya's petition yet, you can sign it [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=afb4569eb2&e=bd2b55b0e3).

Do you have a little time to help get your neighbors and friends on board? If so, hit reply or text or call us at 480-420-7822 and our team will get you everything you need.
---
| **Don't Forget!**
* Sign Tanya's Petition [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=c329bf5bf3&e=bd2b55b0e3)
* Follow the campaign trail on [Instagram](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=51aad78dad&e=bd2b55b0e3).
* Get news and updates on [Twitter](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=3e7ac40c8b&e=bd2b55b0e3) and [Facebook](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=8d5dc25515&e=bd2b55b0e3).

---
| **Tales From the Trail**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: The Kangaroo Court Speaks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Not legit. |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cad96ea4cd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I guess putting forth groundbreaking legislation to decertify the irredeemably compromised 2020 election was the straw that ultimately broke the camels’ back.

**Now, the scared and fragile Democrats are roping me into their phony January 6 th “investigation.”**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0487561fda&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9bf7af4112&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **So what qualifies me for the privilege of being part of this sham hearing? **

**_“In the days following the January 6 th attack on the United States Capitol, you stated that you were also in Washington D.C. ‘to deliver an evidence book and letter to Vice President Pence showing key evidence of fraud in the Arizona Presidential Election, and asking him to consider postponing the awarding of electors...’ You have also indicated that you were at the Capitol Grounds on January 6 and ‘took a few photos.’”_**

So the damning evidence against me is I wanted to peacefully provide Vice President Pence with evidence and take a few photos? What a joke.

**Look at the date of the letter. February 15 th.**

**Just one week after I submitted legislation to decertify Arizona.**

**_There is a grand irony here. The letter also reads:_**

_“The Select Committee has tremendous respect for the roles and responsibilities of federal, state, and local elected officials and we do not seek information from you that is related to official actions that you took as an elected lawmaker. At the same time, we have a solemn responsibility to investigate fully the facts and circumstances of these events.”_

Tremendous respect? If that were the case perhaps they might show respect for the authority of state legislators to conduct inquiry into factual claims of mischievous behaviors such as those memorialized in HCR-2033.

**_State Legislatures are RESPONSIBLE for State Elections. Period._**

The point is this. The kangaroo court has turned their laser focus for their witch hunt on me, and on Arizona. [This is why I need your help to fight back.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=29fdafda90&e=44b8c466b0)

[Please support my campaign and support my fight in Arizona. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1f1dd58909&e=44b8c466b0) We are taking a lot of heat from the Democrats in DC who are afraid of what would happen if we Decertify Arizona.

[This is why we must press on, harder than ever! Please consider donating today with just $5, $10, $25, or $50!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=03c413a1ee&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3b3fa7091f&e=44b8c466b0)

**🗞️ IN THE NEWS**

This governor will stop at nothing to ensure he alone controls the lives of our schoolchildren. More than 500 Illinois school districts were ignoring J.B. Pritzker’s hollow threats. Last week, the appellate court sided with the parents and struck down Pritzker's mask mandate.

Now Pritzker is taking his appeal to the Supreme Court. This only further highlights how fixated he is on power - and how disconnected he is from the needs of IL families. A Sullivan Administration will respect the rights of parents, the rule of law, and put parents back in the driver's seat.

**🎤 TAKE ACTION**

In the latest example of Pritzker blatantly disregarding public safety, the governor recently pardoned a convicted arsonist, allowing him to become (get this) a fire chief. This sheds light on Pritzker's pardon process, which is anything but transparent.

His self-appointed Prisoner Review Board (composed of 14 members, with 3 vacancies and 9 lacking Senate confirmation) meets behind closed doors to hear clemency petitions, makes a recommendation to Pritzker, but keeps all decisions confidential. Illinoisans are left in the dark.

The result? Pritzker's PRB has granted 162 pardons, including child killers, cop killers, and arsonists. Meanwhile, the public has no way to verify whether these pardons were granted for legitimate reasons. Just look below at the violent offenders Pritzker has released in the last year.

It's common sense - Pritzker's shady pardon process is making us less safe. [**Join our "Safe Streets" task force to demand a change!**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=f7f8121d81ee4ca290d6099f059de882&_e=h4d8OO1k3AfE3v-Qg8gCp1eYSXJISo8swvPklEi-wkbAZ9uJEXjjx3iv8vhv_XH66JaV5haPxs49ZmET56rUh4M0XmSP4vlasC_aPH7rem6RG7DUQ2GySUouUdd1I0AWJhk6byCFS3OgWAFVXz78c1EUSdCvaG4osSEPiFVHbHNJLq_6yqBjUrfkvMW_K01MQq4aRnGvfBIIpdeQkkb6HQUZ7z14kMbx3P6pRx9yP2_Bmq-rMlzuEc3ocGQnJnkVyc0dxT2bBq1IlSsMvWG4qWV0BRTl5HCZPj8_xmgxqo5k5EuA9XIYSRe0Uv9_q6ItlXb5jKn_GuaIOgCjNXQCR0p_isiARvcg5syH-IAR0TxUqDRIIxQhoK06koMKS9jjSLf2WcffRR4YHttMRAnqdVjkHNbYsfjlUJ8PrvqjjfmoLulEwuIrBlnFAUWBKtAnQvhxL3yFoBQmHpxHHso0Kg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Hope you had a Happy Presidents’ Day! Here’s the latest from our campaign’s quest to make this state worthy of being the Land of Lincoln again. | | Team, Hope you had a Happy Presidents’ Day! Here’s the latest from our campaign’s quest to make this state worthy of being the Land of Lincoln again. 🎉 RSVP TO OUR FIRST RALLY Have you RSVPed to our Save Illinois Kickoff Rally? We’ll have food, drinks, and the team that is going to Save Illinois from the crime, corruption, and high taxes that have forced so many of our neighbors to flee. 🗞️ IN THE NEWS This governor will stop at nothing to ensure he alone controls the lives of our schoolchildren. More than 500 Illinois school districts were ignoring J.B. Pritzker’s hollow threats. Last week, the appellate court sided with the parents and struck down Pritzker's mask mandate. Now Pritzker is taking his appeal to the Supreme Court. This only further highlights how fixated he is on power - and how disconnected he is from the needs of IL families. A Sullivan Administration will respect the rights of parents, the rule of law, and put parents back in the driver's seat. 🎤 TAKE ACTION In the latest example of Pritzker blatantly disregarding public safety, the governor recently pardoned a convicted arsonist, allowing him to become (get this) a fire chief. This sheds light on Pritzker's pardon process, which is anything but transparent. His self-appointed Prisoner Review Board (composed of 14 members, with 3 vacancies and 9 lacking Senate confirmation) meets behind closed doors to hear clemency petitions, makes a recommendation to Pritzker, but keeps all decisions confidential. Illinoisans are left in the dark. The result? Pritzker's PRB has granted 162 pardons, including child killers, cop killers, and arsonists. Meanwhile, the public has no way to verify whether these pardons were granted for legitimate reasons. Just look below at the violent offenders Pritzker has released in the last year. It's common sense - Pritzker's shady pardon process is making us less safe. 🖊️ PETITION SIGNATURES Want to help Jesse and Kathleen get on the ballot? Download your petition here: . Make sure to mail in your petition by February 28, details, and instructions can be found on our website. 📊 ILLINOIS FACTS OF THE WEEK Tragically, in Chicago, a person is shot every 3 hours and 24 minutes and a person is murdered every 14 hours and 5 minutes. It’s time for new leadership at the top. We have to save our state. Thanks for reading our newsletter. Our state faces many serious problems, but together we can Save Illinois. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Presidents’ Day For The People
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends:
Over the years, I have had the honor of serving with several Presidents – Democrats and Republicans – and have witnessed how vital it is to have a President who puts our country and the American People first. As Lincoln characterized his view of the charge of the President in his second Inaugural Address, bringing the American people together “with malice toward none and charity for all.”
In the Presidency or in the Congress, we are proud partisans as standard bearers for our political parties — but we must govern For The People, serving the entire country and making progress in the lives of the American people.
President George Washington cautioned in his Farewell Address that we must beware of political parties at war with their own government, warning that through parties, “cunning, ambitious, and unprincipled men will be enabled to subvert the power of the people and to usurp for themselves the reins of government.”
The words of Washington and Lincoln echo with us still today, as we continue to build back better from the recent tumult that jeopardized our Democracy and temporarily imperiled our unbroken chain of peaceful transfers of power.
On this Presidents’ Day, we honor the Presidents who have shaped our country into a more perfect union during their sacred tenure and we celebrate that President Joe Biden is a man of empathy and courage who is working relentlessly to bring us out of the pandemic and into a stronger, healthier, and more equitable and prosperous American present and future For The People.
May God continue to bless this great nation, our men and women in uniform and their families, and you.
NANCY
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e2d08bae-8a93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/a93a3d31-8b93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTNhM2QzMS04YjkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHViGi1aXQqwa5KSxO5O2dAWjw2a8p97SmJZbAvQPsA=&id=117907000 .

My job as governor is to be the defender of our state, so it doesn't faze me when the Biden Administration and his radical left cronies attack me for putting Florida's children first.
If they had it their way, Florida school children would still be in masks and our schools would be closed, and I can promise you that will _**never**_ happen under my watch.

Fellow American,

We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof:

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, **the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign.** " _- The Hill, 2/9/2022_

Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent.

**_[Here is our ask of you today: will you chip in $7 today to help us offset Hollywood's support of our opponent?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2e92095a956a458a9491d14d82fe5986&_e=hkqcdgCKQdMewzRIhyPDmRBkt2f1N96rwHzcXM-xK5EmUWQ40Q_pq9VvhVA501nTrPTXTr-Tkb1zgzArWtCpphMQpdlElXl46555sfWPrfvgX_-PEXxcZfIYPlZYZYRHql1A9di-0Lm1oTDRobEctyjARGdRUAISoCwbzwYI5XtIq2W8v38f3K4c8QMO18h8Znwxo2m81wfu4x23qnsXYg6gc_SKpiiejXSGvT_oMso4LESNgQj4r8rEyZ2SyZPHthgOz3fS0OHg3Tt4sa6My1CzQdr63oqzCjJMlo-EU4x0kIdI0gATp_R1uAnE1xjy1deM-MOHj6zhd4anQZkRHaOcGqp92AkHpqwip27962nHqicOFwEtJybvs3fx4k0ALHcHHteFnhtuOV0CI0-Tg6T0KRM9woZPfWIwuZdLp1CbQzCXPkaOhL5b2r3sl-Vug2ap4eGaji6WPL1bmJ78bsssslDP5ihQqknIVEBw3k8%3D)_**

clean_body: It’s clear we’re only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. | Fellow American, We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof: | "Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign. " - The Hill, 2/9/2022 Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate. We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help. That may sound like an arbitrary number, but it's the amount of money we need to be raising - DAILY - to run the most competitive campaign possible. While our opponent supports Hollywood's values, I'm fighting for Georgia and our conservative values. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. subject: Back the Blue Invitation for Peter
body:
[](https://) Peter, Bernie is headed back to the Buckeye state! Join former New York City Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik and future U.S. Senator Jane Timken one more time before Election Day. Support for our Ohio police officers has become a cornerstone of Jane's campaign and you will not want to miss our "Back the Blue" tour as we launch our _Cops for Jane_ coalition and introduce or statewide advisory board! Join us March 18th & 19th in Cincinnati, Dayton, Columbus, and Lima! Click the button below to RSVP! name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: When will Democrats stop playing political games?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a9b2d56698e0/when-will-democrats-stop-playing-political-games?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=18afcbd26e&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| Dear ,

When I made the decision to run for Congress, one of the largest driving factors was my frustration with how frequently our Democrat representatives play political games instead of doing their jobs and representing their constituents.

Just yesterday, Delegate Dan Helmer gave us a great example of this when he came out publicly in support of requiring Virginia House of Delegates elections again in 2022. The problem rests with his justification, which is that he doesn't want Republicans to be able to pass their legislation. His solution is that instead of serving a usual two-year term, he wants to hold elections again so that his political party has a chance to take away the Republican majority.

Take a look for yourself:
---
|
---
| Rather than focus on what the law stipulates, elected Democrats like Dan Helmer would prefer to come up with irrelevant justifications to accomplish their goals.

In this case, his justification said the quiet part out loud. Democrats don't care about protecting our democracy or following the requirements of our state and federal constitutions. They care about accomplishing their radical agenda.

That's why it's imperative that we regain a majority in the U.S. House of Representatives, just as we did in the Virginia House of Delegates this year.

Without control of the House of Representatives, we allow Democrats to implement Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's wildly progressive agenda unchecked and continue to erode our democracy.

**[Will you please consider chipping in with $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to help me take back the House of Representatives and save our country? ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=cc72a21709&e=fc83fb200d)**
---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7f5aba48ad&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")

---

Jeanine Lawson

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Reaching voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, [**Healthcare, housing, and jobs for all: we have the money. What we lack is the political will to make these policies happen. I’m running to combine a seat in Congress with direct action to fight for those policies, but first I need your help to win. Please chip in now, if you can. Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42076787/331555741/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGUzMzIyOS05MDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uhm0oVho0tRLbRim6QPP58LuDLjCLsUd7sbdqJ1nExs=) I’m a direct-action organizer. I’m used to pushing the powerful to do what’s right, and last winter, I helped get 200 additional homeless shelter beds added in Tacoma and get a temporary shelter extended. I’m willing to do what’s needed. I’m willing to debate any of my opponents. I can’t say the same for my Chevron-funded opponent Derek Kilmer, who refused to appear on a stage with me during my 2020 campaign and still hasn’t acknowledged my 2022 campaign. I’m willing to talk to the press. Instead, I’ve been met with a media blackout. In 2020, a local paper even wrote about a man who was _thinking_ about running for the same seat, and another article about how he was no longer _thinking_ about running — but nothing about me, the woman actually running! In 2020, we bypassed this stonewalling by taking our message directly to voters. We made over 900,000 phone calls and won 35,000 votes as a result. [**In 2022, I need to reach voters at their doors and on the airwaves, so I can overcome the media blackout. Can you chip in $3 now for my Voter Outreach fund, so I can do that?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42076788/331555742/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGUzMzIyOS05MDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uhm0oVho0tRLbRim6QPP58LuDLjCLsUd7sbdqJ1nExs=) clean_body: | | | Hi there, = I’m a direct-action organizer. I’m used to pushing the powerful to do what’s right, and last winter, I helped get 200 additional homeless shelter beds added in Tacoma and get a temporary shelter extended. I’m willing to do what’s needed. I’m willing to debate any of my opponents. I can’t say the same for my Chevron-funded opponent Derek Kilmer, who refused to appear on a stage with me during my 2020 campaign and still hasn’t acknowledged my 2022 campaign. I’m willing to talk to the press. Instead, I’ve been met with a media blackout. In 2020, a local paper even wrote about a man who was thinking about running for the same seat, and another article about how he was no longer thinking about running — but nothing about me, the woman actually running! In 2020, we bypassed this stonewalling by taking our message directly to voters. We made over 900,000 phone calls and won 35,000 votes as a result. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Take Back the House

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=4b1d234045524bebb58d42a7bf047401&_e=F_jfkZxUr9q7saw7gNsZ2W1DB-6pwxNIapHCrTqxgU5Mow0TNc4nXjGwjnN5khdjtfuryXwuecy6cX37K7JNOU6Gpf6jDvB4ZaYr69sHDpLodJPWi3ES0IWYAbm7d4KYCpxXiCaLFamYb0-AbyiO4OlaN2vuYbjkYmfC2FHA7-slVDc54cFkQqjpqUe5cwUtrYLbGEhSCYnNyPyqKeydYub3oWu7HLrGjAiUg_U5BSRByjetUdA7tFEQi5dCPsJxk6YL470lrsszo2VJy5JorRV-0fUgQ8v-A55AUnK9aoTbwkK288n7EvYlIPjCe2L9ljt1aCWgWl3JBaEXZY8HhS4lj-ex-pyTu7otmvx3pHy8VXRcYskIjZM2dq7W9YwJ4OhJQY_eesnDb75UVLX9A2IQ09Z1MFZPuxrCaGhtvZ80KWtXMiKzSgYT_D-rRhzQ1y7vY-Dk9yr-hNpV0zewChGAnamS0Dh29u8EM9wR8G4%3D)

Friend,

We’ve seen it for the past year and it’s only getting worse - _**the Dems are falling apart.**_ Our borders are open, our taxes are higher, our gas prices are rising, and our law enforcement officers are being _disrespected_ and _forgotten_. | [**YES - I WANT TO WATCH THE DEMS FALL APART!** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=4b1d234045524bebb58d42a7bf047401&_e=F_jfkZxUr9q7saw7gNsZ2W1DB-6pwxNIapHCrTqxgU5Mow0TNc4nXjGwjnN5khdjtfuryXwuecy6cX37K7JNOU6Gpf6jDvB4ZaYr69sHDpLodJPWi3ES0IWYAbm7d4KYCpxXiCaLFamYb0-AbyiO4OlaN2vuYbjkYmfC2FHA7-slVDc54cFkQqjpqUe5cwUtrYLbGEhSCYnNyPyqKeydYub3oWu7HLrGjAiUg_U5BSRByjetUdA7tFEQi5dCPsJxxmBxhNe3KribCWNRZU7zwX_JxdgZFp2qnkXp6bw1Olk3MtqnWtJDPGir5jpZMSARlVB0QufQzhdtpLyqXAF29O6TxJkcQpZrFmdfiiJKqsqM01SHfaaDDU5zaawuhl2x_qPOZ9ASJz23C0Cq1LIwm2RM8-q5RZtOWQfuNZUWldM-HaIZsE_deQsrhfK5ZE-kCt2KXb5GLQF-whl9_Z9oE1uiQGKpl6zN1jQZRApd1oc%3D)
---
_There’s no question – this is our year. Republicans are fired up after seeing so many radical policies affect their communities, families, and wallets._ **We are going to Take Back the House in 2022 and I want YOU to be a part of this historic election.** [**YES - I WANT TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=4b1d234045524bebb58d42a7bf047401&_e=F_jfkZxUr9q7saw7gNsZ2W1DB-6pwxNIapHCrTqxgU5Mow0TNc4nXjGwjnN5khdjtfuryXwuecy6cX37K7JNOU6Gpf6jDvB4ZaYr69sHDpLodJPWi3ES0IWYAbm7d4KYCpxXiCaLFamYb0-AbyiO4OlaN2vuYbjkYmfC2FHA7-slVDc54cFkQqjpqUe5cwUtrYLbGEhSCYnNyPyqKeydYub3oWu7HLrGjAiUg_U5BSRByjetUdA7tFEQi5dCPsJxvMB6XXittPeVtghc4Z7L_POgL_BJGxSR9PoFC7sdQg83tGiuGmF3ZAyJrhCuWtIjtuDA_KDtUarKI5THKESgZDdeC9jxISfTdFN25AC21jmgakXtRUK1mEwxWMiPDbj-NNNBCtIn2G_PkVvk0NVBxvxjSsfWBYul0atU_QdOSI-5UkyOBGLM_zga9JBWMFy-UFuyRWHm_A3i7YJM9H7ZdnwU5hVgmaBhgC5AzQJ6gKU%3D)
---

I promise to hit the ground running on _**Day One**_ to create better policies for Virginia families and ensure the FBI focuses on criminal terrorists infiltrating our border and NOT parents fighting for their kids. _**I will return our priorities to supporting our veterans, law enforcement and first responders, tackling the drug epidemic, and making sure your tax dollars are spent efficiently.**_

[**Join me in the fight to Take Back the House and hit the ground running in Congress.**](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=4b1d234045524bebb58d42a7bf047401&_e=F_jfkZxUr9q7saw7gNsZ2W1DB-6pwxNIapHCrTqxgU5Mow0TNc4nXjGwjnN5khdjtfuryXwuecy6cX37K7JNOU6Gpf6jDvB4ZaYr69sHDpLodJPWi3ES0IWYAbm7d4KYCpxXiCaLFamYb0-AbyiO4OlaN2vuYbjkYmfC2FHA7-slVDc54cFkQqjpqUe5cwUtrYLbGEhSCYnNyPyqKeydYub3oWu7HLrGjAiUg_U5BSRByjetUdA7tFEQi5dCPsJxFTN5iZY7_EOaBbFYP7sBoAG-SvVGchL93Ue8CqhzssjpTnHgCH-YqaBRxFthleKZrLg4QqUSdTZKd3ZVYzCABKR-S8CoRxnlRdFfIQH7w1gxWYDO3JWf9Gj4jMT1Yn6d1TQ9-yqzX3L97rwTITiC8B9o2pZB91HWz2JWN068e47izJNNL63hpPVLmM1_kqwojMEwB_lZTy1gDBQoNs2gXwwZNqsR5KnZNlmOLu7KKhc%3D) [**YES - I SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE POLICIES FOR VIRGINIA!** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=4b1d234045524bebb58d42a7bf047401&_e=F_jfkZxUr9q7saw7gNsZ2W1DB-6pwxNIapHCrTqxgU5Mow0TNc4nXjGwjnN5khdjtfuryXwuecy6cX37K7JNOU6Gpf6jDvB4ZaYr69sHDpLodJPWi3ES0IWYAbm7d4KYCpxXiCaLFamYb0-AbyiO4OlaN2vuYbjkYmfC2FHA7-slVDc54cFkQqjpqUe5cwUtrYLbGEhSCYnNyPyqKeydYub3oWu7HLrGjAiUg_U5BSRByjetUdA7tFEQi5dCPsJxmmXfWMLN_ZDI6hEsc1QZvlm5NMkR5Gx5nTU71nr2PyPg3s7Leb5v820_4BvjuKE9pwBWkFQirkNFNbB9e2XYfphBKvOAL3yNV6ZcnZ-MV13FDI8F-femrmlpbp8_pdCX9wJPh0B3fuHg4jI4xdAxt1xY7fhVs45VAdim2__YAT-Zgp7C58xkHoEsqMbdeBfLTXeq6a1j4ZgTgQ7ycdzi85UIwFfs8ScmC0QeybwzqW4%3D)
---

Together, we will turn things around and **get Virginia – and Washington – back on track.** With your support, we will keep growing the **#YesToYesli** movement and Take Back the House.

God Bless,

[](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=4b1d234045524bebb58d42a7bf047401&_e=F_jfkZxUr9q7saw7gNsZ2W1DB-6pwxNIapHCrTqxgU5Mow0TNc4nXjGwjnN5khdjtfuryXwuecy6cX37K7JNOU6Gpf6jDvB4ZaYr69sHDpLodJPWi3ES0IWYAbm7d4KYCpxXiCaLFamYb0-AbyiO4OlaN2vuYbjkYmfC2FHA7-slVDc54cFkQqjpqUe5cwUtrYLbGEhSCYnNyPyqKeydYub3oWu7HLrGjAiUg_U5BSRByjetUdA7tFEQi5dCPsJxAfz7Wu6uUuPvVyrDWBoCKO75tcUS5QFgavjsPmq4tZvC9U3DPhRU_uK0ppQ3Y7snOK6-Pvtksp0GwG5liw2DDJx9nirGqn0iyYwcscMTHNtToeE2_4G5TyQZ-VrEOpYbjZYpwcchq3NRkXUbtB1qg8ya80afvQmEC4c4y8v7E8tTAUpBwIkV32Zuw7XJNCeHyA5Ro73AwMDeUocrrA3JyTidI3j4bT0Le-FDww6rQsc%3D)
