name: Beto for Texas
subject: This isn't a drill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is what voter suppression looks like.
#
Greg Abbott’s voter suppression law is working as intended, and it’s wreaking havoc on our elections.
Early voting for primary elections — including our own primary — started last Monday. But in Harris County, where nearly 2.5 million registered voters live, **a staggering 40% of mail-in ballots have already been rejected.**
**This is not a drill.** Congress has shown it won’t protect our voting rights. The Supreme Court won’t either. So it’s on ALL of us to step up.
If we want every voter to get a say in who becomes their next governor, we need nothing less than a historic, record-setting voter mobilization effort that is bigger than anything Texas has seen before.
[Will you donate right away to fuel our voter outreach program? We’re in the midst of an ambitious push to have our 44,000+ volunteers reach 3 million voters before March 1st — and we need every single supporter’s help to get it done, including yours. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53280?refcode=ema20220221-176946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=176946%2E444211%2E5YZeLL)
Make no mistake: Abbott signed SB1 into law to cement his own power. His success in this campaign will rely on low voter turnout from the communities most hurt by these new voter restrictions.
**That means we have to work twice as hard, register more voters than ever before, and make sure a historic number of people show up at the ballot box in November.**
Over the course of February, we’re going to personally connect with over 3 million Texas voters. That means we’re going to knock on their doors, reach them on their phones, and even send them hand-written notes in the mail. Tens of thousands of volunteers have joined our team — that’s more than twice the number of volunteers we had in 2018, when we set the voter turnout record in Texas.
This is how we directly take on Greg Abbott’s voter suppression, and it’s how we win this election. But we can’t do it without you.
[By making a donation to our campaign today, you will help us reach the Texans most targeted by Abbott’s new voter suppression law. Can you chip in today? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53280?refcode=ema20220221-176946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=176946%2E444211%2E5YZeLL)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53280?refcode=ema20220221-176946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=176946%2E444211%2E5YZeLL)**
We can do this but it can’t wait.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220221-176946-footer&t=22&refcode2=176946_444211_5YZeLL&akid=176946%2E444211%2E5YZeLL)**
---

body:
On the Vicki McKenna Show Tuesday
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rAQ35u36yAogtXPYpE50iqOrLQhVxeasGlKnttE6MekcltjipgoTJEH9zTCPL2Z93ocT33ehuvu8SZ0UbKkp_QsjJ1LWo6TKON-KLvkEV5H0Y2odORE_AEVHOtr6c7oqpB6EzZhlYWl51srqZN7-Y6HLXF9SAtgt&c=MnL-oCvk4BHHl2iHsJOIlMPMDc-bFnReFCMfVfsI4_vy0xMzqgLoKQ==&ch=QKwkN61vKwBlRudjq-h76NObCpl180NyFLq-qaFaK-g3gPL3VOyHQg==)
---
|
# Weekly Update - It was a great week for my campaign
---
| | |
---|---
|
Greetings, Patriots!

My team and I have had another fantastic week on the campaign trail! From enjoying an educational agricultural tour in the open air to taking in the enthusiasm of a crowded downtown event and everything in between, this week has been a great step towards retiring Mark Pocan!

On Saturday, I had the honor to speak at the very well attended Sauk County GOP Caucus in Reedsburg. The people there are so excited to have hope that their voice will not be blocked out by Madison liberals, and they know what it will take to make that happen!

Tuesday afternoon, at 4:00, I will have the opportunity to join Vicki McKenna on her radio show on 1310 WIBA, so tune in if you can or find the podcast!

Join us on Thursday from 5:00-8:00pm at our Meet & Greet at [1042 20th St., Prairie du Sac, WI 53578](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rAQ35u36yAogtXPYpE50iqOrLQhVxeasGlKnttE6MekcltjipgoTJI5JOZhf1VMRIrY90THGI5WxiBLJS16rH9GjGXoHkikMyZFFzqibrjMezPUO0JGS8cuPsbE8uLm-o5WNTJhcnywn8-SBYCAuWeO1VN9abulCQXsWJeAGkx0=&c=MnL-oCvk4BHHl2iHsJOIlMPMDc-bFnReFCMfVfsI4_vy0xMzqgLoKQ==&ch=QKwkN61vKwBlRudjq-h76NObCpl180NyFLq-qaFaK-g3gPL3VOyHQg==). It will be a great time to better get to know your future representative and have a wonderful time in the company of others who care about our country! Please RSVP by responding to this email.

I am looking forward to the coming week and all that it will have in store for bringing American values back home to our District.

Be a part of our ever-growing team, and we will flip this District for the people on November 8th!

clean_body: On the Vicki McKenna Show Tuesday | | | | == | Weekly Update - It was a great week for my campaign | | | ---|--- | Greetings, Patriots! My team and I have had another fantastic week on the campaign trail! From enjoying an educational agricultural tour in the open air to taking in the enthusiasm of a crowded downtown event and everything in between, this week has been a great step towards retiring Mark Pocan! On Saturday, I had the honor to speak at the very well attended Sauk County GOP Caucus in Reedsburg. The people there are so excited to have hope that their voice will not be blocked out by Madison liberals, and they know what it will take to make that happen! Tuesday afternoon, at 4:00, I will have the opportunity to join Vicki McKenna on her radio show on 1310 WIBA, so tune in if you can or find the podcast! Join us on Thursday from 5:00-8:00pm at our Meet & Greet at ==. It will be a great time to better get to know your future representative and have a wonderful time in the company of others who care about our country! Please RSVP by responding to this email. I am looking forward to the coming week and all that it will have in store for bringing American values back home to our District. Be a part of our ever-growing team, and we will flip this District for the people on November 8th! | | | Scenes from the past week | | . | | Charity Barry | | == | | == | | == | | | == == == == == | 437 S. name: Laura Loomer
subject: It’s President’s Day, NOT Resident’s Day!
body:
Today, we celebrate the 45 men who have served as our nation's President and Commander in Chief . . .
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/G2wlRgpUjtGe67E5rBk7mA/608t7kEPLnWwGdMLUiOGYg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/G2wlRgpUjtGe67E5rBk7mA/608t7kEPLnWwGdMLUiOGYg) Today, we celebrate the 45 men who have served as our nation's President and Commander in Chief . . . and no, I'm not including Joe Biden, the current White House resident.

In 2020, officials and politicians around our nation changed voting rules to favor Democrats and their mail-in voting schemes **as the leadership of the Republican Party did nothing to stop them!**

While Democrats and the Fake News Media fearmongered over COVID to keep voters home, nearly every state in the nation experienced some form of drastic change to their voting rules, which in turn left room for the DNC machine to deceptively and fraudulently change the outcome of our 2020 elections.

The result was a stolen election from the American people and the installment of a complete, left-wing opposition government.

Elections have consequences, but STOLEN ELECTIONS have graver and more serious consequences.

As we head into the 2022 Mid-Term elections, we have to be vigilant, and that's why I'm bolstering my ground game now to keep an eye on the vote for my race - and every race that's on the ballot in my district!

[**Help me build my volunteer army and Election Day operations team by donating today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/G2wlRgpUjtGe67E5rBk7mA/608t7kEPLnWwGdMLUiOGYg)

After the widespread fraud and manipulation tactics that took place during the 2020 elections, it's never too early to start bolstering election integrity efforts for my upcoming primary in August as well as the November General Election.

You can bet that by October, there will be some new virus being touted by Fauci, while Biden, Pelosi and their Gestapo propagandists at CNN and MSDNC do all they can to put the fear of death into voters so they stay home, don't participate in political events, and instead choose to mail in their ballots for yet another election cycle.

There's nothing wrong with absentee voting, but only if you personally request your own ballot. We can't allow for the Democrats under the guise of their deceptive, new "Voting Rights Bill" to federalize our elections through universal mail-in voting.

We know that universal mail-in voting in all 50 states would be the end of free and fair elections as we know them.

So this President's Day, I'm focusing on Election Integrity so that we can continue to celebrate President's Day, not Resident's Day for fake, installed, career politicians who steal elections.

We have to be prepared and have legal teams in place to counter these fear-based rules that favor Democrats, and I won't be letting them get away with their fraud this election cycle!

If you feel the same was as I do, and I know many of you do, [**please donate today so we can counter the fraud of the Left and win in November**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/G2wlRgpUjtGe67E5rBk7mA/608t7kEPLnWwGdMLUiOGYg).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/608t7kEPLnWwGdMLUiOGYg)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/608t7kEPLnWwGdMLUiOGYg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Melissa=20Martz=20Campaign?=
subject: THANK YOU!! The fair was a success!!
body:
I can not say THANK YOU enough!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/35289bd48114/thank-you-the-fair-was-a-success?e=77bc5297c6)

**
To ALL Who Volunteer & Donated In Kind,
------------------------------------------------------------

This was a last minute event and it was a huge blessing to have SOOO many volunteers come out to support the Campaign. So many volunteered their precious time and talents. I can not say THANK YOU enough! We can not continue this fight with out the help of the people and their support. I am grateful to see people standing up for the representation they deserve.

The campaign was also blessed to have a photographer donate his services, during the week we were at the fair. Therefore, we have an exciting new campaign photo that we can't wait to share, once it is ready.

Keep up the momentum! We are on our way to obtaining the needed signatures and we are on our way to restoring the Republic!!

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz

*Melissa Martz Campaign*

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20Thelander=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Happy Presidents' Day and George Washington's Birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
It's Presidents' Day, and George Washington's Birthday! Let's recognize the nation's first advocate for Term Limits, George Washington himself! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ae0eabb33512/a-strong-finish-to-8851774?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=d306d06d20&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| |
> | | | | As we recognize and celebrate the many presidents that have led our nation throughout her rich history, let's recognize that our first president, George Washington, was the first true advocate for term limits in our political system.
>
> From [George Washington's Mount Vernon](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=696f211a1e&e=f8a0a76a2b):
> **_"In 1796, as his second term in office drew to a close, President [George Washington](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=2a9df74f4f&e=f8a0a76a2b) chose not to seek re-election. Mindful of the precedent his conduct set for future presidents, Washington feared that if he were to die while in office, Americans would view the presidency as a lifetime appointment. Instead, he decided to step down from power, providing the standard of a two-term limit that would eventually be enshrined in the Twenty-Second Amendment to the Constitution."_**
>
> * * *
> [](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=702f9d7867&e=f8a0a76a2b)
> * * *
> _**"It's time we impose those same constraints on the House and Senate in Washington. Our representatives are supposed to mix among their citizenry, asking and answering questions and keeping in touch with their constituents.**
>
> **In the spirit of our first president, I will self-impose term limits on myself, and will advocate for term limits on the entire legislative body.
>
> Tune in tomorrow morning at 7:00 as I join Ric Tyler on [WVOM 101.3FM](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=245cd0613e&e=f8a0a76a2b) to discuss the campaign, the situation in Ukraine, escalating energy prices and the Walk-for-Vets." -Ed**_
> ---
>
> * * *
> * * *
> * * *
> * * *
> * * *
> * * *
>

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Job Opportunity Supporting Ally
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
Hello Friends of Ally,
Our signature gathering firm is hiring more canvassers to help gather signatures for Ally in the Ogden area! Pay starts at $20/hour and more info is below. If this might be a fit for you or someone you know, please apply today and share with your family and friends.
\- Team Ally for Utah

Hiring Immediately, Train and Start Same Day! Our team is gathering signatures from registered voters to get Ally Isom on the ballot for the 2022 Primary! We have flexible scheduling for staff between the hours of 10am and 6pm with a starting pay rate of $20 per hour! And with our competitive raise schedule, you will be making $22 per hour after 22 hours worked and $25 after the next 22 hours work (44 hours total). We are hiring quickly and have a team-focused environment with competitive daily and weekly bonuses. This position requires walking and being on your feet outside for 6-8 hours. More info and application details here: [https://jobs.ksl.com/listing/956316](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tUcpj1zzUCCDVuFTJzhvrlD8z6IdWeckX6W3duilHGXytuu7JnxLxYYP8vck46DLWrA1nvt2AAAEW4myPubjPGGGiAGZ0qV_O2exaX9RZ0N_E4IvlM3NN0-QLy4kaYlhxNwQ7i0Gu6Yzpz0RK-zXpfyDS7fizGl9&c=7UpCUaguctH3r-hNKufTd10nA3bHzOP6yls3KEB6Gqp0bQ7_08zbmA==&ch=bihhb6p5aHyMXEMXddFq38T8_rmu4x22nX0vgTYbI5orwuAq1xe0bA==)
---
Sincerely, Team Ally!
---
